upcoming-breaking-change-conversations-a.description: HubSpot is in the process of replacing thread comments in Help Desk with notes. This update makes the experience more consistent in HubSpot, using the same notes that users have already been creating on CRM records across more features and tools.
upcoming-breaking-change-conversations-a.author: dadams@hubspot.com (David Adams)

portal-14010272.title: CRM Record Timeline Updates
portal-14010272.description: We've updated your CRM record activity timeline with new visuals & powerful new filter options to help you find what matters, faster. New Visuals: Pinned Activities: Highlighted with yellow to focus your attention.. Overdue Indicators: Easily spot overdue tasks and activities at a glance..

portal-14078283.title: Easily Set Custom Chatflow Priority
portal-14078283.description: You can now easily assign a custom priority to your chatflows without using drag-and-drop. Previously, reordering chatflows meant dragging-and-dropping them into place. While this works for smaller setups, it becomes increasingly difficult to manage as the number of chatflows grows, especially when they span across multiple pages. With custom priority, you can simply set the exact order you want.

portal-14066461.title: Mobile Conversations Inbox Migration
portal-14066461.description: We’re migrating the Conversations Inbox in the HubSpot mobile app from React Native to a fully native implementation on Android and iOS. This update is primarily driven by the need to comply with Android’s (Google Play) 16 KB memory page size compatibility requirements taking effect May 31, while also unlocking a faster, richer Inbox experience through native performance and UI capabilities.

portal-14073570.title: Breeze Assistant can now create multi-object Reports
portal-14073570.description: Breeze Assistant can now generate reports that pull data from multiple objects, enabling you to analyze relationships across your business in a single report.

portal-14076231.title: Admin-defined Column Defaults for Line Item Editors
portal-14076231.description: Admins can now set default line item columns for their whole team. Super Admins can define which columns appear in line item editors across Deals, Quotes, Invoices, Subscriptions, and more — for every user in their portal. Please note: this update does not affect any public-facing APIs.

portal-14076312.title: Install confirmation modal for unlisted apps
portal-14076312.description: A new confirmation step now appears when installing third-party apps in your HubSpot account. Before an app is installed, you'll notice a confirmation dialog that asks you to verify your intent. Trusted and verified Marketplace apps aren't affected by this change.

portal-14058405.title: Workflow CRM Property Data Restore
portal-14058405.description: Workflow CRM Property Restore is a feature that allows admins to safely undo CRM property changes made by a workflow within the last 14 days. Instead of manually fixing records, you can restore property values that were changed during that period, helping you quickly recover from unintended changes.

portal-14039288.title: Seamlessly Restore CRM Data
portal-14039288.description: Seamlessly Restore CRM Data automatically captures the last 20 versions of your CRM data (45 for contacts), so that you can undo any changes in the last 14 days.

portal-14006970.title: Sunsetting CRM Smart Insights
portal-14006970.description: After April 21st, 2026, CRM smart insights beta features will no longer be available.

portal-14059099.title: Meeting Notetaker with Smart Deal Progression
portal-14059099.description: Enable Sales and Customer Success teams to close more deals, faster, by ensuring every conversation leads to clear next steps and timely follow-up. Smart Deal Progression uses your meeting transcripts and deal history to handle the manual work that follows a customer call.

portal-14076315.title: File Manager: "Updated by" Filter
portal-14076315.description: You can now filter files in the file manager by who last updated them. The new Updated by filter helps you quickly find content modified by a specific user.

portal-14076317.title: File Manager: Improved Drag & Drop and Bulk Selection
portal-14076317.description: We’ve improved the experience in the file manager to make organizing your content faster and more intuitive. These include: Marquee select: clicking and dragging your cursor to create a square shape to select files in the select area is now available for bulk selecting files via list view..

portal-14078223.title: Content Personalization API
portal-14078223.description: The Content Personalization API allows web developers to fetch data about a user, such as their name, user agent, IP, location, contact lists, lifecycle stage and any other CRM contact or company attributes. It could be used to put a user’s name on the page or build functionality equivalent to Smart Content.

portal-14066343.title: Data Sources File Ingestion API for Data Studio
portal-14066343.description: The Data Sources Ingestion File API enables developers to ingest CSV, XLS, XLSX, and TSV files directly into HubSpot Data Studio as reusable external data sources. This API will offer a developer-friendly way to bring tabular data into HubSpot without adhering to CRM object schemas. Use this API to: Upload files to Data Studio without CRM schema constraints.

portal-14073771.title: Clone Marketing Emails with Simple Workflows
portal-14073771.description: When cloning a regular Marketing Email that has a simple workflow configured, you'll now see a new Copy simple workflows checkbox in the clone panel. Enabling this duplicates the email's associated simple workflows automatically, so you don't have to rebuild them from scratch.

portal-14066968.title: Improved Marketing Event Cards in Marketing Studio
portal-14066968.description: Marketing Event cards in Marketing Studio now display key event details directly on the card, so you can manage and distinguish events without opening extra tabs.

portal-14076212.title: Create Workflows Based on Quote Activity
portal-14076212.description: Customers can trigger workflows based on quote activity, like when a quote is viewed, signed, or updated, so they can act at the right moment. Get notified when a prospect views a quote. Send an email when a quote is signed.

portal-14073572.title: Data Studio: Navigation Improvements
portal-14073572.description: An update to the Data Studio dataset building experience that makes it easier to find the tools that you're looking for to shape your data accordingly.

portal-14076307.title: Add Line Items to Deals via Workflow Actions
portal-14076307.description: You now have access to a new workflow action that lets you automatically add line items to a deal. Within a workflow, you can: Select a specific product from your product library. Set a quantity. Automatically attach that line item to the deal when the workflow runs. This brings product and pricing logic directly into your automations. No manual deal updates required.

portal-14073537.title: Improved Notifications for Workflow Issues
portal-14073537.description: Workflow notifications now alert users every time a unique workflow issue reappears, with smart throttling to prevent notification overload from cascading errors.

portal-14055878.title: Shopify App Update: Product Variants Sync
portal-14055878.description: Product variants from Shopify—like different sizes or colors of the same item—now sync into HubSpot as individual product records. Refer to this KB article to learn more (Password: Integrations_282003).

portal-14073370.title: Improved Users Table & Page
portal-14073370.description: The Users page has been redesigned with modern data table functionality to streamline admin workflows and reduce friction in user management. Admins can now leverage bulk operations to update user properties directly from the table without navigating away.

portal-14073351.title: Create report with AI option in Reporting
portal-14073351.description: Users can now select 'Create report with AI' from the Reporting page to open Breeze Assistant and generate reports via chat. They will have the ability to open this report in the builder at any point as well.

portal-14076265.title: A new Notion integration
portal-14076265.description: Introducing a new two-way data sync app with Notion. This new app mirrors the comprehensive integration capabilities found in our 100+ data sync apps which automate the synchronization of data fields and objects across platforms, reducing manual work and ensuring data consistency.

portal-14030253.title: Snooze tickets in help desk
portal-14030253.description: Support reps can now snooze tickets in help desk to temporarily hide them from views and come back to them later without losing focus. Whether dealing with a spike in ticket volume, wrapping up their day, or waiting on follow-up from another team, snooze gives teams the flexibility to stay focused and organized.

portal-14069222.title: Customize Workflow Names for the Enroll in Workflow CRM Card
portal-14069222.description: You can now customize the workflow names that display on the Enroll in Workflow CRM card. This lets you display clearer, more user-friendly names without changing the workflow’s original name in your automation setup.

portal-14066450.title: Agents in CRM Cards
portal-14066450.description: DescriptionBreeze Agent CRM cards display agent outputs directly within CRM records, auto-loading the latest execution for each record and enabling users to select and run agents from a dropdown.

portal-14071206.title: CRM Tool Approval Feature
portal-14071206.description: DescriptionAdmins now see separate 'Read' and 'Write' controls for CRM tools in agent configuration, with a clear option to require or skip approvals for each write tool used in workflows.

portal-14069223.title: Property History & Association History Improvements
portal-14069223.description: Two updates to the historical tracking features on the HubSpot record page: property history now opens in a side panel instead of a standalone page, and association history tracks changes to association labels over time.

portal-14066413.title: Customize Your HubSpot Sales Toolbar in Gmail
portal-14066413.description: Customize the sales toolbar in Gmail to show only the tools you need, reducing clutter and fitting everything into a single row.

portal-14049217.title: Caller ID for HubSpot Numbers (U.S.)
portal-14049217.description: Improve performance of HubSpot phone numbers by allowing customers to self register Caller ID on their phone numbers.

portal-14066526.title: Federal and Provincial Taxes for Canadian Buyers
portal-14066526.description: You can now display federal and provincial Canadian sales tax on quotes, invoices, payment links, and emails if you have enabled automated sales tax for your buyers in the following Canadian provinces: British Columbia, Quebec, and Manitoba.

release-notes-q1-26-product-community-re.title: Release Notes - Q1 26 Product Community Release
release-notes-q1-26-product-community-re.description: HubSpot releases Q1 Community Release Notes highlighting three product updates: a LinkedIn share button for Ideas posts that opens a prefilled composer, privacy improvement hiding biographies from anonymous visitors, and a footer redirect cleanup to improve load times and SEO, signaling a quarterly cadence.

portal-14055634.title: Manually Retry Failed Card Payments
portal-14055634.description: You can now manually retry failed subscription card payments, giving you greater control over revenue recovery.

portal-14066617.title: Connected Apps Intelligence in Breeze Assistant
portal-14066617.description: Breeze Assistant now includes built-in tools to help you understand, monitor, and manage your integrations and data flows inside HubSpot. Breeze Assistant is available 24/7, ready to answer your most pressing questions about your connected apps.

portal-14069430.title: Starting April 14, every adaptive enrollment in Prospecting Agent will automatically complete after 30 days.
portal-14069430.description: Why it matters: Outreach signals lose value over time

portal-14022328.title: Sales Workspace Update: Smart CRM Integration Starting April 27

portal-14073485.title: You can now exclude imported URLs from Customer Agent knowledge re-syncs
portal-14073485.description: You can now exclude specific imported sub-URLs from being re-crawled and refreshed during periodic sync cycles. Excluded URLs are moved to a dedicated "Excluded" tab and are no longer used as knowledge sources in Customer Agent conversations.

portal-14049430.title: Data Agent: Activities and Transcripts Data Source
portal-14049430.description: Data Agent now analyzes emails, notes, and call transcripts to answer questions about your customer engagements.

portal-14073350.title: New Formula Options in CRB: Conditional Logic and Summary measure
portal-14073350.description: In the CRB when you create formulas, in addition to the existing way of writing formulas which results in a syntax, you also have 2 other more basic ways to create a formula now: Conditional Logic --> This is great for If/Else cases providing a guided interface to creating formulas. Summary Measure --> Can create an aggregation on a measure simply through the guided interface.

portal-14073211.title: Edit Non-Balance-Changing Properties on One-Time Invoices After Payment
portal-14073211.description: You can now edit invoice details on partially paid or paid one-time invoices, as long as the change doesn't affect the amount due. This makes it easy to fix common fields like PO numbers, notes, and recipient emails without re-creating invoices.

portal-14073275.title: Meetings in Workflows
portal-14073275.description: Meetings properties and automations are now available in workflows to help save time and automate tedious work!

portal-14069264.title: Hide Suggested Associations in the Sales Extension
portal-14069264.description: A toggle in your Outlook and Gmail extensions that lets you hide suggested associations and show only the records you've actively selected when logging emails.

portal-14071205.title: Create One-Time Invoices from Quotes or Deals with Workflows
portal-14071205.description: See how HubSpot can help you achieve your growth goals.

portal-14069459.title: Individual User Permissions for Views
portal-14069459.description: You can now grant specific individual users access to your custom views, without needing to share with their entire team or company.

portal-14069449.title: Create your own Ticket automation messages
portal-14069449.description: You can now create additional ticket automation messages for use in ticket-based workflows beyond the Ticket Received and Ticket Closed messages provided by HubSpot. These messages can be sent to any recipient - non-marketing contacts, contacts not subscribed to any marketing list.

portal-14059087.title: Export Marketing Emails to PDF and HTML
portal-14059087.description: You can now export marketing emails as PDF or HTML files from the email editor or performance page, so you can easily share, review, and archive email designs.

portal-14073282.title: A new, clearer navigation for customer agent
portal-14073282.description: Customer agent now has a redesigned navigation that organizes your setup experience around five lifecycle stages: Overview, Define, Train, Deploy, and Analyze.

portal-14062129.title: Mark Mobile Notifications as Unread
portal-14062129.description: HubSpot mobile users can now mark notifications back as unread after they have been opened. Building on our previous notification updates, this feature makes it easy to save important updates and gives users more flexibility to manage their notification inbox on the go.

portal-14073263.title: Teams Import for Scalable Org Management
portal-14073263.description: Teams Import introduces bulk CSV creation of HubSpot teams, including nested team hierarchies. This solves a major gap in team management at scale: currently, customers must create teams manually, one-by-one, which can take days or even weeks. The new Import experience lets admins generate complete team structures in minutes.

portal-14069662.title: Centralized Sharing Management for Reports and Dashboards
portal-14069662.description: A centralized view where you can manage all recurring report and dashboard shares across your account, including filtering and taking bulk actions.

portal-14066621.title: Memberships Access Groups CRM Card
portal-14066621.description: A new CRM card that displays all Access Groups a contact is a member of directly on the Contact record page and preview sidebar. Eliminates need to navigate to the Memberships UI. Provides at-a-glance visibility into membership status . Includes quick actions for password reset and registration email resend.

portal-14069647.title: You can now select the languages the Customer Agent interacts in
portal-14069647.description: You can now control which languages your Customer Agent uses when interacting with your customers.

portal-14066880.title: Apple Pay Now Available on Commerce Hub Custom Domains
portal-14066880.description: If you use HubSpot payments, your customers can now pay with Apple Pay on checkouts from your custom domain.

portal-14066357.title: What's New in the NetSuite App for HubSpot
portal-14066357.description: Introducing four new updates to the NetSuite app for HubSpot that make the integration more reliable, easier to manage, and faster to implement. A new "NetSuite Subsidiary" property now appears on company, contact, deal, invoice, order, product, and ticket records. This makes it easier to spot and fix subsidiary mismatches..

portal-14071214.title: Permission Sets & Seats Are Now Decoupled
portal-14071214.description: We’ve decoupled permission sets from seats. You can now assign any user to any permission set, regardless of the seat type.. HubSpot automatically grants the maximum access allowed based on a user’s permission set(s) and their seat.. You’ll see clear indicators showing whether a user has no, partial, or full access in a permission set..

portal-14049465.title: Multi-Object Syncs to the CRM from Data Studio
portal-14049465.description: See how HubSpot can help you achieve your growth goals.

portal-14066964.title: Include AI summaries in Report and Dashboard Exports
portal-14066964.description: You can now include AI summaries when you export your dashboard.

portal-14066874.title: Studio: Restore Deleted Campaigns
portal-14066874.description: You can now restore deleted campaigns from the last three months directly from the campaigns table.

portal-14069315.title: PDF Page Break Setting on Quotes
portal-14069315.description: Users can now control how sections within a quote are displayed on PDFs using the page break setting within the Theme editor.

portal-14066780.title: Campaigns: Restore Recently Deleted Campaigns
portal-14066780.description: You can now restore deleted campaigns from the last three months directly from the campaigns table.

portal-14069406.title: Customize Confirmation Email in Meeting Scheduling Pages
portal-14069406.description: Customize the meeting booked confirmation email that is sent to contacts when they book a meeting through your scheduling page.

portal-14058212.title: Prompt Sharing in Breeze Assistant
portal-14058212.description: Users can now share prompts with their entire portal, making it easy for teams to collaborate on and reuse effective prompts across Breeze Assistant.

legacy-developer-accounts-migrating-to-t.title: Legacy Developer Accounts Migrating to the Unified Developer Platform
legacy-developer-accounts-migrating-to-t.description: Hubspot unveils a migration of legacy developer accounts to a unified Developer Platform, consolidating tools, apps and integrations into one Hubspot account. The upgrade brings newer features, requires post-upgrade access review, and offers an opt-in path or automatic conversion during a phased rollout from March 9 to 31, 2026.
legacy-developer-accounts-migrating-to-t.author: dedson@hubspot.com (Dennis Edson)

portal-14066876.title: Clearer Error Messages for Communication Subscription Workflow Actions
portal-14066876.description: Error and success log messages for communication subscription actions in workflows are now more specific and actionable, making it easier to understand exactly what happened after an action runs. This applies to email, WhatsApp, and SMS messaging channels.

portal-14066865.title: Resubscribe Contacts to Subscription Types via Workflows
portal-14066865.description: You can now use a workflow to resubscribe contacts who were unsubscribed through admin actions, such as bulk unsubscribes or workflow-triggered removals.

portal-14069445.title: Rate your Customer Agent Reply in Tester
portal-14069445.description: Rate Reply lets admins give a thumbs up or thumbs down on individual agent responses directly within the tester. After rating, admins can optionally leave a comment explaining what they liked or didn't like about the response.

portal-14066884.title: Send preferences link email to contacts
portal-14066884.description: From a contact record, you can send an email directly to the contact containing a link to their Manage Preferences page. This eliminates the need for customers to dig through past marketing emails or use a form flow to access their preferences.

portal-14069423.title: Unified Website Page Creation
portal-14069423.description: We combined AI and manual webpage creation into one streamlined flow.

portal-14026221.title: Multi-Account Reporting
portal-14026221.description: Multi-account reporting allows you to create custom reports that aggregate data across different HubSpot accounts from within one HubSpot account.

portal-14066875.title: Customer Agent can now see images attached by your customers
portal-14066875.description: Customer Agent can now understand and act on images that your customers share in the conversation.

portal-14067005.title: Prevent non-Service users from sending from Help Desk email addresses
portal-14067005.description: Admins can now control who has access to Help Desk email addresses when sending one-to-one emails from a record page. Previously, any user could select a team email connected to Help Desk as their From address. Now, only users with the Service Access permission can do so.

portal-14055874.title: New Actions and Limits added to Forms Simple Workflows
portal-14055874.description: We’ve expanded Forms Simple Workflows so you can now add up to 3 actions instead of just 1 if you don't have Marketing Hub (Marketing Hub limit will remain at 10 actions). This means you can build more complete automations when someone submits a form without needing to upgrade or switch to a more complex workflow tool!

portal-14067009.title: Send WhatsApp message templates anytime
portal-14067009.description: Agents can now send WhatsApp message templates at any time during an active conversation, not just after the 24-hour session window has expired.

portal-14052885.title: Auto-generate quote content sections
portal-14052885.description: Quote creation now generates a more comprehensive draft using deal activity context, including meeting transcripts and emails. When template sections are configured and sufficient deal context exists, the system will automatically draft cover letters and executive summaries. Breeze will open by default during quote creation.

portal-14034332.title: Automated Sales Tax Calculation for Quotes
portal-14034332.description: You can now automatically calculate sales tax on quotes in real-time based on your line item's tax category and your buyer's address. This means sales tax is calculated instantly, so you can include accurate sales tax estimates on quotes for your buyers. Plus, you can enable automated sales tax without enrolling in HubSpot payments or Stripe payments.

portal-14058988.title: Granular Citations & Deep-Linking
portal-14058988.description: Description: Knowledge Vault citations now communicate the specific page, section, or element within uploaded documents where referenced content appears.

portal-14066603.title: Streamlined Association Label Flow for More Object Types
portal-14066603.description: A simplified flow for associating records and applying labels, now extended to appointments, courses, listings, and services.

portal-14066970.title: Find Reports You're Not Using
portal-14066970.description: A view in your reports list that shows reports that haven't been viewed in 6 months or more.

portal-14066593.title: Enhanced Frozen Columns
portal-14066593.description: We’ve upgraded our table experience on the CRM Index page to give you total control over how you view your data. You can now freeze as many columns as you need to keep your most important information in sight. We’ve also made it much more intuitive—simply drag and drop any column into the frozen area to lock it in place instantly.

portal-13974222.title: Send from Outlook aliases
portal-13974222.description: You can now use the aliases of your connected Microsoft Outlook account to send emails from the CRM.

portal-14049688.title: AEO: Track and improve your brand visibility in AI-powered search
portal-14049688.description: HubSpot's new AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) tool lets you measure, track, and improve your brand’s visibility in answer engines like ChatGPT, all in one place.

portal-14058404.title: TikTok Ads Integration
portal-14058404.description: Connect your TikTok Ads account to see all your ad data, attribution, and audiences in one place.

portal-14055971.title: Unifying Reply Recommendations & Customer Agent
portal-14055971.description: We're unifying Reply Recommendations and Customer Agent into a single, cohesive experience. This update includes: Reply Recommendations setup now lives within the Customer Agent app. A streamlined rep experience in help desk with an improved reply flow. Higher quality recommendations—more personal, thorough, and accurate.

portal-14066384.title: Suggested Properties for Mapping in Data Studio Syncs & Import
portal-14066384.description: Within both sync to CRM in data studio and import, we'll now surface "suggested properties" for you if we're unable to auto-map a column in your dataset or import file to the correct property within the CRM.

portal-14066290.title: Brands Support in Invoices, Payment Links, Subscriptions, and Credit Memos
portal-14066290.description: If you have the Brands Add-On, you can assign different brands to invoices, payment links, subscriptions, credit memos, and checkout pages in Commerce Hub, so each transaction reflects the correct logo and brand colors.

portal-14066870.title: Updated Customer Portal Powered by CMS
portal-14066870.description: We’re upgrading the Customer Portal to run on the CMS App, giving you a faster and more seamless experience. This change was driven by a few factors, including strong customer demand for more flexibility and branding control of their portal experience. This update will eventually unlock access to HubSpot’s CMS capabilities, all within a unified environment.

portal-14062094.title: Sunset of Test Mode for Payment Links
portal-14062094.description: We're removing "Test Mode" for Payment Links due to changes in our payment processing integration. Effective March 3, 2026, the option to "Open link in test mode" will no longer be available.

portal-14066245.title: Rotate Record to Owner action in Conversation-based Workflows
portal-14066245.description: We’re extending the existing Rotate Owner action to work in conversation-based workflows. The Rotate record to owner action automatically moves a conversation to another inbox and assigns it to the right person or team based on who has access to that inbox.

portal-14066604.title: Configure Ticket to Primary Company Auto-association
portal-14066604.description: You can now configure whether HubSpot should automatically associate a ticket with it's associated contact's primary company. When a ticket is associated with a contact, HubSpot can now be configured to: Automatically associate the ticket with that contact’s primary company (default behavior). Not automatically associate it (you’d manage company associations manually).

portal-14066839.title: Exclude weekends from "Time between" calculated properties
portal-14066839.description: You can now exclude weekends when using Time between calculated properties. This option allows you to calculate the time between two dates while skipping weekends, defined as 12:00am Saturday through 11:59pm Sunday, based on your account’s time zone. This update is available when creating or editing a Time between calculation property.

portal-14062159.title: Unpublish a form
portal-14062159.description: You can now unpublish your HubSpot forms.

portal-14066398.title: Contact email logging rules: New option to "Create new contacts from logged emails"
portal-14066398.description: A new Contact email logging rules setting option that automatically creates new CRM contacts from incoming emails to connected personal accounts.

portal-14059098.title: Salesforce App: Association Sync With Labels
portal-14059098.description: You can now use association labels to choose object associations to sync between HubSpot and Salesforce for Custom Objects, Tickets, Activities and Company objects. Additionally, object associations settings have moved to a new tab underneath the relevant object.

portal-14052277.title: Revert to Prior Revision in Workflows
portal-14052277.description: You can now revert your workflows to a previous version using revision history! If a change doesn’t work as expected, you can quickly restore an earlier revision and continue building from there.

portal-14066406.title: Improved Company and Contact Record Defaults for Pro+ Customers
portal-14066406.description: Starting on March 23rd, Contact and Company records will have redesigned default views with a new layout that includes the following: New default tabs:Catch-up with new Smart CRM cards, powered by Breeze, providing intelligent summaries and insights.

portal-14060046.title: Email workflows
portal-14060046.description: You can now create workflows based around the 1:1 email object.

portal-14055673.title: Track your scheduled sequence sends and inbox limits
portal-14055673.description: A chart that shows how many emails you've sent today and how many are scheduled through sequences.

portal-14066578.title: Add Line Items to Deals via Workflow Actions
portal-14066578.description: See how HubSpot can help you achieve your growth goals.

portal-14062083.title: Prospecting Agent Gets Smarter: Buying Signals and Contact Sourcing
portal-14062083.description: Prospecting Agent has evolved to become an end-to-end outbound agent, enabling reps to automatically identify in-market companies based on real-world triggers and instantly source the right contacts via 3P integrations.

portal-14066300.title: Custom events are now available to Pro customers
portal-14066300.description: Custom events are now available to all Pro customers. Previously an Enterprise-only feature, Custom events let you track any behavioral data that matters to your business such as product usage, purchasing behavior, offline interactions, third-party platform activity, and changes to properties inside HubSpot.

portal-14066487.title: Email property
portal-14066487.description: You can now create a dedicated Email property type with built-in email validation—including checks for a valid email format (such as required @ and domain structure)—and additional validation options like restricting values to specific domains. These validation options are available for custom email properties, giving you more control over how email data is captured and stored.

portal-14066304.title: Additional support for app objects
portal-14066304.description: App objects now appear in the data model builder and support basic pipeline rules.

code-sharing-for-ui-extensions.title: Code Sharing for UI Extensions
code-sharing-for-ui-extensions.description: You can now share code between UI extensions. Previously, if your App Cards, App Homes, and Settings pages required the same code types, utilities, and components, you had to copy the code for each instance. This meant that whenever you made updates, you had to revise every copy of that code separately. In the unified developer platform, your app cards, app homes, and setting pages are all part of the same app. With npm workspace support, your UI extensions can share the same codebase. Define yo

associate-payments-with-tickets.title: Associate Payments with Tickets
associate-payments-with-tickets.description: Payments can now be directly associated with tickets. In the UI, you can add a CRM card for Payments to the Tickets record page. Then, you can use this CRM card to directly connect the ticket you’re on to a Payment. If you’re using the Tickets API endpoint for associations, you can use the HubSpot-defined associationTypeId of 1355. To associate a payment with a ticket, use the associationTypeId of 1354.

oauth-install-event-logs.title: OAuth Install Event Logs
oauth-install-event-logs.description: We’re adding OAuth install event logs to the Developer Platform, providing enhanced install visibility for all apps built on version 2025.2 or newer. What’s new or changing? This functionality is available for apps built on the Developer Platform v2025.2+. Please migrate your app if you wish to leverage install event logs. To access logs, go to Development > Monitoring > Logs in your HubSpot account. Set up observability integrations if you’d like logs exported automatically. This change helps d

tech-partner-program-tiering.title: Tech Partner Program Tiering
tech-partner-program-tiering.description: Technology Partner tiers help customers identify app developers who consistently deliver high-quality experiences in the HubSpot ecosystem. Tiers: Partner, Rising, Leading, and Premier are assigned at the developer level (not per app) and appear on Marketplace listings and filters. Tier upgrades are evaluated quarterly based on performance over the previous 12 months, with downgrades beginning semiannually in 2027. Developers can track their current tier, progress toward the next level, customer

connected-apps-new-connections-home-conn.title: Connected Apps: New Connections Home & Connection Insights
connected-apps-new-connections-home-conn.description: Connections Home is a new centralized page for managing your integrations. It provides a comprehensive view of apps connected to your account, apps requiring immediate attention, and apps installed by other users across your organization. This update also includes a new Connection Insights section that provides a detailed overview of app activities, Academy content, new API call usage, and new Record Insights that track how your apps interact with HubSpot and CRM data. To view the new Connection

custom-events-are-now-available-to-the-p.title: Custom Events Are Now Available to the Pro Platform
custom-events-are-now-available-to-the-p.description: Custom events are now available to all Pro customers. Previously an Enterprise-only feature, Custom events let you track any behavioral data that matters to your business, such as product usage, purchasing behavior, offline interactions, third-party platform activity, and changes to properties inside HubSpot. Note: Pro customers are limited to 10 million event occurrences per month. Enterprise customers are limited to 30 million event occurrences per month. Both Pro and Enterprise customers can

public-beta-conversation-workflows-owner.title: Public Beta: Conversation & Workflows Ownership Updates
public-beta-conversation-workflows-owner.description: We’re introducing additional functionality to conversation-based workflows in Service Hub Professional and Enterprise subscription tiers in HubSpot Workflows & Inbox. These betas enhance ownership flexibility by adding a new “No Owner” option to the Assign Conversation Owner action and extending the Rotate record-to-owner action to work with conversations. Together, these updates give support teams more structured, automated control over conversation routing and handoffs, while respecting inbox

portal-14058444.title: Access Canva’s Complete Design Experience with the Improved Canva App for HubSpot
portal-14058444.description: The Canva app for HubSpot now includes a full-featured editing experience in Canva. Access Canva’s AI-powered design functionality to create assets, then send them back to HubSpot for distribution and channel measurement. The expanded app unlocks improved and previously unavailable Canva features such as: Brand Kits to access essential brand elements. Commenting and collaborator invites.

portal-14062090.title: Take Action with ChatGPT: Update CRM Records & Access more Objects and Engagements
portal-14062090.description: The HubSpot connector for ChatGPT can now create and update CRM records and log activities directly from ChatGPT’s chat window, including new contact and deal creation, and logging notes or tasks. Additionally, You can also now access products, line items, invoices, orders, carts, segments (lists), and engagement history from calls, emails, meetings, tasks, and notes.

portal-14066460.title: Reorder Widgets on the Mobile Home Screen
portal-14066460.description: HubSpot mobile users can now fully customize their home screen by reordering widgets to suit their specific workflow. Instead of navigating a static layout, you can now move existing widgets up or down within your selected home experience (Sales, Marketing, or Sales & Marketing), ensuring that the tools you use most are always at the top.

portal-14055230.title: Assign Conversation Owner Update — New “No Owner” Option
portal-14055230.description: We’ve enhanced the existing Assign conversation owner workflow action with a new option: No owner. This allows teams to automatically clear ownership on a conversation as part of a workflow—making it easy to return work to a shared view or reset ownership based on custom logic.

portal-14064403.title: Credit Memos QuickBooks Online Data Sync
portal-14064403.description: Credit memo sync for QuickBooks Online is now in public beta. This feature enables bidirectional syncing of credit memos between HubSpot and QuickBooks Online, including line items, discounts, and automated sales tax. Credit memo applications to invoices also sync in both directions, so changes made in either system are reflected in the other.

take-action-with-chatgpt-update-crm-reco.title: Take Action with ChatGPT: Update CRM Records & Access more Objects and Engagements
take-action-with-chatgpt-update-crm-reco.description: HubSpot connector for ChatGPT now writes to CRM from chat, letting you create/update records and log activities plus access orders, invoices, line items, segments and engagement history right in ChatGPT. Bulk creates up to 10 and audit/security notes included for safer, faster workflows.

portal-14062064.title: Copy/Paste File Upload in Import
portal-14062064.description: You can now copy and paste data from a spreadsheet or Google Sheet directly into the import tool.

portal-14063205.title: Identify "Meta" as Paid Social Traffic
portal-14063205.description: This update improves how HubSpot categorizes your web traffic from Meta. With this change, traffic with the UTM source Meta will now be automatically categorized as Paid Social in your traffic analytics. Previously, this traffic was categorized as Other.

portal-14062171.title: Introducing the Technology Partner Program: Discover Your Tier in the New Dashboard
portal-14062171.description: We’re launching a new Technology Partner dashboard in the Developer Platform that gives you an in‑product view of your status in HubSpot’s Technology Partner Program. From one place, you can see: Your current Technology Partner tier (Partner, Rising, Leading, or Premier). A short explanation of what that tier represents. High‑level requirements to maintain or move up.

a-tiered-framework-built-on-impact.title: A tiered framework built on impact
a-tiered-framework-built-on-impact.description: We're introducing four partnership tiers: Partner, Rising, Leading, and Premier. Each has transparent requirements and benefits that grow with your business. Your tier is determined by three factors: These metrics are designed to provide partners with transparency on how to deepen their partnership with HubSpot.

benefits-that-match-your-impact.title: Benefits that match your impact
benefits-that-match-your-impact.description: As you graduate into higher tiers, you unlock: Every tier builds on the one before it. The more customer value you create and the more revenue you influence, the more HubSpot invests back into your growth.

marketplace-visibility-for-top-partners.title: Marketplace visibility for top partners
marketplace-visibility-for-top-partners.description: Rising, Leading, and Premier partner tiers are now displayed in the HubSpot Marketplace. Customers can filter by tier to find integrations that meet higher standards of quality, support, and strategic alignment with HubSpot. The HubSpot Marketplace receives 1 million customer visits per month. Now your tier helps you stand out.

a-grace-period-to-adapt.title: A grace period to adapt
a-grace-period-to-adapt.description: We're giving everyone time to adjust to the new program. For the 2026 program launch, there will be no tier-downs. The first tier-down review happens in Q1 2027. You'll have until the end of the year to understand the new metrics, invest in the right areas, and grow into the tier that reflects your ambition. The marketplace review and premier certification tier requirements will also go into effect in Q1 2027.

if-you-re-already-an-app-partner.title: If you're already an app partner
if-you-re-already-an-app-partner.description: You're automatically part of the Technology Partner Program. Here's what happens next: Important: Tier evaluations happen quarterly (on the 15th of the first month each quarter). You'll receive direct communication from HubSpot with your tier status and next steps.

if-you-re-a-hubspot-customer.title: If you're a HubSpot customer
if-you-re-a-hubspot-customer.description: The Technology Partner Program makes it easier to: Look for tier badges when evaluating integrations. They're a signal of partnership depth and ongoing investment.

if-you-re-building-a-new-app.title: If you're building a new app
if-you-re-building-a-new-app.description: The Technology Partner Program gives you a clear on-ramp and growth path from day one. You'll know exactly what to focus on at each stage to unlock upleveled benefits as you grow. Want hands-on support? Consider attending our next Developer Platform Playground webinar on March 19.

catalyst-a-new-fast-track-for-high-poten.title: Catalyst: a new fast track for high-potential partners
catalyst-a-new-fast-track-for-high-poten.description: We're also introducing Catalyst, a 6-month accelerator for a select group of high-potential technology partners. Catalyst supports two types of partners: Catalyst partners receive a named partner manager, technical consulting with solutions architects, and focused support to demonstrate customer impact and move up tiers faster. Eligible partners will be invited directly; no application required. Learn more about Catalyst → Technology Partner Program overview – See the full guide on tier requirem

portal-14061709.title: Basic Pipeline Rules for Additional Objects
portal-14061709.description: Pipeline rules for appointment, course, listing, and service objects allow admins to enforce specific workflows.

portal-14058892.title: Dynamic Prompt Suggestions in Breeze Assistant
portal-14058892.description: When users open Breeze Assistant, they now can see AI-generated prompt suggestions organized into actionable categories (How do I, Summarize, Create). These suggestions are dynamically personalized based on the user's role, permissions, available portal capabilities, recent conversation history, and current page context—replacing the previous, unpersonalised suggestions.

portal-14062170.title: Edit ticket automation messages with the redesigned email editor
portal-14062170.description: Now you can use the full power of HubSpot's redesigned Marketing Email Editor to edit and modify the design of your Ticket Received and Ticket Closed messages - even if you do not have a paid subscription to Marketing Hub. Now you can easily add colors, images, and logos to your email to create branded, professional-looking communications.

portal-14061750.title: Object Configuration Events Available in Audit log
portal-14061750.description: The Audit Log now displays two new event types: object activation/deactivation and object renaming. You can see who made these changes, what changed, and when.

portal-14052303.title: Apply Pipeline & Pipeline Stage Colors
portal-14052303.description: You can now assign colors to pipelines and pipeline stages across deals, tickets, and custom objects.

portal-14062098.title: Show or Hide Pricing Tiers on Quotes
portal-14062098.description: Tiered pricing allows product prices to adjust based on the selected tier. When using tiered pricing, you can now control whether the pricing tiers are visible to buyers on quotes.

portal-14059039.title: Inline Association Table
portal-14059039.description: The inline association table lets you see and act on associated record data directly from any CRM index page.

portal-14058972.title: A new Notion integration
portal-14058972.description: See how HubSpot can help you achieve your growth goals.

portal-14059011.title: Redesigned Marketing Event Record Page
portal-14059011.description: The marketing events object now uses the standard CRM record page layout, including notes, timeline, and CRM cards.

portal-14061669.title: Organize Campaigns with Folders
portal-14061669.description: You can now organize your campaigns into folders and subfolders directly in the campaigns tool.

portal-14061941.title: Template Level Styling for Quotes
portal-14061941.description: You can now customize fonts, colors, and styling for each quote template in the quote template editor.

portal-14059015.title: Workflow action to Register a Contact to a Marketing Event
portal-14059015.description: You can now automatically register contacts to manually created Marketing Events in HubSpot using a new workflow action.

portal-14034356.title: Throttle Marketing Email
portal-14034356.description: Customers can set a custom email send rate for campaigns to control how quickly messages are delivered.

portal-14060809.title: See number of emailable contacts in Segments
portal-14060809.description: View how many contacts in a segment are eligible to receive emails, and why certain contacts are not eligible to receive an email.

portal-14062172.title: View the full context of related records and clean up associations in bulk
portal-14062172.description: You can now view the full relationship context around one or more records and remove outdated or incorrect associations in bulk, all in just a few clicks. From the index page, see all associated records in a single, structured view and quickly clean up your data to keep your CRM accurate, reliable, and up to date.

portal-14061979.title: Timezone Offsets Supported in Import for Date/Time Properties
portal-14061979.description: You can now include timezone offsets when importing date/time properties. Previously, you needed to make sure all of your timestamps were converted to your portal's local timezone before importing.

portal-14058599.title: Filter Insights
portal-14058599.description: Granular Filter Insights show you how each filter affects your segment size in real-time as you build it. As you create or refine a segment, you'll see: How many records match at each step. Which filters expand or narrow your audience. Filters with no effect (flagged at 0 matches).

portal-14059100.title: Meeting Notetaker
portal-14059100.description: Admins can turn on HubSpot Meeting Notetaker so sales conversations are automatically recorded, transcribed, and stored in HubSpot. This frees your team to focus fully on customers instead of note-taking. The tool seamlessly joins your Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams meetings with external contacts that are stored in your CRM.

portal-14058893.title: Test the Complete Install Flow from Your Listing Preview
portal-14058893.description: You can now test your app's complete install flow directly from the listing preview in the listing editor before submitting your app listing for review.

portal-14059006.title: HubSpot link previews (unfurls) in Slack
portal-14059006.description: When you share a HubSpot record link in Slack, you'll get context-rich, structured previews (unfurls) with no extra clicks required. What used to be just a static URL is now a snapshot of your CRM data conveniently visible within your Slack conversations.

portal-14058546.title: Associate Contacts, Deals, and Tickets with Campaigns
portal-14058546.description: You can now associate contacts, deals, or tickets with campaigns directly from multiple locations in HubSpot: the campaigns tool, object record pages, object index pages, and workflows. Contact and deal associations contribute to attributed revenue.

portal-14058569.title: HubSpot Developer MCP Server (Local)
portal-14058569.description: The HubSpot Developer MCP (Model Context Protocol) Server is now generally available, giving developers a production-ready, fully supported path to build HubSpot integrations and CMS experiences using natural language workflows.

portal-14059768.title: AEO Strategy Tool Upgraded — Legacy Version Retiring
portal-14059768.description: A new version of the AEO tool is available, and your portal has been automatically enrolled. You'll lose access to the topics-based experience, but any AI settings you configured (including ICPs and Products & Services) will remain in place.

portal-14058547.title: GCC High for Microsoft Outlook sales email integrations
portal-14058547.description: US Department of Defense contractors can now integrate their Outlook GCC High email accounts to HubSpot. This includes personal email connections and the Office 365 add-in.

portal-14059060.title: Segment Membership in Events for Health Scoring
portal-14059060.description: You can now use segment membership as scoring criteria in events for Health Scoring.

portal-14060061.title: Improved Users Table & Page
portal-14060061.description: The Users page has been redesigned with modern data table functionality to streamline admin workflows and reduce friction in user management. Admins can now leverage bulk operations to update user properties directly fro

portal-14055235.title: Custom Reports Included in Email Shares with Attachments
portal-14055235.description: Custom reports can now be attached when you share dashboards or reports via email. This fixes an issue that previously caused custom reports to be omitted from email attachments.

portal-14032129.title: Breeze Assistant to Add and Edit Workflow Actions
portal-14032129.description: You can now use Breeze Assistant to add and edit workflow actions while building a workflow.

portal-14059082.title: Buying Groups
portal-14059082.description: Introducing Buying Groups for Sales Hub and Service Hub Professional 🎉We’re excited to announce the launch of Buying Groups, HubSpot’s new native version of OrgChartHub, which joined the HubSpot family in June — now available in Sales Hub and Service Hub Professional.

portal-14058895.title: Segment Membership in Events for Lead Scoring
portal-14058895.description: You can now use segment membership as scoring criteria in events for Lead Scoring.

portal-14060134.title: Light Color Theme, Improved
portal-14060134.description: We've made meaningful refinements to HubSpot's visual design based on feedback from customers who tried the initial release. If you haven't seen the theme yet, this is a great time to check it out - and if you have, you may notice some changes since the last version. Your workflows, data, and teams are unaffected. Everything works exactly as it did before.

portal-14050155.title: Set Favorite Tab on Mobile Records
portal-14050155.description: Mobile app users can now set a preferred default tab (About, Activity, or Overview) for each CRM record type, so their chosen tab displays first when opening records.

hubspot-developer-mcp-server-local-for-a.title: HubSpot Developer MCP server (local) for App and CMS Development Now in GA
hubspot-developer-mcp-server-local-for-a.description: HubSpot unveils GA of the Developer MCP Server, linking local agentic tools to HubSpot for code, CMS assets, and serverless tasks. Developers can build and iterate apps, manage CMS assets, run serverless functions, and debug with natural language prompts.

ai-powered-prospect-research.title: AI-Powered Prospect Research
ai-powered-prospect-research.description: AI-powered prospect research in HubSpot Breeze helps sales reps automatically research and qualify leads, surfacing key company and contact insights before outreach.

agent-customization-flexibility.title: Agent Customization & Flexibility
agent-customization-flexibility.description: Customize Breeze AI agents with tailored personas, tones, and behaviors to better match your brand and sales process when interacting with prospects and customers.

selling-profiles.title: Selling Profiles
selling-profiles.description: Selling profiles let reps capture and store key prospect preferences, communication styles, and relationship context to personalize future outreach and deal management.

email-capabilities.title: Email Capabilities
email-capabilities.description: New AI-powered email capabilities in Marketing Hub help create, personalize, and optimize email campaigns using Breeze AI — including subject line suggestions and content generation.

personalized-email-drafting-follow-up.title: Personalized Email Drafting & Follow-Up
personalized-email-drafting-follow-up.description: Breeze AI drafts personalized follow-up emails based on CRM data and previous interactions, reducing manual effort and improving response rates in sales sequences.

seamless-integration.title: Seamless Integration
seamless-integration.description: Seamless platform integration improvements connect HubSpot tools across hubs with fewer friction points — enabling smoother data flows between marketing, sales, and service.

workflow-crm-enrollment.title: Workflow & CRM Enrollment
workflow-crm-enrollment.description: Expanded workflow enrollment options allow CRM records to be enrolled in automations based on more trigger types, improving operational flexibility for RevOps teams.

portal-14058635.title: Location-Based Login Restrictions
portal-14058635.description: "Location-Based Login Restrictions" allows admins to restrict their users' logins based on geographical location.

portal-14052870.title: Admin Toggle for Sales Workspace Versions
portal-14052870.description: Super admins can now control which sales workspace version their users access through a new toggle in settings.

portal-14058641.title: Add reCAPTCHA v3 to Forms
portal-14058641.description: Reduce spam form submissions while keeping a frictionless visitor experience. The Forms tool now support Google reCAPTCHA v3, giving you invisible bot protection and more control over how strictly spam is filtered. You can now: Add reCAPTCHA v3 to your forms to detect and filter bot submissions without showing a visible challenge to visitors..

portal-14058228.title: [Status Change] Conditionally Required Associations
portal-14058228.description: : We've made the decision to discontinue development of Conditionally Required Associations, a Smart CRM feature we previously shared was in development

portal-14050160.title: Visual Search in Video Library
portal-14050160.description: HubSpot now supports visual search in the Video Library. You can search for specific visual elements (like “a person in a red hat” or “headphones on a table”) across your video content, in addition to transcript and title-based search. This makes it easier than ever to find and reuse the exact moments you need.

portal-14058551.title: Auto-Enrollment for Developer Platform Betas
portal-14058551.description: This is a one-time opt-in for developers who want access to the latest beta versions of the HubSpot Developer Platform. By opting in, you acknowledge that you're choosing to work with beta versions of the Developer Platform and will gain access to all current and future platform betas without needing to request access each time a new beta is released.

portal-14049470.title: Sales Documents Nested Folders
portal-14049470.description: Sales Documents now supports multi-level folder hierarchies, allowing you to organize, move, and manage sales collateral in nested folders.

portal-14058448.title: Send an email to create a ticket in help desk
portal-14058448.description: Users can now send an outbound email to create a ticket in help desk.

portal-14058338.title: SSO OIDC Configuration Additions
portal-14058338.description: Adds OIDC logout functionality to HubSpot's private content SSO integration, enabling customers to fully terminate user sessions across both HubSpot and their identity provider. When users log out of password-protected content with SSO enabled, they're now logged out of the IdP and redirected back to HubSpot - preventing unintended access and improving security.

portal-14058525.title: Subdomain Support in Buyer Intent
portal-14058525.description: Manage multiple websites, including ones on subdomains? And don't want buyer intent grouping all traffic under one root domain? Well, good news. You can now filter for and segment by subdomains in buyer intent—giving you a clearer picture of who's visiting and where.

portal-14031236.title: Deprioritizing AI-powered report editing
portal-14031236.description: Earlier this year, we introduced AI-powered report editing, a private beta feature that let you make quick adjustments to a few specific reports (Custom Events, CTA, Forms, and SMS) using natural language. It helped you update things like filters, groupings, date ranges, or dimensions on existing reports. It was separate from AI features that help you create new reports.

portal-13995268.title: Two Way Invoice Sync for Xero
portal-13995268.description: Two-way invoice sync for Xero is now generally available to all HubSpot customers. This feature enables syncing invoices from HubSpot → Xero and Xero → HubSpot. In addition to syncing invoices, payments applied to invoices will also be synced, whether the payments are created in HubSpot or in Xero.

portal-14058501.title: Retroactive SLAs
portal-14058501.description: Currently, any new changes made to SLAs in the Help Desk are applied to new tickets only. This new feature gives admins the option to apply SLA changes to existing tickets. Teams can retroactively align in-flight tickets with their latest SLA configurations without manual intervention.

portal-14058348.title: More personalization options for team email signatures, phase 1 of 2
portal-14058348.description: This year we are revamping the creation experience for team email signatures, including responding to your feedback about the need for more personalization options. Until now, this has been limited to Agent first name, last name, full name. Now we have added your three most popular requests: [individual] Email Address. Phone Number. Job Title. This release is just the beginning.

portal-14025485.title: Granular Filter Insights in Segments
portal-14025485.description: For the first time, you can see exactly how each filter shapes your segment as you build it. We’re introducing Granular Filter Insights to the segment-building experience, providing you with real-time visibility into how each filter influences your total audience size.

portal-14058521.title: Enhanced Gauge Chart Controls in SORB & CRB
portal-14058521.description: We’ve released three major updates to Gauge Charts within the Single Object Report Builder (SORB) and Custom Report Builder (CRB). These new settings provide greater flexibility in how you visualize progress against goals, allowing for more intuitive data storytelling without extra manual calculations.

portal-14055262.title: Export History Retention Policy
portal-14055262.description: Beginning on March 2, HubSpot will automatically delete export records that are 3 or more years old to optimize system performance.

portal-14052569.title: Marketing Studio: UTM Settings Page
portal-14052569.description: We’re releasing a new UTM Settings experience for Campaigns that makes it easier to manage how campaign UTMs are generated and maintained across your HubSpot account. If you rely on UTMs, this update gives you more control, better visibility, and safer ways to clean up or change existing UTMs.

portal-14058542.title: Connected Apps: New Connections Home & Connection Insights
portal-14058542.description: Connections Home is a new centralized page for managing your integrations. It provides a comprehensive view of apps connected to your account, apps requiring immediate attention, and apps installed by other users across your organization.

portal-14058412.title: Customizable Extended Sidebar for Customer Success Workspace
portal-14058412.description: Users see a persistent, customizable sidebar with comprehensive customer context and actions directly in the Customer Success Workspace.

portal-14058636.title: Sunsetting the Similar Workflows Report in Workflows Health Tab
portal-14058636.description: We are sunsetting the Similar Workflows report in the Workflows Health tab. On March 16, 2026, customers will no longer have access to this report.

portal-14050027.title: Improved Spam visibility & management in Forms
portal-14050027.description: We’ve made updates that improve how spam submissions are surfaced and understood across forms. These changes make existing spam information easier to find, interpret, and - most importantly - act on. Updates include: A new Spam tab on each form that surfaces organized insights like spam severity, top spam types, and upcoming automatic deletions, along with a filtered list of blocked spam submissio

portal-14058399.title: Enhanced multi-step form logic (hide & show steps)
portal-14058399.description: We’re introducing powerful, new upgrades to conditional logic in multi-step Forms, giving you more control over what visitors see as they move through your form. You’ll now find two new step-level logic actions available in the Forms Editor: Hide steps: Hide one or more steps when conditions are met.. Show steps: Reveal steps dynamically based on a visitor’s responses..

portal-14032492.title: Forms Preview now available in the new Forms Editor
portal-14032492.description: You can now preview forms in the new Forms Editor before publishing them. This brings back a familiar capability from the legacy Editor and makes it easier to validate design, logic, and multi-step flows while your form is still in draft. The Preview option appears in the editor toolbar, right next to the Review and Update button.

portal-14055339.title: Give instructions to your Customer Agent
portal-14055339.description: You can now define clear guidelines for your agent’s tone, response style, scripted responses, and guardrails.

portal-14055951.title: Ask Breeze Assistant about App Listing Performance
portal-14055951.description: HubSpot Marketplace app owners can now use Breeze Assistant within marketplace analytics to analyze the performance of their app listing. Ask natural-language questions about your listing’s analytics and receive immediate, data-backed responses.

portal-14058303.title: Transfer calls across workspaces & transfer outbound calls
portal-14058303.description: When a rep needs help resolving a conversation or determines another team member would be better suited to handle it, they can now transfer inbound and outbound calls directly to that person. To receive transferred calls, users must be assigned to a HubSpot number.

portal-14055940.title: Conditional Scoring with "and" for Health Scores
portal-14055940.description: You can now create conditional scoring rules using "and" that award points only when multiple criteria are met. Check out this quick 🎥 video demo to learn more! Two types of conditional scoring: Cross-property criteria (Fit scoring): Combine multiple property criteria to award points only when all criteria are met for a single object.Example: Subtract 10 points when a contact's Latest NPS survey

portal-14055941.title: Conditional Scoring with "and" for Lead Scores
portal-14055941.description: You can now create conditional scoring rules using "and" that award points only when multiple criteria are met. Check out this quick 🎥 video demo to learn more! Two types of conditional scoring: Cross-property criteria (Fit scoring): A contact or company only receives points when they meet all the property criteria.Example: Add 15 points only when a contact's job title is "CEO" AND role is "Decis

portal-14058226.title: SurveyMonkey App: Sync Data to HubSpot Surveys
portal-14058226.description: The SurveyMonkey app now allows you to automatically sync data as native feedback survey and survey response objects in HubSpot. This update allows you to use survey data from SurveyMonkey in tools such as Breeze, workflows, reporting, and segmentation.

portal-14052619.title: Sync Recurring Meetings to HubSpot
portal-14052619.description: Now you can sync recurring meetings to HubSpot via your connected calendar.

service-keys-enter-public-beta-for-syste.title: Service Keys enter public beta for system-to-system integrations
service-keys-enter-public-beta-for-syste.description: Service Keys are now available in public beta as a new authentication option for account-level, system-to-system integrations. This feature is intended to replace legacy private apps and is built on HubSpot’s modern Developer Platform infrastructure.
service-keys-enter-public-beta-for-syste.author: dedson@hubspot.com (Dennis Edson)

portal-14055205.title: Access Group Search & Member Status Visibility
portal-14055205.description: You can now quickly search for contacts across access groups and see their registration status at a glance. Find contacts by name or email, view which access groups they belong to, and understand their membership status without clicking into each group individually.

portal-14055952.title: Breeze Assistant Prompts Reimagined
portal-14055952.description: A reimagined prompt experience for Breeze Assistant with @Mentions for CRM object search, a saved prompts library with reusable templates and placeholders, and categorized prompt suggestions (Summarize, Create, How do I, Prepare). Users can organize saved prompts with tags (Customer Success, Marketing, Sales, Support) and assign them to specific assistants.

portal-14055886.title: Improved Object Settings Navigation
portal-14055886.description: A dropdown menu in object settings that allows quick navigation between different object types.

portal-14055266.title: Real-Time Table Updates on Index Pages
portal-14055266.description: Index page tables now update automatically in real time as you create or modify records.

portal-14055713.title: Account Service Keys
portal-14055713.description: Service Keys provide a simplified authentication solution for customers who need API access without the complexity of full app development. This feature replaces "legacy private apps" by rebuilding them on the modern Developer Platform infrastructure.

portal-14055596.title: App Autotranslate now enabled by default with flexible language selection
portal-14055596.description: We've migrated autotranslate to our unified marketplace platform, fixing recent bugs, and improving the submission experience + end customer translations. If you already have translated listings (manually or automatically created), you won't see any changes - this update enhances reliability and streamlines new submissions.

portal-14055890.title: Capture Buyer Details from Quotes
portal-14055890.description: You can add the following information to a quote and allow buyers to edit the information before accepting the quote: Purchase Order #. Buyer Tax ID #. Buyer Company Name and Address. Billing Contact. Billing Address. Billing Company. Once the buyer accepts the quote, these fields cannot be edited by the buyer.

portal-14046386.title: Support Multiple Main Teams for Full Functionality
portal-14046386.description: Users can now be fully functional members of multiple teams in HubSpot, with equal access to routing and workflows across all assigned teams.

automatic-migration-from-cookie-consent-.title: Automatic migration from Cookie Consent Banner v1 to v2
automatic-migration-from-cookie-consent-.description: Starting May 11, 2026, HubSpot will resume the automatic migration of accounts from the legacy Cookie Consent Banner (v1) to the current version (v2). This process was previously announced and later paused to allow more time for manual adoption. This update ensures all accounts use a banner that meets modern accessibility standards and supports the latest privacy features. While the migration happens automatically on this date, you can manually opt-in ahead of time to test the new version within
automatic-migration-from-cookie-consent-.author: jmclaren@hubspot.com (Jon McLaren)

portal-14055885.title: Video capture: Record videos directly in HubSpot
portal-14055885.description: You can now record videos without leaving HubSpot—no third-party apps, uploads, or device switching required.

portal-14057202.title: Search and Filter Chatflows
portal-14057202.description: You can now filter and search your chatflows table to find specific chatflows without scrolling through pages.

portal-14049350.title: Chrome extension now supports Calling
portal-14049350.description: HubSpot calling users can now manage their calling connection through the HubSpot Chrome extension. This removes the need to keep a seperate browser window open.

portal-14056133.title: Reliability improvement for open and closed ticket views
portal-14056133.description: We’re rolling out a reliability improvement to how open and closed tickets appear in views. With this update, open and closed views will reflect a ticket’s current pipeline stage, ensuring tickets appear in the correct view based on the state of work. This applies to default views, including: All Open. All Closed. My Team’s Open. Space Open and Closed.

portal-14046306.title: Sales Documents Multi-Brand Support
portal-14046306.description: Extend multi-brand support to Sales Documents so that each document can be assigned a specific brand and the correct brand logo and colors are displayed in the Document Viewer, ensuring buyers always see the intended brand identity.

portal-14055790.title: Display Support for 0% Tax Rates
portal-14055790.description: You can now display $0 tax amounts when tax is assessed at 0%, across quotes, checkout, invoices, and payment links. This applies to both Automated Sales Tax (AST) users and those configuring their own tax rates through the Tax Rate Library.

portal-14052664.title: Projects UI renamed to Checklists
portal-14052664.description: The Projects UI is being renamed to Checklists to reduce confusion with the new Projects object for project management.

portal-14056053.title: Tasks app rebuilt on CRM framework
portal-14056053.description: The Tasks app has been rebuilt on HubSpot's CRM framework, giving you the same views, filtering, and organizational tools you use with contacts, deals, and other CRM objects.

portal-14055369.title: Customize Display of Line Item Properties in CPQ Quotes
portal-14055369.description: You can customize how line item properties (standard & custom) are displayed—as columns or inline rows—in the line items table for Commerce Hub quotes and templates.

portal-14032531.title: Report on Deal Split Goals
portal-14032531.description: You can now create single-object reports based on deal splits and add goal lines to track performance against revenue targets.

portal-14055850.title: Make Campaigns Automatable in Workflows
portal-14055850.description: You now have access to campaign properties and events in workflows. With this update, you can automate based on campaign-level data (like budget, spend, revenue, or owner) and react when contacts are influenced by specific campaigns.

portal-14046446.title: Configure unsubscribe links in email
portal-14046446.description: Configurable unsubscribe links let marketers control how an unsubscribe action is applied in emails. Instead of always removing a contact from all email communications, you can configure the link so that it only unsubscribes them from the specific subscription type tied to that email.

portal-14055851.title: Personalization App Supports Website Pages
portal-14055851.description: The new Personalization app now supports website pages, bringing everything you need to create, manage, and measure personalized web experiences into one central place. Using Variants, you can quickly build audience specific versions of website pages without duplicating pages or manually adjusting individual modules.

portal-14055712.title: Add comments to Workflow Triggers
portal-14055712.description: You can now add comments directly to workflow triggers, not just workflow actions. This lets teams explain why a workflow starts, share context about trigger logic, and collaborate right where the automation begins. Comments on triggers work just like action comments, making it easier to document and discuss workflow setup in one place.

portal-14055242.title: Two New Calculated Properties Available: "Time in Current Stage" and "Date Entered Current Stage"
portal-14055242.description: Two new stage calculated properties for contacts, companies, leads, tickets, and services: Time in Current Stage and Date Entered Current Stage.

portal-14055553.title: Assign Customer Agent to Email during channel connecton
portal-14055553.description: In the Help Desk and Conversations Inbox team email setup flow, Customer Agent appears as the initial option for automatically assigning a ticket or conversation.

portal-14055603.title: Updated Company Object Sync Between HubSpot and Salesforce
portal-14055603.description: Sync company objects between HubSpot and Salesforce with greater accuracy. This new update includes de-duplication features and new support for merging Company objects.

portal-14023812.title: Create Property Validations Using Breeze
portal-14023812.description: Breeze can now create custom properties with validation rules using natural language prompts.

portal-14055589.title: Rotate Record to Owner action in Conversation-based Workflows
portal-14055589.description: We’re extending the existing Rotate Owner action to work in conversation-based workflows. The Rotate record to owner action automatically moves a conversation to another inbox and assigns it to the right person or team b

portal-14055554.title: Never Log Option for Meetings
portal-14055554.description: The Never Log setting in HubSpot now applies to meeting activities. Your never log list will now exclude both email and meeting activities from appearing in HubSpot for specified email addresses and domains.

portal-14049261.title: Customer Agent - 28 day free access
portal-14049261.description: A 28-day free access to customer agent that starts when you deploy the agent, allowing you to test it in real-world scenarios without using paid credits.

portal-14055573.title: Participant State Management for Marketing Events
portal-14055573.description: Update contact registration and participation status for marketing events directly from the contact record in HubSpot.

portal-14052745.title: Merge History CSV Export
portal-14052745.description: Merge History CSV Export allows customers to download a complete audit trail of duplicate records merged through the Manage Duplicates tool. From within the tool, customers can select "Export History" and choose a date range (last 7 days, 30 days, or up to 90 days). The export includes all merged records along with their original property values before the merge occurred.

portal-14055717.title: Video editor UX improvements
portal-14055717.description: We’ve made a set of usability improvements to the video editor to make editing faster, clearer, and more forgiving. These updates streamline how you work with transcripts, timelines, captions, and on-screen overlays so you can spend less time fighting the interface and more time refining your content.

portal-14052732.title: Assigned Teams Are Now Editable in Help Desk
portal-14052732.description: You can now edit a ticket’s Assigned Teams directly in the Help Desk workspace. This gives you more control over which teams are responsible for a ticket and where that ticket appears across team views and Spaces. Assigned Teams can now be changed: From the About this ticket panel. Inline from Help Desk table views.

portal-14052371.title: Edit Seller Company & Contact in Quote Templates
portal-14052371.description: Users can now change who the seller contact and company are in Quote Templates, allowing users to have more flexibility and control of the information presented on their quotes and standardize quote information at the template level to reduce redundant editing within quotes. Additionally, users can now display a seller contact's phone number.

portal-14055615.title: Social Metrics in the Custom Report Builder
portal-14055615.description: Unlock your social media data directly within the Custom Report Builder. You can now build customized reports using a wide array of social media metrics to gain deeper insights into your performance across networks.

portal-14049629.title: Publish Facebook Stories
portal-14049629.description: You can now publish Facebook Stories from the Social post composer!

portal-14050067.title: Automated Tax-Only Onboarding
portal-14050067.description: You can now use Stripe's automated sales tax capabilities without enrolling in HubSpot payments, ensuring accurate tax calculations based on your buyer's address on legacy quotes, subscriptions, and invoices.

portal-14055362.title: Upgraded Social Analytics
portal-14055362.description: Our enhanced Social Analyze Tab offers a brand-new set of insightful, ready-to-use reports, making it easier than ever to understand your social media performance. You can now quickly see key metrics in four fundamental categories to prove and improve your social media ROI.

portal-14055229.title: You can now add a resolution note to a Workflow issue!
portal-14055229.description: You can now add a resolution note when reviewing workflow issues. This allows teams to document context about why an issue was marked as fixed, ignored, or deferred directly alongside the issue itself, making it easier to understand past decisions and collaborate on workflow maintenance.

portal-14055629.title: Take Action with Claude: Update CRM Records and Access Engagement History
portal-14055629.description: The HubSpot connector for Claude can now create and update CRM records and log activities (engagements) directly from Claude’s chat window – including new contact and deal creation, and logging notes or tasks. Claude can also generate on powerful insights based on your complete engagement history (emails, calls, meetings, tasks, and notes).
