portal-14052854.title: Assign CRM Views to Any Team
portal-14052854.description: Super Admins can now assign any view to any team, even if they’re not a member of that team.

portal-14050156.title: Improved Brand Voice for Breeze Assistant and AI Blogs
portal-14050156.description: Brand Voice now learns directly from your own content examples to sound more like you. Upload a few blog posts or emails, and Brand Voice will adapt to match your sentence structure, pronoun preference, tone shifts, punctuation usage, and even humor--making AI-generated content in Blog and Breeze Assistant feel authentically yours.

portal-14052892.title: Legal Center Update - February 2, 2026
portal-14052892.description: Hello, HubSpot recently updated the Customer Terms of Service

portal-14055252.title: View Statistics in the Reports List
portal-14055252.description: View counts now appear in the Reports list, showing you how often each report has been viewed and by whom.

ui-extensions-p-wildcard-enables-cards-f.title: UI Extensions: p_* wildcard enables cards for all custom objects
ui-extensions-p-wildcard-enables-cards-f.description: UI Extensions now support the p_* wildcard, allowing developers to create cards that work across all custom objects without needing object-specific configurations.

breeze-studio-agents-upgraded-to-gpt-5.title: Breeze Studio agents upgraded to GPT-5
breeze-studio-agents-upgraded-to-gpt-5.description: Breeze Studio agents have been upgraded to GPT-5, improving the quality and accuracy of AI-generated content and responses in HubSpot workflows.

sync-single-sign-on-sso-settings-to-sand.title: Sync Single Sign On (SSO) Settings to Sandbox and Developer Accounts
sync-single-sign-on-sso-settings-to-sand.description: SSO settings configured in your production portal can now be synced to sandbox and developer accounts, simplifying authentication testing in non-production environments.

enhanced-quote-design-with-html-editing.title: Enhanced Quote Design with HTML Editing
enhanced-quote-design-with-html-editing.description: Developers and admins can now use HTML editing to customize quote templates with greater design flexibility beyond the standard HubSpot editor.

custom-events-can-now-be-deleted.title: Custom events can now be deleted
custom-events-can-now-be-deleted.description: Custom events created via the API can now be deleted through the HubSpot interface, allowing developers to clean up unused event schemas from their portals.

new-sandbox-listing-page.title: New Sandbox Listing Page
new-sandbox-listing-page.description: A redesigned sandbox listing page makes it easier to manage multiple sandbox environments, view their status, and switch between them in HubSpot.

pre-rendering-warnings-now-appear-in-des.title: Pre-rendering warnings now appear in Design Manager
pre-rendering-warnings-now-appear-in-des.description: Design Manager now shows pre-rendering warnings for HubL templates, helping developers identify and fix rendering issues before publishing pages or modules.

breeze-customer-agent-now-supports-omnic.title: Breeze Customer Agent Now Supports Omnichannel Deployment via Custom Channels API
breeze-customer-agent-now-supports-omnic.description: Breeze Customer Agent can now be deployed across custom channels via the Channels API, enabling integrations with third-party messaging platforms beyond native HubSpot chat.

new-campaign-asset-type-associations-via.title: New Campaign Asset Type Associations via Campaigns Public API
new-campaign-asset-type-associations-via.description: The Campaigns Public API now supports associating additional asset types with campaigns, giving developers more flexibility when building campaign management integrations.

company-lifecycle-stage-properties.title: Company Lifecycle Stage Properties
company-lifecycle-stage-properties.description: Company records now include lifecycle stage properties that mirror contact lifecycle tracking, enabling more consistent pipeline management across both object types.

partner-search-analytics.title: Partner Search Analytics
partner-search-analytics.description: New analytics for partner portal search help HubSpot partners understand how prospects discover their listings in the marketplace, improving visibility optimization.

marketplace-updates.title: Marketplace Updates
marketplace-updates.description: Updates to the HubSpot Marketplace include improved listing management, review workflows, and developer submission guidelines for app and template providers.

custom-event-updates.title: Custom event updates
custom-event-updates.description: Improvements to the Custom Events API include new filtering options, expanded property types, and better event schema management for developer integrations.

public-beta-forecast-read-api.title: Public Beta: Forecast Read API
public-beta-forecast-read-api.description: The Forecast Read API is now in public beta, allowing developers to programmatically retrieve sales forecast data from HubSpot CRM for custom dashboards and reporting.

public-beta-securely-generate-a-preferen.title: Public Beta: Securely generate a preference page URL
public-beta-securely-generate-a-preferen.description:
UI Extensions
UI Extensions now supports a p_* wildcard in card configuration, letting you target all custom object types in a portal without listing individual schema names (like p_my_object) or portal-specific fully qualified names (like p123456_my_object). This removes a major blocker for public apps, since custom object names vary by customer portal—apps can now work across any customer’s custom objects without hardcoding object IDs. To use it, set the object target in your card config to p_

portal-14050119.title: Refresh Your Brand Identity with Your Latest Website Content
portal-14050119.description: You can now refresh your Brand Identity by pulling the latest voice, context, and messaging directly from your website—whichever one best represents your brand today. This update makes it easy to keep your AI-generated content sounding like you.

portal-14055241.title: Customer Agent can now use XLS spreadsheets in its knowledge sources to answer customer questions.
portal-14055241.description: Customer Agent can now use XLS spreadsheets uploaded to its knowledge sources to understand your data and answer customer questions based on it.

portal-14050002.title: SMS Bot Rate Filter
portal-14050002.description: A new control allowing customers to manage how they view engagement activity with SMS. Our new Bot filter identifies and reports non-human click activity for SMS campaigns.

portal-14052905.title: Create Health Scores with Optional Group Limits
portal-14052905.description: Groups within a Health Score no longer require a limit, which means you now have more flexibility when creating health scoring rules and deciding how they contribute points to the total score. Here’s what is updated: Group limits are now optional, they can still be set like before, and they can still add up to the score limit.

portal-13985292.title: Create permissions for Contacts, Companies, Deals, Tickets, and Custom Objects
portal-13985292.description: A new permission each for Contacts, Companies, Deals, Tickets, and Custom Objects. These permissions will allow for admins to control whether a user is able to create each specific type of object separately from their permission to edit that object. Note: This permission controls user actions for create, it does not include: Workflows.

portal-14039284.title: Embedded Image Search for Knowledge Vaults
portal-14039284.description: DescriptionCustom Assistants and Breeze Agents now automatically search and analyze images embedded within documents (PDFs, Word docs, PowerPoints) in Knowledge Vaults, making visual content like diagrams, charts, and screenshots accessible alongside text—without requiring users to extract or upload images separately.

portal-14050001.title: Mobile Local Search in CRM Objects
portal-14050001.description: You can now search for records directly within CRM object screens on mobile (Contacts, Leads, Deals, Tickets, and Custom Objects), including within saved views, without navigating to the global search bar.

portal-14052912.title: Add Line Items to Custom Objects
portal-14052912.description: You can now use the Data Model Builder to create associations between Line Items and Custom Objects—no custom code or workarounds required.

portal-14049411.title: Breeze Assistant mobile app: Conversation Starters to Help You Get Going Faster with Custom Assistants
portal-14049411.description: We’ve added Conversation Starters to Custom Assistants on the Breeze Assistant mobile app—making it easier than ever to kick off a chat, especially when you’re not sure what to ask or where to begin. Now, when you open a Custom Assistant, you’ll see a set of helpful prompts tailored to that assistant’s purpose.

portal-14052396.title: Associate Payments with Tickets
portal-14052396.description: Payments can now be directly associated with tickets. You can add the payments card to a ticket view and manually associate payments with tickets.

portal-14026311.title: Disable Download Toggle in Document Viewer
portal-14026311.description: Sellers can now control whether recipients see the "Download" button in the Document Viewer by toggling the download option for each share link.

portal-14050032.title: Predicted Email Engagement in Segments
portal-14050032.description: See how a segment of contacts is predicted to perform in an email based on the historical engagement of the contacts.

portal-14052723.title: Build Custom Reports on Form Submissions
portal-14052723.description: We are excited to release supporting form submissions as a data source in the Custom Report Builder to Live.

portal-14032398.title: Segment membership history
portal-14032398.description: You can now view a detailed membership history log for your Segments. Membership history shows which records were added to or removed from a segment, when it happened, and what caused the change. For static segments, you can also add or remove records directly from this view.

portal-14049262.title: Customer Agent - Channel specific configurations
portal-14049262.description: Channel-specific configuration for Customer Agent lets you customize conversation behaviors separately for messaging and email channels.

portal-14022799.title: Marketing Email API Migration to folderIdV2
portal-14022799.description: HubSpot is updating the Marketing Email API endpoints to include both the existing folderId and the new folderIdV2 fields in the JSON response during the migration period to allow you to map the folderId to folderIdV2. folderId is the field that represents the folder containing Marketing Emails in HubSpot. Beginning January 28th, 2026, folderID property will stop working.

portal-14028860.title: Edit HTML Source Code in Rich Text Editors for Quotes
portal-14028860.description: Customers that desire rich, web-native content on their quotes can now leverage source code editing in the rich text editor, allowing them to view and edit the HTML created, or write their own HTML. The rich text editor generates HTML for content created in rich text areas. It supports text formatting, lists, spacing, images, tables, and more through the editor UI.

portal-14052363.title: Create marketing events from Marketing Studio
portal-14052363.description: Customers can now create Marketing Events directly from Marketing Studio.

portal-14052655.title: Set default property values
portal-14052655.description: You can now set default values for properties in HubSpot. When creating or editing a property, admins can define a value that will automatically be applied whenever a new record is created. Default property values are applied consistently across HubSpot—whether records are created manually, through workflows, or via APIs—so commonly used values are automatically set, saving users a step and keepin

portal-14039293.title: Connect Custom Objects to Knowledge Vaults
portal-14039293.description: Knowledge Vaults now sync with HubSpot Segments built on custom objects, making all custom object data and associations available for agent queries! A new capability that allows users to connect HubSpot custom object focused segments to Knowledge Vaults, making business-specific data accessible to Breeze Agents and Custom Assistants.

portal-14052415.title: Is before & after Rolling dates
portal-14052415.description: We’ve expanded date filters so you can now use rolling (relative) dates with “is before” and “is after” across views, lists, and workflows. This lets your filters update automatically as time passes—without needing to reset fixed dates. You can now build filters like: Create date is before next week. Close date is after today. Renewal date is before the end of the month.

portal-14039297.title: Filters in Agent Inbox
portal-14039297.description: Agent Inbox now supports custom filters, allowing agents to prioritize and organize work based on their specific needs and preferences.

portal-14034343.title: Register your interest for future data center migrations
portal-14034343.description: Register your interest in migrating your HubSpot data to a different data center when your desired migration path isn't currently available. Learn more about how to migrate your account data to another regional data center here.

new-oauth-v3-api-endpoints-and-standardi.title: New OAuth v3 API Endpoints and Standardized Error Responses
new-oauth-v3-api-endpoints-and-standardi.description: HubSpot boosts security with OAuth v3 endpoints and RFC 6749 compliant error responses. New /v3/token and /v3/introspect for token handling plus standardized error fields, while v1 is deprecated with a sunset timeline in 2026. Migrate now to the new endpoints and standard errors.

portal-14052637.title: Customer Agent Message Insights: See How Your Agent Updates Records & Qualifies Leads
portal-14052637.description: When the Customer Agent generates a response, people will naturally ask "why?", an "audit card" shows what actions the agent took in order to answer the question or when it performs actions like identifying customers for CRM and when the agent has discovered a lead.

portal-14007433.title: HubSpot MCP Server (Remote)
portal-14007433.description: You can now build and manage your own AI connectors to the (Beta) HubSpot Remote MCP (Model Context Protocol) Server through a streamlined self-service interface. Allowing you to bring HubSpot context wherever you work.

portal-14027268.title: Run Agent Workflows Action
portal-14027268.description: HubSpot Breeze Studio already makes it easy to hire, customize, and deploy AI-powered agents to help your business run more efficiently. But today, we’re taking that power to the next level. Introducing the new “Run Agent” Workflow Action: a powerful way to orchestrate your AI agents directly within the Workflows app, alongside your CRM data and automation logic.

portal-14052633.title: Business Days support for Workflow Delays
portal-14052633.description: We’ve updated the Delay action in Workflows to include an option to exclude weekends. When this option is enabled, delays count only Monday through Friday. For example, if a contact enters a 1-day delay on a Friday with weekends excluded, the next action will run on the following Monday. Note that this only excludes weekends. It does not account for holidays or business hours.

portal-14050042.title: Streamlined Footer Management
portal-14050042.description: We've redesigned how CAN-SPAM Marketing Email footers are managed in HubSpot. Footer management, including creating, editing, setting defaults, and deleting footers, now solely lives in Marketing Email Settings, while footer selection remains in the Email Editor.

portal-14050163.title: Block and unblock in help desk
portal-14050163.description: You can now block and unblock senders directly in help desk. Blocking a sender ensures that all future outreach from that contact will go to spam automatically, and that restriction can be lifted later if needed.

portal-14049600.title: Updates to Starting & Viewing Multiple Conversations on a Ticket in Help Desk
portal-14049600.description: This set of updates includes two changes: An updated "tab" pattern for displaying multiple conversations on a single ticket in help desk.The option to start new conversations on an existing ticket in help desk.

portal-14052359.title: Faster and Combined Score Distribution Preview
portal-14052359.description: We've upgraded Lead Scoring’s Distribution Preview with: Faster loading: 1-10 seconds instead of 30 seconds to 2 minutes.. NEW Combined Score view: See your Combined Score distribution, thresholds, and average score - instead of just separate fit and engagement - before publishing your score..

portal-14050161.title: Persist reply editor tab selection in help desk
portal-14050161.description: With this update, the help desk reply editor will stay on the tab that the user selects as they navigate between tickets, saving time and clicks.

portal-14052265.title: Enable Call Recording Settings by Call Direction
portal-14052265.description: You can now choose to record calls based on the call direction, either inbound or outbound.

portal-14050090.title: Find & replace users references in Workflows
portal-14050090.description: Admins can now find and replace user references across workflows in bulk! This makes it easy to identify workflows that reference a specific user—such as those that assign deals or tickets—and replace that user with another user. Admins no longer need to manually open and edit each workflow to update user references

portal-14052379.title: Owner filters in dashboards in the Customer Success Workspace
portal-14052379.description: The dashboards embedded in the customer success workspace will now use the specific owner property that is set for the object in the customer success workspace settings rather than a generic owner filter. This makes the embedded dashboards more accurate within the context of the customer success workspace.

portal-14049313.title: Tagging Team in Notes & other engagements
portal-14049313.description: You can now @mention Teams directly in notes, other engagements (like calls and meetings), and comments. Instead of tagging individual users one by one, you can mention a Team to notify an entire group at once.

portal-14049562.title: Breeze Assistant: Your Loop Marketing Expert
portal-14049562.description: Quality updates to Breeze Assistant to create a better Breeze experience for Marketers. Breeze Assistant now has access to: All of HubSpot Academy's content. Breeze Assistant can even show clipped Academy videos inline related to a user's question.. Website analytics as a data source.

introducing-hubspot-cli-v8-0-0.title: Introducing HubSpot CLI v8.0.0
introducing-hubspot-cli-v8-0-0.description: HubSpot CLI v8.0.0 introduces breaking changes with a Node 20 minimum, removal of deprecated commands and legacy behaviors, and dropped support for older project versions. A major cleanup aligning with platform updates, effective February 9 2026.

portal-14052262.title: Customer Agent now adds inline citations in emails
portal-14052262.description: Whenever the agent references documentation, knowledge base articles, or website pages, it will now hyperlink the sources inline.

portal-14049327.title: Additional associations support for Campaign public API
portal-14049327.description: Customers can now associate many new assets to HubSpot campaigns using the Campaigns public API (Dev docs here). With this release, we are adding support for the following 11 asset types: Ads. Blog Posts. Files. Landing Pages. Marketing Email. Marketing Events. SMS. Social Posts. Video. Website Pages. Workflows.

portal-14052223.title: Branded Email Templates
portal-14052223.description: The ability to apply your company's brand guidelines (such as logos and colors) to HubSpot's default Marketing Email templates, making it easier and faster to send on-brand emails.

portal-14050038.title: Backdate Effective Date on Billing-Disabled Quotes
portal-14050038.description: Users can now set the Effective date of a quote to a date in the past when billing is disabled. Previously, users were blocked from backdating because the Expiration date was required to be later than the Effective date.

portal-14050162.title: Early Access Available for New Marketplace App Install Flow
portal-14050162.description: We are introducing a new install flow for all apps in the HubSpot Marketplace. Starting on April 6, 2026, the new marketplace install flow will be required to submit any app listing updates. If you don't need to make listing updates, no immediate action will be required. Until April 6, 2026, you can continue to update your app listing without implementing the new install flow.

portal-14050142.title: Deploy Customer Agent through Workflows & chatflows
portal-14050142.description: You can now deploy Customer Agent directly through Workflows and Chatflows, giving you greater control over when and how the agent engages with customers. This update allows you to trigger Customer Agent responses as part of your automated processes or existing bot logic — no additional setup or routing required.

portal-14050079.title: Help Desk Recent Searches
portal-14050079.description: Help Desk agents can now save and recall recent searches, making it faster to find relevant tickets and support their workflow efficiency.

portal-14050075.title: Export Workflow Enrollments and Action Log data into a CSV file
portal-14050075.description: Admins can now export detailed workflow enrollment and action logs into a CSV file, giving them a complete, record-level view of how workflows are executing over time. With this feature, teams can export Workflow data into spreadsheets or reporting tools for deeper analysis, debugging, and auditing.

portal-14046344.title: Remove specific values from multi-checkbox properties with the Workflows Edit Record action
portal-14046344.description: We’ve added a new option to the Edit Record workflow action that lets you remove specific values from a multi-checkbox property without clearing the entire field. You can now selectively subtract values from a list of selected options directly in workflows.

portal-14049549.title: Streamlined Association Management
portal-14049549.description: A simplified process for managing object associations in HubSpot's data model, including activating existing associations and creating new ones with custom objects. This update also hides deactivated associations from the associations view.

portal-14027375.title: Delete or mark notifications as read on mobile
portal-14027375.description: HubSpot mobile users can now manage their mobile notifications in the Notification Centre more efficiently by selecting one or multiple notifications to either mark as read or delete them in bulk.

public-beta-self-service-mcp-auth-apps-f.title: Public Beta: Self-Service MCP Auth Apps for the HubSpot Remote MCP Server
public-beta-self-service-mcp-auth-apps-f.description: Ecosystem partners and customers can now build and manage their own AI connectors to the (Beta) HubSpot Remote MCP (Model Context Protocol) Server through a streamlined self-service interface. This public beta builds on the initial release of the HubSpot Remote MCP Server and simplifies the experience  of creating and managing AI connectors directly.
public-beta-self-service-mcp-auth-apps-f.author: dedson@hubspot.com (Dennis Edson)

portal-14049309.title: Form Submissions on the Company Record
portal-14049309.description: Company records now display form submissions from all associated contacts on the activity timeline.

portal-14049609.title: Facebook CAPI Dataset Quality API
portal-14049609.description: You can now see the how Facebook Conversions API (CAPI) events increase your conversions and can view actionable recommendations about how to improve the quality of your events, which helps better optimize your ads.

portal-14043270.title: Assignment Details
portal-14043270.description: AI-powered routing explanations help you understand exactly why a conversation or ticket was assigned to a specific team member. When you open the routing details, you’ll see a clear explanation of which routing rule fired, who was eligible at that moment, and how HubSpot made the final assignment — presented in simple, human-friendly language.

portal-14049334.title: Subtasks
portal-14049334.description: Subtasks allow you to break down tasks into smaller, more manageable steps within HubSpot.

portal-14049272.title: Property Based Quote Approvals for Standard Approvals
portal-14049272.description: We’re expanding the capabilities of Standard Approvals by giving admins more flexibility in how they set up approval rules. Instead of requiring every quote to go through approval, admins can now use quote properties or properties from associated objects like line items and deals to configure a targeted quote approval workflow.

portal-14044210.title: Customizable Extended Sidebar for Customer Success Workspace

portal-14046329.title: Pin Columns in the Line Item Editor
portal-14046329.description: You can now pin columns in the line item editor. When customizing your view using the Edit columns modal, you can choose how many columns to keep visible as you scroll horizontally.

portal-14049443.title: Prompt-Based Assistant Builder
portal-14049443.description: The Prompt-Based Assistant Builder is an in-product setup support that helps you easily write strong, structured instructions when creating a Custom Assistant. Instead of facing an intimidating blank “Prompt” field, now you can describe your goals in plain language and get robust instructions at the press of a button.

portal-14045213.title: New User-level Permissions Requirement for AI Connectors on the HubSpot Marketplace
portal-14045213.description: DescriptionAI connectors are defined as apps that primarily connect HubSpot directly to general-purpose generative AI assistants or agents. Due to the importance of user-level permissions to customer data security and privacy in AI systems, we require all new AI connectors on the Marketplace to support user-level permissions via the HubSpot Developer Platform.

portal-14039280.title: Agent run notification system
portal-14039280.description: Automated agent run notifications keep your team informed about agent activity without requiring constant manual checking. When agents complete automated runs, encounter failures, or require tool approvals, relevant team members receive timely updates directly in their inbox.

portal-14040010.title: Toll Free Numbers (U.S.)
portal-14040010.description: Toll Free number acquisition for the United States

portal-14049372.title: Assign Customer Agent to Third-Party SMS, Slack, Instagram, Telegram, TikTok Channels
portal-14049372.description: Businesses can now assign the Customer Agent to a variety of channels like SMS, Instagram, Telegram, LINE, WhatsApp, and Slack. You can build your own channel integration with the Custom Channels API or click here to discover which marketplace apps offer this out-of-the-box, with more integrations on the way.

portal-14049429.title: Custom Views on Reports List and Dashboards List
portal-14049429.description: New custom views on the reports list page help you quickly find and access reports using personalized filters and pinned tabs.

portal-14049202.title: New HubSpot Numbers Available in Finland, Poland, and more!
portal-14049202.description: HubSpot phone number acquisition is now available in additional countries: Netherlands (local). Finland (local). Poland (local). Belgium (local). Thailand (local). You can submit business documentation for these countries, and acquire a HubSpot phone number that can be used for inbound and outbound calling, Team Calling in Help Desk, IVR, and more!

portal-14044209.title: Enhancements to Property Creation
portal-14044209.description: We’ve enhanced the property creation experience in HubSpot to make it more flexible and easier to use. When creating a property outside of Property Settings, you can now create the following types of properties: Calculation. Rollup. Property sync.

portal-14043211.title: Partner Search Analytics
portal-14043211.description: Introducing Partner Search Analytics! A new way to track how marketplace searches enable discovery in the HubSpot Marketplace. See key metrics like: How often your app appears in search results (impressions). Which search terms lead to clicks on your listing. Ranking position for each term (1 = top result). Your can now monitor trends over time to understand how listing updates affect visibility.

portal-14049418.title: Modify your Email Preview Text Display Setting
portal-14049418.description: Description: A new option to only show your recipients the defined preview text for your Marketing Emails without automatically filling extra space with email body content.

portal-14040256.title: Goal Progress Reporting
portal-14040256.description: It is now easier to create new reports that show goal progress in HubSpot directly from the Goals app and add those reports to any dashboard. This change includes two new visualization styles: Progress mode for gauge reports. Leaderboard mode for bar charts.

portal-14049373.title: Create associations to activities using workflows
portal-14049373.description: You can now use the Create association workflow action to create associations to activities. Activities included are Notes, Tasks, Meeting event, Call, Email, Communication, and Postal Mail.

portal-14049460.title: Default View & Advanced Filters are now in Workflow Folders!
portal-14049460.description: Workflow folders now support default views and advanced filtering, making it easier to find and manage workflows at scale.

portal-14032445.title: Lifecycle Stage Conditional Property Logic
portal-14032445.description: Conditional property logic now supports contact and company lifecycle stages as controlling properties, letting you show or require specific fields when records reach certain stages in your process.

portal-14049428.title: Contact Enrichment Coverage Expanded
portal-14049428.description: Contact enrichment coverage is now even better than before, thanks to smarter handling of data, and onboarding some additional data sources.

portal-14049343.title: Customer agent now handles all your front office conversations with Agent Goals & Lead Qualification
portal-14049343.description: The Customer Agent just got a major upgrade! Now, it can handle all your front office traffic—qualifying prospects, adding them to your CRM, and even booking meetings with your sales team.

portal-14043406.title: Scan and Redact Sensitive Data in CRM Activities
portal-14043406.description: The information present across your CRM Activities (notes, calls, tasks, , emails, meetings) can contain a wide range of data, from notes logged by your team members to emails received from customers. For those who may be handling sensitive data (financial data, health information, etc), you can now scan your account for the identification of Sensitive Data.

portal-14034404.title: Quick Contact Import
portal-14034404.description: All customers now have access to our quick contact import tool. Previously, this import tool was only available to free and starter customers when they executed their first import during onboarding.

portal-14030371.title: Stripe Data Sync onboarding and mapping improvements
portal-14030371.description: Automatically creating object syncs in the Stripe Data Sync App and unlocking a couple more field mappings.

portal-14049328.title: Customer Agent can now use structured data to answer questions
portal-14049328.description: The Customer Agent can now read structured data to answer customer queries—fast and accurately.

portal-14049339.title: Create quotes through Breeze Assistant
portal-14049339.description: Create quotes from anywhere in HubSpot using Breeze Assistant, enabling AI to intelligently select required inputs such as templates, rather than navigating across the platform and manually selecting the required inputs.

portal-14049221.title: Choose Your Send Address for E-Signature Verification
portal-14049221.description: We’re introducing the ability for customers to customize the “from” address used for e-signature verification emails on HubSpot quotes. Previously, these emails were always sent from success@hubspot.com, which couldn’t be changed and often caused confusion or deliverability issues.

portal-14049254.title: Persisting Legacy Quote Access for Signed & Paid Quotes
portal-14049254.description: Legacy quotes will only expire if the buyer has not completed the required action (signature or payment) by the expiration date. If the buyer action is completed by the expiration date, the quote will be accessible to set up payments and to be countersigned for 1 year after the expiration date, leaving ample time for these actions to take place.

portal-14022966.title: Rotate ticket owners based on user availability
portal-14022966.description: The existing Rotate Owner action in ticket-based workflows only will be updated to allow for: Selection of individual seated users AND teams with seated users. Assign to Customer Agent or Contact Owner with fallback options. Assign based on user availability (includes availability status, working hours, and out of office). Consider ticket capacity limits for target users (SvH ENT only).

portal-14046266.title: Pop-up notification dismissal timer starts on user activity
portal-14046266.description: Pop-up notifications remain visible until the user is actively viewing the page, and only then does the auto-dismiss timer begin.

portal-14046285.title: Improved HubSpot Payments Disconnect Flow
portal-14046285.description: If you're disconnecting HubSpot Payments, you'll see a guided flow with clear steps, information about impacts, optional support, and feedback collection.

portal-14031980.title: New HubSpot Mobile App Redesign
portal-14031980.description: The HubSpot mobile app now features updated colors for both light and dark modes, creating a cleaner interface that aligns with the desktop redesign and keeps meeting WCAG AA accessibility standards.

portal-14020420.title: Forecast Read API
portal-14020420.description: Customers can now retrieve forecast submissions through a public, read-only Forecast Read API, and use the Retrieve Forecast Types API to understand which forecast types those submissions are associated with.

portal-14049253.title: Quotes preview side panel with quick actions
portal-14049253.description: Admins can now fully configure the preview panel, giving teams quick, streamlined access to important record details. The panel works much like other CRM record cards and can be personalized to fit your exact needs, ensuring the right information is easily accessible.

portal-14028580.title: New Marketplace Requirement: Seamless App Install Flow
portal-14028580.description: HubSpot has launched a new standardized install flow for all marketplace apps that keeps customers within HubSpot throughout the installation process. Action Required: All marketplace apps must adopt this new flow to submit future updates to their app listing. To avoid interruption, please implement the new flow as soon as possible.

portal-14046633.title: Mobile Widgets & App Intents on Breeze Assistant mobile app
portal-14046633.description: With Mobile Widgets & App Intents, Breeze Assistant goes beyond the app screen, bringing your AI assistant right to your home screen and system search. Widgets enable you to ask Breeze Assistant questions, take a picture, access your gallery and files, or dictate your new question with a single click..

portal-14045202.title: Quote Custom Properties
portal-14045202.description: You can now manage quote properties directly in Data Management, just like you do for contacts, companies, and deals. This includes creating custom properties on the quote object. These properties can be leveraged to personalize your quotes or to match your business workflows in a familiar, centralized interface.

portal-14040192.title: Ask Breeze About Product Updates
portal-14040192.description: You can now ask Breeze Assistant questions about Product Updates and get clear, relevant insights from anywhere in the app. Whether you’re looking for what shipped today, what’s coming next, or which updates matter most to your role, Breeze Assistant surfaces the most relevant Product Updates and summarizes what you need to know.

portal-14046281.title: Bank Account Verification in Onboarding
portal-14046281.description: During onboarding, you'll securely link your bank account using Stripe Financial Connections, an OAuth-like process that enables secure, real-time bank verification and sets up your payout account simultaneously.

portal-14043305.title: Configure Tab Visibility in the Updated Sales Workspace
portal-14043305.description: Configure which tabs (Companies, Leads, Deals) users can see in the updated sales workspace.

portal-14043401.title: HubSpot Deal to Order Association with Microsoft Dynamics Sales Order workflow
portal-14043401.description: When a Microsoft Dynamics 365 Sales Order is created in HubSpot—either manually or through an automated workflow—the corresponding HubSpot Deal will now be automatically associated with a HubSpot Order. This new association unifies sales data between HubSpot and Microsoft Dynamics 365, improving consistency and reducing the need for repetitive data entry.

portal-14032127.title: Sunset Rollout – Surveys Public API (Private Beta)

portal-14039510.title: Formula Fields in Custom Report Builder
portal-14039510.description: The Formulas feature in the Custom Report Builder (CRB) allows you to create calculated fields directly within your reports. Key capabilities include: Integrated Builder: Easily locate the "Create Formula" button in the middle configuration panel to start building. All created formulas will be hosted in this section. Note: You can create up-to 5 formulas per report..

portal-14043312.title: Configure "Companies" Tab Visibility in the Sales Workspace
portal-14043312.description: Admins can control which users see the "Companies" view in the Prospects tab of the sales workspace. This lets admins tailor the visible tabs to each rep's responsibilities.

portal-14031657.title: Turn off tracking per Marketing Email
portal-14031657.description: The ability to override your global Marketing Email open and click tracking settings for individual Marketing Emails directly in the email editor, giving you control over tracking on a per-email basis.

portal-14034409.title: Import now shows you the records you've imported post-import
portal-14034409.description: When you complete your import, we'll now show you a table of all the records included in your import. You can now take action on specific records in the table, like create leads or add them to a segment.

portal-14046301.title: Live Chat Availability Fix
portal-14046301.description: We’re updating how live chat availability is enforced to ensure chat behavior matches customer expectations and settings. Previously, visitors could still send messages when all agents were set to “away”, even if the chat was configured to be disabled during agent unavailability. This inconsistency only existed for live chat chatflows.

portal-14040241.title: Sunsetting the process guides private beta
portal-14040241.description: Rollback: Process Guides is being sunset on January 30th

portal-14027467.title: Improved asset reports in campaigns
portal-14027467.description: We have updated asset reporting tables in the campaign performance tab.

portal-14043415.title: Improved experience to test your Customer Agent on Email
portal-14043415.description: Email testing lets you see exactly how your agent will respond to customer emails. You do not need an email channel connected to test. You can preview the full email conversation - from the customer's initial question through your agent's response - just as it would appear in a real inbox.

portal-14046264.title: Visualize Custom and App Events on Contact and Company Records
portal-14046264.description: You can now add a middle panel card to Contact and Company records to easily visualize custom and app event occurrences over a selected timeframe.

portal-14034363.title: Rich Text Editor for Welcome Messages in Custom Assistants
portal-14034363.description: The Rich Text Editor for Welcome Messages gives you formatting tools to create polished, professional welcome messages when building Custom Assistants. Instead of working with a plain text box, you now have access to a full editor with formatting options like bold, italic, lists, links, and emojis.

portal-14040255.title: New colors available for property options
portal-14040255.description: You can now style your property options with even more flexibility. We’ve added light variants for every color—perfect for cleaner, more subtle labeling. Plus, there's a new color in the palette: teal.

portal-14043241.title: Property sort in the data panel
portal-14043241.description: We’ve added new sorting options to the property picker that help you understand which properties are actively used and make it easier to find the right one. You can now sort properties by: Name (A–Z). Name (Z–A). Used in assets (Most → Least). Created date (Newest → Oldest). Last updated (Newest → Oldest).

portal-14046212.title: 76+ new and 22+ featured updated apps in the HubSpot Marketplace
portal-14046212.description: 76+ new apps were recently added to the HubSpot Marketplace last quarter. Additionally, 22+ featured apps including the HubSpot Connector for Claude, Descript, and Zapier were recently updated with new features. Featured highlights include: Arrows now supports HubSpot's project object to link customer onboarding plans with native tasks and Gantt charts.

portal-14043329.title: Data Agent: Expanded Object Support
portal-14043329.description: Data Agent now works with deals, tickets, and custom objects in the CRM.

portal-14034267.title: Filtering on Record Associations Cards
portal-14034267.description: You can now filter association cards on CRM record pages to quickly find the most relevant related records. Association cards display the relationships between records—like which contacts, deals, or activities are linked to the primary record you're viewing.

portal-14043313.title: Send high dollar invoices with partial payments enabled
portal-14043313.description: Checkout now displays payment method limits for invoices with partial payments enabled, defaulting the payment amount to the maximum allowed per method and showing an error if the entered amount exceeds the limit.

portal-14032393.title: Edit Static Segments
portal-14032393.description: You can now edit Static Segments!

portal-14043333.title: Data Agent: Web Research for Contacts

portal-14039323.title: Contextual Date Helper
portal-14039323.description: We’ve added contextual help text to date filters that clearly explains which records are included based on your selection. When you use date operators like “is,” “is before,” “is after,” or “today,” you’ll now see a short explanation under the filter that describes the exact range being applied.

portal-14034405.title: Object Prioritization in Import
portal-14034405.description: The object selection step of import now calls attention to the objects you import the most. If you're new to import, we'll highlight "popular" objects.

portal-14032386.title: Company Lifecycle Stage Properties
portal-14032386.description: Each lifecycle stage now has four new company properties that track the company's progression through its lifecycle: Date entered stageDate exited stageLatest time in stageCumulative time in stage

portal-14041205.title: Inline Text Editing for Website and Landing Pages (Private Beta — Elevate Theme only)
portal-14041205.description: Inline text editing lets you click directly into text on the canvas and type, delivering a true WYSIWYG editing experience. A contextual floating rich text toolbar brings formatting controls directly into the canvas.

new-resource-legacy-crm-card-converter.title: New Resource: Legacy CRM Card Converter
new-resource-legacy-crm-card-converter.description: To support developers migrating from Classic CRM Cards to the new App Cards, we’ve released the Legacy CRM Card Converter, a lightweight tool and example designed to simplify the transition process. The resource provides: The card converter is intended to accelerate planning and development as you prepare for the October 31st, 2026, sunset of Classic CRM Cards. Explore the tool here: https://github.com/HubSpot/ui-extensions-examples/tree/main/legacy-card-converter

developer-tasks-and-app-migration-paths.title: Developer Tasks and App Migration Paths
developer-tasks-and-app-migration-paths.description: Now the Developer Platform surfaces actionable insights directly on the Developer Overview for all HubSpot Accounts. Developers can view task cards highlighting whether any of their apps are eligible for migration to the new Developer Platform, with clear guidance on which apps can and cannot be migrated. Previously, the Developer Overview lacked actionable next steps, leaving users uncertain how to maintain or upgrade their apps. These new insights enable clear, actionable guidance, reducing mi

hubspot-ip-ranges-api.title: HubSpot IP Ranges API
hubspot-ip-ranges-api.description:
You can now dynamically access HubSpot's public IP ranges for your projects and firewalls. With this API, you can automatically update your firewall rules and enhance your security monitoring. You can retrieve the set of IP ranges using this endpoint:
https://api.hubapi.com/meta/network-origins/2025-09/ip-ranges
This API does not require authorization. The response will include a list of IP ranges and the HubSpot services using those IPs. See the documentation for full details.

new-filter-by-object-type-id-for-v3-list.title: New Filter by Object Type ID for v3 Lists API
new-filter-by-object-type-id-for-v3-list.description: The /crm/v3/lists/search endpoint in the v3 Lists API now supports filtering lists by object type using the objectTypeId parameter in the POST request body. See additional details on what specifically changed, below: This new feature enhances list segmentation by allowing filtering of lists by HubSpot CRM object type. Applicable to CRM segments (part of Lists), especially for Marketing Hub and Main Hub products. Additionally, this change enables tighter integration for custom reporting and workf

template-selection-for-cpq-quotes-via-ap.title: Template Selection for CPQ Quotes via API
template-selection-for-cpq-quotes-via-ap.description: You can now specify a custom template when creating CPQ quotes through the Quotes API, rather than relying on the default content template. This unlocks full control over quote design and structure for any workflow that programmatically generates quotes. During creation, the API will associate the quote to the selected template and pull in any additional template data, while still prioritizing values explicitly set on the quote. Note that templates can only be chosen at creation time and cannot

standard-sandbox-updates-new-limits-new-.title: Standard Sandbox Updates: New Limits, New Capabilities, and Legacy Sunset
standard-sandbox-updates-new-limits-new-.description: HubSpot is rolling out a more powerful Standard Sandbox experience, alongside clearer data limits and a planned sunset of Legacy Standard Sandboxes.

public-api-for-uninstalling-an-app-relea.title: Public API for Uninstalling an app released to GA
public-api-for-uninstalling-an-app-relea.description: The previously announced API for uninstalling an app from a HubSpot Account has been released from beta into general availability. This endpoint allows app builders to remove their app from a HubSpot Account, which removes any app features set up for the app, including removing any configured app cards, as well as unsubscribing any configured webhooks for that account. See the documentation for more details.

updates-to-associations-to-the-cart-obje.title: Updates to associations to the Cart object
updates-to-associations-to-the-cart-obje.description: You can now create associations between carts and custom objects, and configure custom association labels and limits for the cart object. This improvement allows you to tailor the cart object to your specific business needs and workflows. This update allows integrations to update associations using the Associations API, as well as allowing super admin users to update associations by editing the data model in their account. Additionally, users can associate carts to deals directly from record pag

breeze-assistant-can-now-query-your-cust.title: Breeze Assistant can now query your Custom event and App event data
breeze-assistant-can-now-query-your-cust.description: Breeze Assistant can now query the custom website events and app events you've configured in your HubSpot Account. You can now get answers about these events directly from Breeze Assistant, helping you:

portal-14039722.title: Create goals based on leads, emails, and activities
portal-14039722.description: You can now create goals to track leads, emails, and activities in addition to existing goal objects.

portal-14032430.title: ReCAPTCHA for Live Chat
portal-14032430.description: You can now opt-in to reCAPTCHA to protect against bots and spam in live chat.

portal-14032435.title: LinkedIn Personal Accounts Followers Statistics
portal-14032435.description: We are now able to collect and display Followers statistics for LinkedIn Personal Accounts within HubSpot's Social reporting. In order to gain access to these statistics, please reconnect your LinkedIn personal accounts to HubSpot.

portal-14033216.title: Custom and Cross-Object Reports on CRM Records
portal-14033216.description: Customers can now integrate comprehensive report cards directly into CRM records. The updated Report card displays aggregated data from multiple objects and external sources, moving beyond the limitations of single-object views. Customers can easily add or configure these custom reports right on the CRM record page.

portal-14032427.title: Customer Agent Prompt Recommendations
portal-14032427.description: Customer Agent can now display smart prompt suggestions that appear in your chat widget based on what page your visitors are currently viewing. Instead of generic conversation starters, the widget shows relevant, helpful prompts tailored to each specific page, making it immediately clear how the AI agent can assist visitors with their current needs.

portal-14032345.title: View where you are logged in to HubSpot
portal-14032345.description: Session Management is a security feature that allows users to see what devices they are logged into HubSpot. Users can view information like device type, operating system, browser, IP address, and the date the session was last active. Lastly, users can choose which sessions they would like to log out of, excluding their current one.

portal-14034414.title: HubSpot IP Ranges API
portal-14034414.description: The IP ranges API provides HubSpot's IP addresses for use in firewalls and monitoring systems.

portal-14037205.title: Pipeline Object Tags Visible for All Users for Smart CRM, Sales Hub, and Service Hub
portal-14037205.description: In paid Smart CRM, Service Hub, or Sales Hub portals, all users can now view pipeline object tags. Previously, only paid seat users could view object tags. Additionally, pipeline object tags are now included in Smart CRM Professional and Enterprise plans.

legacy-standard-sandboxes-sunset-what-s-.title: Legacy Standard Sandboxes Sunset: What’s Changing & How to Prepare (FAQ)
legacy-standard-sandboxes-sunset-what-s-.description: We recently introduced an improved Standard Sandbox, including the new Deploy to Production feature for the most requested supported asset types . These enhancements empower RevOps and Marketing Ops teams to safely test business logic, data flows, and nurture workflows in a dedicated environment without risking disruption in their production accounts.
legacy-standard-sandboxes-sunset-what-s-.author: dedson@hubspot.com (Dennis Edson)

portal-14031940.title: Cloning Quote Templates
portal-14031940.description: Users can clone quote templates so they can copy content from existing templates to create new templates, instead of starting from scratch.

portal-14031910.title: Quote Preview
portal-14031910.description: Users can now preview quotes before sending them to their customers so that they can confirm the rendering of data, such as personalization tokens, and can view the buyer experience before publishing the quote.

portal-14032066.title: Help Desk Search Experience Updates
portal-14032066.description: We’ve introduced a set of enhancements designed to make it faster and easier for support teams to find the tickets they need. The help desk search experience now includes: A new search popover with pre-search filters that help you narrow results before running a query, such as by closed tickets. An updated search results page that automatically reflects any filters applied.

portal-14031909.title: Reorder Bookmarks in Global Navigation
portal-14031909.description: Users can now edit the order of bookmarks directly in the global navigation.

portal-14034317.title: Help Desk Spaces are Now Available at Pro+
portal-14034317.description: Help desk spaces, previously limited to Enterprise, are now available to Pro tier customers.

portal-14023206.title: Segment Analytics
portal-14023206.description: The Analyze tab in Segments (previously Lists) provides insight into how your segments are used across channels, how segments are progressing through the buying journey, what overlap exists between segments, and which segments require attention.

portal-14034318.title: Help Desk: Users with Account Access Can Now Manage Views and Spaces
portal-14034318.description: We’re expanding help desk customization capabilities for views and spaces to users with Account Access (admin-base) permissions.

portal-14034262.title: Invoice Numbers Available in Payouts for Easier Reconciliation
portal-14034262.description: You can now see and export Invoice Numbers associated with each payout in HubSpot, making it easier to match payout amounts to specific transactions.

portal-14027635.title: Refine Suggestions for DeDupe
portal-14027635.description: Customers can now reject multiple duplicate suggestions in bulk using rules configured on top of the existing duplicate identification model.

portal-14032524.title: Admin Control to Unbounce Internal User Emails
portal-14032524.description: Admins can now directly unbounce internal users’ email addresses from the Users & Teams experience, without needing to contact HubSpot Support or use separate tooling. This new option is available in the user’s detail view for eligible bounced addresses and is limited to superadmins, with built-in safeguards such as rate limits, hard-bounce protection, and full audit logging.

portal-14032149.title: Additional Object Types on Association Workflow Actions
portal-14032149.description: You can now use workflow association actions with a broader set of object types.

portal-14032428.title: Improved Saving for Workflows
portal-14032428.description: We've improved how we handle saving enabled workflows that contain errors. Until now, if an enabled workflow had multiple errors, you could get stuck. Even if you wanted to fix the errors, you couldn’t save until every issue was resolved. With this update, you can now save your workflow as long as you aren’t adding new errors.

portal-14032375.title: Edit Seller Company and Contact in Quotes
portal-14032375.description: Users can now change who the seller contact and company are in Quotes, allowing users to have more flexibility and control of the information presented on their quotes. Additionally, users can now display a seller contact's phone number.

portal-14032527.title: Intro/outro slides in video editor
portal-14032527.description: You can now add intro and outro slides to your videos in HubSpot's video editor using static image slides. These slides appear at the beginning or end of your video and can be easily added or removed as needed.

portal-14032526.title: Built-in video editor for social posts
portal-14032526.description: DescriptionYou can now edit your videos directly in the social composer — no extra tools needed. Add branding, captions, trim to short form clips, or crop for different social networks like Instagram right where you publish, making it faster and easier to create polished, platform-ready content in one seamless workflow.

portal-14013751.title: New Email property: Sequence ID
portal-14013751.description: A new email property that identifies whether a one-to-one email was sent as part of a sequence and captures the specific Sequence ID.

portal-14031449.title: New Email property: Template ID
portal-14031449.description: A new email property that identifies whether a one-to-one email was sent using a template and captures the specific Template ID.

portal-14032497.title: Improvements to the Product Updates Page
portal-14032497.description: We’ve made several improvements to the Product Updates page to help you more easily find, understand, and keep track of what’s changing in HubSpot. As of 12/16/25: Global search in Product Updates: You can now search for an update from any tab. If there are no results in your current tab, we’ll automatically show matches from All updates..

portal-14032387.title: Email Ignore List for Customer Agent
portal-14032387.description: Email ignore list gives admins control over which email addresses or domains the Customer Agent should not engage with. Any conversations from these senders are automatically routed to a human agent—without consuming AI credits.

portal-14023765.title: Help Desk Sidebar Updates: Customizable Tabs and New Ticket Activities Card
portal-14023765.description: This update includes two major components: Sidebar Tabs: When customizing the sidebar, admins can now organize cards into tabs. This includes renaming, reordering, adding/removing, and moving cards between tabs..

portal-14032349.title: Activities Now Available in Data Model Builder
portal-14032349.description: The Data Model Builder UI now includes activities, expanding the view of HubSpot's data model across a broader set of objects.

portal-14032431.title: Customize Associations to the Cart Object
portal-14032431.description: You can now create associations between carts and custom objects, and configure custom association labels and limits for the cart object.

portal-14032079.title: Enroll in Workflows from CRM Index Pages
portal-14032079.description: You can now enroll objects in workflows from CRM index pages. This is available for all CRM objects, including custom objects.

portal-14031215.title: Enrichment Property Mapping and Overwrite Controls
portal-14031215.description: Description: You can now map data enrichment fields to custom properties and set property-level override rules.

portal-14031318.title: Zapier: More CRM Objects Support
portal-14031318.description: Following our recent CRM Objects release, we've introduced more support to help you further automate your business. The Zapier app now supports the additional CRM objects listed below: Appointment. Cart. Commerce Payment. Course. Deal Registration. Discount. Fee. Goal Target. Invoice. Lead. Listing. Postal Mail. Project. Service. Subscription. Tax.

portal-14031469.title: Edit or delete Campaign UTM values
portal-14031469.description: Campaign users can now edit or delete Campaign UTM values, providing greater control and ensuring more accurate reporting.

portal-14031811.title: Subscriptions event data in Report tool
portal-14031811.description: You can now use subscriptions event data (for individual subscription statuses and opt out all events) via the Report tool to build views, easily track and analyze subscriber data over time. Includes source of opt change, status change, date, and more.

portal-14032133.title: AI Voice Isolation for Video Editing
portal-14032133.description: AI Voice Isolation makes it easy to instantly improve the audio quality of your videos by removing distracting background noise. With just one click, you can now clean up your audio directly within the video editor, no external software or technical knowledge required.

portal-14032114.title: A private preview of Workflow UI updates
portal-14032114.description: Thank you for participating in the Workflows visual updates beta and for sharing thoughtful feedback

portal-14032113.title: Blog Research Agent
portal-14032113.description: Please note: The Blog Research Agent is transitioning to a private beta as we focus on quality and performance improvements

portal-14031777.title: Mute all notifications on Android
portal-14031777.description: Android users can now temporarily pause all HubSpot mobile notifications for a set period, using predefined time slots or custom durations.

portal-14032029.title: Help Desk Search Relevancy Improvements
portal-14032029.description: Help desk search result ranking has been improved to boost results that match across multiple searchable fields

portal-14026347.title: Social Settings Simplification
portal-14026347.description: Description: Social settings can now be managed in a simpler page with fewer tabs. The Accounts tab has been made easier and faster to use, with connected accounts grouped by Social Network.

portal-14025534.title: Create Segments of your Quotes, Subscriptions, Invoices, Payments, and Payment Links
portal-14025534.description: Create segments of your invoices, quotes, subscriptions, payments, and payment links based on their properties and associated data.

portal-14030726.title: Quotes CRM Index Page
portal-14030726.description: The quotes index page now uses the new index page design, giving you more control through customizable columns, views, and side panels.

portal-14031869.title: Breeze Assisitant mobile app: Notifications
portal-14031869.description: DescriptionThe Breeze Assistant mobile app now supports push notifications. The first use case that we are launching are activation tips, delivered on a schedule over the user's first two weeks with the app, that introduce the features of the app and encourage users to start new threads to explore these.

portal-14031180.title: Segment Powered Knowledge Vaults
portal-14031180.description: Knowledge Vaults now stay automatically in sync with selected HubSpot Segments (Active Lists), ensuring the Vault always contains up-to-date Contacts, Companies, Deals, or Tickets matching your criteria.

portal-14031921.title: Breeze Assistant can now query your Custom event and App event data
portal-14031921.description: Breeze Assistant can now query the custom website events and app events you've configured in your HubSpot portal.

portal-14030716.title: Expanded Partner Admin Permissions
portal-14030716.description: We've converted Partner Admin to a single, consistent permission that ensures Partners have reliable access to the tools they need across all customer accounts.

portal-14031335.title: Quote Totals Section in Quotes
portal-14031335.description: You can display a quote-level subtotal, discount, taxes, and post-tax total, enabling you to better summarize the quote information and more transparently communicate your offering to buyers.

portal-14031768.title: Replaceable Analyze Tabs: Landing pages, Website Pages, Target accounts, Social and Blog
portal-14031768.description: Custom dashboards replace the default analyze tab in landing pages, website pages, social media, blog, and target accounts tools.

portal-14030698.title: Introducing Custom Assistants on Breeze Assistant mobile app
portal-14030698.description: Custom Assistants are tailored AI helpers that use your company’s documentation and HubSpot data to deliver fast, accurate answers—right inside the Breeze Assistant mobile experience. From onboarding bots that answer new employee questions, to product experts trained on your knowledge base, these assistants bring focused, domain-specific help to your team—wherever they are.

portal-14031416.title: Find unread threads, and rename threads, in Breeze Assistant mobile app
portal-14031416.description: Now, in Breeze Assistant mobile app, you can rename existing conversation threads. This makes it easier to find important previous threads that you want to return to. Additionally, if you navigate away from a thread while a message from Breeze Assistant is processing, you'll see a dot on the menu icon, and in the thread list in the menu to indicate that there's an unread message for you.

portal-14028390.title: HubSpot deal to order association with NetSuite sales order creation or workflow
portal-14028390.description: When a NetSuite sales order is created in HubSpot, either manually or through an automated workflow, the corresponding deal will now be automatically associated with the order in HubSpot. Previously, when a user created a sales order from HubSpot, a sales order in Netsuite was automatically created but only able to associate with HubSpot deals as an integration sales order.

portal-14030694.title: Artifacts on Breeze Assistant mobile app. All your Breeze Assistant content, in one place
portal-14030694.description: Artifacts is your new home for everything Breeze Assistant has created with you. From AI-generated images, Artifacts makes it easy to find, review, and reuse your assistant’s outputs—right from your phone. Think of it as your mobile content command center: always organized, always accessible.

portal-14031661.title: Test your Customer Agent on email
portal-14031661.description: Email testing lets you see exactly how your agent will respond to customer emails. You do not need an email channel connected to test. You can preview the full email conversation - from the customer's initial question through your agent's response - just as it would appear in a real inbox.

portal-14030886.title: Quote Template Selection via API
portal-14030886.description: You can select a CPQ quote template when creating quotes via API, enabling you to pull in the content and properties from quote templates, including line items, countersignatures, attachments, and layout and design from the template to the created quote.

portal-14031341.title: Report Viewer Flexibility Improvements
portal-14031341.description: The report viewer now offers customizable display options and enhanced navigation controls, including a full-screen mode.

portal-14031674.title: Generate Preference Page URLs via API
portal-14031674.description: The Preference Link Generation endpoints allow you to generate secure URLs to the Manage Preferences and Unsubscribe pages for any contact in your HubSpot CRM.

portal-14031220.title: Show/Hide Controls for Acceptance in CPQ Quotes
portal-14031220.description: Sales Reps and Sales Admins can now hide the "Acceptance" section in CPQ quotes when "print and sign" is selected as a signature method. You can still mark the quote as signed manually from the Quotes index page and quotes sidebar cards. This enables you to use quotes for proposal use cases, where you want to present your offering but do not require a signature from buyers.

portal-14031725.title: Merge property options for all object types
portal-14031725.description: You can now merge property options for all object types in HubSpot. Previously, this capability was limited to Contacts, Companies, Deals, and Tickets. With this update, you can combine multiple property options into a single option across any object type—including custom objects and admin-activated objects.

portal-14027559.title: CMS Audit Logs for All Tiers
portal-14027559.description: Audit logs are now available to all CMS Hub customers, showing when and by whom key changes were made to website content, domains, and HubDB data.

portal-14031423.title: Associate Carts and Deals
portal-14031423.description: Associate carts with deals directly from record pages in HubSpot.

portal-14022307.title: Social Inbox Notifications
portal-14022307.description: You can now configure HubSpot to notify you when people comment on your owned social posts, mention your social profile in public posts or comments, or send you a direct message on Instagram. This enables you to prioritize and reply to critical social conversations more efficiently without having to leave HubSpot.

portal-14028833.title: Customer Agent can now view and edit contact properties directly in your CRM!
portal-14028833.description: The Customer Agent can now view and edit contact properties directly in your CRM.

portal-14028683.title: Lead Scores Now Show Negative Values
portal-14028683.description: We've made an update to bring more transparency to lead scores that include negative values. Check out this quick 🎥 video summary + demo to learn more! What's changing: Scores that calculated to a negative value but displayed as 0 will now show the actual negative number and be used correctly in combined score calculations.

portal-14028688.title: Inline edit your segment members
portal-14028688.description: You can now edit property values directly within your segments.

portal-14031331.title: Updated page creation: template selection
portal-14031331.description: An update to the template selection screen when creating a website page.

portal-14031337.title: Updated filter editor now in Workflows
portal-14031337.description: In October, an improved filter builder was added to the Segments tool. That update is now live in workflows, too.

portal-14028789.title: Get Notified on your CRM Syncs from Data Studio
portal-14028789.description: Users can now get notified on the behavior of their CRM syncs from Data Studio. Within notification settings you have the option to get notified when... a sync completed successfully. a sync completed with errors. a sync failed. a sync was archived.

portal-14028219.title: Control how form submissions from excluded IP and referrers are handled
portal-14028219.description: We are introducing a setting that allows customers to control how HubSpot processes form submissions from excluded IPs and referrers. Note: Excluded IP and Referrers refer to the IP or a referrer that were added to the exclusion list under Settings -> Account Management -> Tracking & Analytics -> Tracking code -> Advanced Tracking We had released a feature earlier that would mark all form submissi

portal-14030785.title: Ticket Re-Opening Management in Help Desk
portal-14030785.description: Ticket reopening management is a new workflows-powered solution that allows users to control if, when, and how tickets re-open based on new replies to closed tickets.

portal-14028208.title: Reset the Object Create Form to Default State
portal-14028208.description: The object create form customization experience now has a reset button that allows you to restore your create form to its default state.

portal-14031244.title: Help Desk: Custom Views Based on Contact and Company Object Properties
portal-14031244.description: You can now create custom views based on contact and company object properties in help desk!

portal-14023817.title: Orders in Global Search
portal-14023817.description: You can now search for Orders directly from HubSpot’s global search bar — right alongside contacts, companies, deals, and more.

portal-14031216.title: Sequences added to Workflows Connection Panel
portal-14031216.description: We’ve expanded the Connections panel in Workflows to give you even greater visibility into the assets your automation relies on. In addition to Emails, Forms, Segments, and Integrations, the panel now also surfaces Sequences.

portal-14023756.title: Historical Signal Backfill for Buyer Intent
portal-14023756.description: No more waiting for intent signals. Starting today, when you track a company for intent signals, we'll automatically and immediately backfill 30 days of their historical signals—free of charge. Get a complete picture of every tracked account's intent from day one.

portal-14030727.title: Improving Zendesk to Help Desk Ticket Migration
portal-14030727.description: Customers can now more easily migrate their customer support ticket data from Zendesk into Service Hub using the Smart Transfer platform. This new functionality enables the migration of the full historical ticket conversation threads between support teams and customers - closing a long-standing gap in HubSpot's ticket migration capabilities.

portal-14031019.title: Conversation Starters in Custom Assistants
portal-14031019.description: Conversation Starters are pre-configured clickable prompts that appear within a Custom Assistant to help users know what to ask. When clicked, they automatically send the message to the assistant, no typing or editing needed. These starters are designed to make it easy for users to understand what the assistant can do and get started fast.

portal-14028659.title: Close a chat and keep the ticket open in help desk
portal-14028659.description: Help desk users can now close a live chat while leaving the ticket open in help desk.

portal-14023675.title: 🚀 Automated Testing for UI Extensions
portal-14023675.description: You can now use a new suite of comprehensive testing utilities built into the HubSpot UI Extensions SDK. These tools make it easier for you to write, run, and maintain automated tests for your custom UI extensions. With these new testing utilities, you can: Build with confidence. Catch bugs before they reach production.. Refactor safely. Make changes knowing your tests will detect regressions..

portal-14028664.title: Easier ticket name editing in help desk
portal-14028664.description: Users can now edit ticket names directly in the header of help desk.

portal-14028687.title: Lists v3 API: filter by object type ID
portal-14028687.description: An update to the Lists v3 API search endpoint to filter your requests by object type.

portal-14027401.title: New Company News Signals for Buyer Intent
portal-14027401.description: Ready for more reasons to engage your highest-value accounts? Starting today, you now have access to 5 new Company News signals that surface when your tracked companies grow or expand: Executive Hiring: When a company hires a new C-level executive.. Product Launches: When a company launches a new product or service..

portal-14030742.title: Enriched Data Delete Alerts
portal-14030742.description: Admins can now receive email alerts when enriched data delete requests require action in their account

portal-14030425.title: Payments in the new Forms Editor
portal-14030425.description: We’re adding support for Payments in Forms, allowing you to integrate digital payments directly into forms built in the new Editor: Collect payments at submission: Visitors can complete a form and make a payment in a single streamlined process.. Access payment & submission data: Both form responses and payment details are stored in HubSpot for easy tracking.. Flexible payment redirects:.

portal-14030780.title: Scale Video Content Production with the Descript App for HubSpot
portal-14030780.description: The new Descript app for HubSpot seamlessly connects AI-powered video editing with your marketing platform. This bi-directional integration enables you to send HubSpot videos directly to Descript for editing and export finished videos back to HubSpot for distribution and reporting.

portal-14022492.title: Fully Customizable Index Page Quick Filters
portal-14022492.description: You can now customize the quick filters on your index pages. Add custom quick filters based on any property, remove default filters you don't use, and reorder filters to match your workflow.

portal-14023477.title: Project Notifications
portal-14023477.description: You can now configure notifications for project records, including when a project is assigned to you, when project stages or statuses update, and when you're mentioned on a project.

portal-14028779.title: Projects are replacing the service object in the Customer Success workspace
portal-14028779.description: The services tab in the customer success workspace will be renamed projects. The projects object will become the new default object for this tab in the customer success workspace.

portal-14013478.title: Public API for Uninstalling Customers from an App
portal-14013478.description: You can now use a public API endpoint that allows you to programmatically uninstall customers from your app. This API is now Generally Available (GA). When you send a successful request to this endpoint, you’ll receive a 204 No Content HTTP response.

portal-14030283.title: Create Contacts from the Chrome Extension
portal-14030283.description: You can now create contacts directly in the HubSpot chrome extension while viewing a company's website, with automatic association to that company.

portal-14027399.title: Create Property Validations via Public API
portal-14027399.description: You can now create property validation rules via public API.

portal-14025480.title: Updated Highlight Card on CRM Records
portal-14025480.description: The highlight card on CRM records now features updated formatting and styling. Contact and Company record pages and preview sidebars showcase avatars, while Deals, Tickets, and custom objects display icons for easier object identification.

portal-14028266.title: Association Limit Increase
portal-14028266.description: HubSpot is increasing association limits for all paid accounts. You can now associate individual records with up to 250,000 other records of a given object type, such as up to 250,000 contacts with a single company.

portal-14028426.title: Updates to knowledge base theme
portal-14028426.description: New customization options and UI enhancements are now available in the knowledge base tools: Autocomplete search results include category/subcategory breadcrumbs. Categories sidebar background color adopts "Accent" type styling. You'll see new Spacing options for header components (Theme editor > Header > Search Bar, Theme editor > Header > Menu).

portal-14008221.title: Create and Apply Credit Memos to Invoices
portal-14008221.description: Credit memos enable you to record adjustments that reduce customer balances due to overpayments, pre-payments, or other corrections. You can apply credits directly to invoices to keep your financial records accurate.

portal-14028218.title: [Rolled Back to Development] Auto Merge Duplicate Records in Manage Duplicates Tool
portal-14028218.description: : We’re rolling back automatic merge functionality for records with exact 1:1 property matches

portal-14027445.title: HubSpot connector for Gemini
portal-14027445.description: With the HubSpot connector for Gemini, customers can bring their HubSpot context to Gemini to surface insights, and generate content to be actioned back in HubSpot. Marketers can ask: "Show me a list of contacts in the “lead” lifecycle stage, and draft follow up notes that I can send in HubSpot.".

portal-14027440.title: Increased Project Pipeline Limits
portal-14027440.description: Project pipeline limits are increased for Professional and Enterprise customers.

portal-14027573.title: Clearer error visibility for Customer Agent knowledge source syncing
portal-14027573.description: We are introducing clearer error messages for knowledge source syncing failures.
