Previously, many of these issues were categorized under a generic “internal error”, which often told you only that an unknown error occurred. Now, you will receive a more granular error code directly related to the cause of the failure.

portal-14027590.title: Apply and Manage Checkout Fees on Subscriptions
portal-14027590.description: Checkout fees can now be used when creating a manually billed subscription. Additionally, checkout fees can be removed from a subscription so buyers can update their payment method.

portal-14025403.title: Support for Lead and Custom Object Associations and Labels
portal-14025403.description: You can now create associations between the Lead object and custom objects. Additionally, you can add association labels to existing associations.

portal-14027522.title: Agent Run Sharing
portal-14027522.description: You can now share agent run outputs with teammates in your portal using shareable links, making run outputs and activity logs viewable in a 'Shared with me' filter.

portal-14023745.title: Admin Configurable Dashboards for Sales Performance
portal-14023745.description: Super admins can configure and assign up to five dashboards in Sales Performance to specific users, allowing managers to see relevant dashboards immediately upon accessing the tool.

portal-14028306.title: Improved Report Refresh Rates
portal-14028306.description: The refresh function on reports works faster than it did before.

portal-14028425.title: Line Item Custom Properties
portal-14028425.description: You can now manage line item properties directly in Data Management, just like you do for Contacts, Companies, and Deals. This includes: Creating custom properties on the line item object. Defining calculated and conditional properties. This gives you the flexibility to extend line item data to match your business workflows in a familiar, centralized interface.

portal-14028364.title: Customizable Sequence Unenrollment Triggers
portal-14028364.description: You can now customize when contacts are automatically unenrolled from sequences by turning off the default reply and meeting triggers.

portal-14028214.title: AI Landing Pages: Image gen optionality
portal-14028214.description: When generating a landing page using AI, the default setting is to use placeholder images. Users can choose to opt into one of the following instead: AI-generated images. Images from their file manager. If no option is selected, placeholder images will be used.

portal-14023606.title: Unified Landing Page Creation
portal-14023606.description: A unified landing page creation flow combines the "manual" and "AI-powered" workflows into one seamless experience.

portal-14027583.title: Auto-Fill Smart Properties
portal-14027583.description: You can now schedule automatic updates for smart properties to keep your data current, accurate, and actionable.

portal-14023891.title: Add Google Drive Files to Campaign Builder
portal-14023891.description: Connect your Google Drive account to add files directly to your HubSpot campaign brief.

portal-14027453.title: Paste hyperlinks directly into email editor
portal-14027453.description: You can now paste hyperlinks directly into the email editor without using the Insert Link button.

portal-14026315.title: Sync owners bidirectionally between HubSpot and Salesforce
portal-14026315.description: Customers with the Salesforce app installed will now see owner data for activities, tickets and custom objects synced between Salesforce and HubSpot, ensuring both systems stay aligned automatically.

portal-14020296.title: Memories on Breeze Assistant mobile app
portal-14020296.description: Memories is a new feature in the Breeze Assistant mobile app that helps it remember useful details about you—your preferences, your name, your goals, and even your tone of voice—so it can respond in more personalized and helpful ways. As you chat, Breeze Assistant can automatically capture important insights (like “you prefer concise responses”) or let you manually save details that matter.

portal-14025307.title: Orders, Invoices, and Carts Supported in Data Modeling Tools
portal-14025307.description: Orders, carts, and invoices are now available in the data model builder. Watch this short video to see the new functionality in action.

portal-14025260.title: Customize Sections, Header, and Summary for CPQ Quotes
portal-14025260.description: Sales admins can now standardize and customize how fields display via the quote template, and sales reps can easily make adjustments at the quote level, making it easy and fast to create and send quotes to buyers. Now, you can... Configure which sections are displayed to customize the layout of your quote. View updated section names in the sidebar to improve navigation and usability.

portal-14027521.title: File Manager Filter by Extension
portal-14027521.description: File extension filtering lets you quickly filter your files using common extensions such as PNG, JPG, and PDFs.

portal-14023598.title: Quote Activity in Sales Workspace Feed
portal-14023598.description: You can now see and monitor the latest activity on quotes related to your deals directly within the Sales Workspace Feed. Quote Approvals. Quote approval requested. Quote approval rejected. Quote approved. Quote approval recalled. Quote changes requested. Quote Edits. Quote published. Quote recalled. Quote expired. Quote countersigned. Quote Acceptance. Quote accepted. Quote buyer signed.

portal-14023594.title: Report Remix Beta Closed
portal-14023594.description: Report remix took existing reports and transformed them into new reports based on the same underlying data. The report remix beta is now closed and the functionality will be sunsetted.

portal-14026244.title: Add Custom Tags to Reports List
portal-14026244.description: You can now add custom tags to any report from the reports list page to organize and categorize your reporting.

portal-14027484.title: "Publish" Workflow Permission
portal-14027484.description: Every user within HubSpot is assigned permissions. Permissions are critical for usability, security, and scalability. Today, the Workflows app has three basic permissions that a user can have: • View: This allows users to view workflows • Edit: This allows users to create and edit workflows • Delete: This allows the user to delete workflows.

portal-14025520.title: New Microsoft Teams Onboarding in Connected Apps
portal-14025520.description: Introducing a new guided onboarding experience for the Microsoft Teams app, available directly from the app’s Settings > Overview page. This update provides a clear set of grouped steps that help customers configure, activate, and get more value from their Microsoft Teams integration.

portal-14007450.title: Assign Customer Agent to Calling Channels
portal-14007450.description: Assigning a calling channel to the Customer Agent, enables the agent to facilitate an AI powered, voice Q&A experience that helps callers resolve their issues without the need for live agent assistance. For more information on the existing capabilities of the Customer Agent, check out the knowledge base article.

portal-14025348.title: Mute all notifications on iOS
portal-14025348.description: We're making a number of different enhancements to notification management. With this update users will be able to mute all notifications on iOS. Android coming soon.

portal-14026325.title: Multiple dashboards in the Sales Workspace
portal-14026325.description: You can now add multiple dashboards in your sales workspace and assign them to specific users or teams, all from the workspace settings. Admins have powerful new controls to customize dashboard visibility and apply dynamic filters. Sales Reps will see dashboards with the relevant filters automatically applied—no manual setup required.

portal-14023857.title: Create Segments of your Leads
portal-14023857.description: You can now create segments (formerly lists) of your leads based on their properties and associated data.

portal-14025530.title: Display external LinkedIn personal posts
portal-14025530.description: Previously, externally-published posts for personal LinkedIn accounts weren't shown in the Social Manage tab. We'll now be showing all published posts for personal LinkedIn accounts, regardless of whether they were posted via HubSpot or through another publishing tool.

portal-14023689.title: Search and Sync History within the Data Studio Sync Details Page
portal-14023689.description: We've made two updates to the sync details page to help you get more granular information on your syncs from data studio into the CRM. The ability to search for a specific record within the sync activity table.. A new Sync History tab which will show you a full sync history for your dataset..

portal-14025492.title: Convert Views to Segments
portal-14025492.description: You can now turn any saved view into a segment directly from the table view, no rebuilding required. The new “Save as segment” action in the Filters menu lets you instantly apply the filters from any view to create a segment. It’s a faster, more seamless way to go from viewing data to taking action — without losing the filter logic you’ve already built.

portal-14023653.title: Copy Workflows to Another HubSpot Account
portal-14023653.description: Customers using Multi-Account Management can now copy Workflows from one HubSpot account to another within their organization using Asset Copying functionality.

portal-14023462.title: Projects API
portal-14023462.description: The Projects API is now available in support of HubSpot's new project object which launched publicly in September. With this new API, customers and partners can programmatically create, read, update, and associate projects to related records.

portal-14020283.title: File Upload on Breeze Assistant mobile app
portal-14020283.description: With the new File Upload capability, you can now attach files, images, and documents directly into your Breeze Assistant conversations—right from your phone. Whether you're pulling a deck from your iPhone files, sharing a screenshot, or uploading a PDF from HubSpot Files, Breeze makes it effortless to bring your content into the conversation.

portal-13992210.title: Merge permissions for Contacts, Companies, Deals, Tickets, and Custom Objects
portal-13992210.description: A new permission each for Contacts, Companies, Deals, Tickets, and Custom Objects. These permissions will allow for admins to control whether a user is able to merge each specific type of object separately from their permission to edit that object.

portal-14025341.title: Streamline “Email Opened” notifications on mobile
portal-14025341.description: Improvements to notifications, which reduce the noise from too many "email opened" notifications on mobile.

portal-14023039.title: Apple Pay and Google Pay Now Available with Stripe Payment Processing
portal-14023039.description: If you're using Stripe payment processing, you can now offer your buyers the option to pay with Apple Pay and Google Pay.

portal-14023379.title: You can now train the Customer Agent on videos
portal-14023379.description: Your Customer Agent now learns directly from videos.

portal-14025294.title: Time to First Human Assign Reporting
portal-14025294.description: We’ve added a new metric to HelpDesk Insights — Time to First Human Assign. This metric measures how long it takes for a ticket to be assigned to a human support rep for the first time. This property captures the time between when a ticket is created and when it first lands with a human, excluding any AI or automated assignments.

portal-14023658.title: Decoupling Headers & Footers from Templates
portal-14023658.description: We have been working on new functionality which will decouple headers and footers from templates, meaning that a user will be able to choose exactly which header within a given theme will appear on a given page at the page level. In the future they will also be able to add/clone new headers as desired.

portal-14023803.title: Score High-Impact Pages with AI-Powered Insights
portal-14023803.description: Lead Scoring users can now view insights and score their high-impact web pages using conversion performance data. Insights can be customized across goal stages and include the specific web pages (URL Paths), conversion rate based on the number and percentage of companies that visited the page, and confidence level based on impact.

portal-14023734.title: Attach files when logging an activity and composing an email on mobile
portal-14023734.description: You can now attach files from your mobile device or from the HubSpot file manager on both iOS and Android.

portal-14023141.title: Search and Filter the Import History Table
portal-14023141.description: You can now search and filter the import history table, making it easier to find specific imports.

portal-14023467.title: Multi-language support for case studies
portal-14023467.description: We’ve added multi-language support for the Case Studies content type in HubSpot. This update lets you create, manage, and edit case studies in multiple languages, all within the same familiar interface you already use.

portal-14023674.title: Blog Analyze Tab
portal-14023674.description: We’re surfacing a new Analyze tab within the Blog tool, allowing users to view and track blog performance directly within the app. This tab introduces five key reports that display engagement metrics, publication data, and trends over time — helping users understand how their blog content is performing without leaving HubSpot.

portal-14008891.title: Flexible CRM Views
portal-14008891.description: We're enhancing the Index page experience to make it simpler, more intuitive, and more powerful—so you can move faster, focus on what matters, and make better decisions with ease. Check out this loom for a quick walk through.

portal-14011300.title: Forecast Submission Cadence & Reminders
portal-14011300.description: You now have the power to set a consistent forecast submission cadence for your team and send automated reminders to ensure timely submissions.

portal-14023438.title: Sequences: Use Default "From Address" for Workflow Enrollment
portal-14023438.description: Sequence enrollment via workflow now uses the user's default "from address" when sending on behalf of the contact owner, if a valid default is set.

portal-14010683.title: New Granular Content Embeds Permissions
portal-14010683.description: We are introducing dedicated permissions for Content Embeds. Previously, access to embeds was bundled into broader marketing permissions. With this change, three new permissions now provide more granular control: content-embeds-viewer. content-embeds-editor. content-embeds-publisher.

portal-14019499.title: Multi-Account Workflows
portal-14019499.description: Multi-account workflows let you create and update contact records across connected HubSpot accounts automatically. You can build workflows in one account that create or update contacts in other linked accounts. Learn more in this Knowledge Base article.

portal-14023375.title: Help Desk: Customer Agent Default View
portal-14023375.description: You can now access Customer Agent tickets from a single place in help desk! The new Customer Agent default view centralizes all open tickets currently being worked on or escalated by Customer Agent.

portal-14022838.title: Improved Organization and Search for Data Variables in Workflows
portal-14022838.description: A newly organized data panel, that makes it easier to find and use all the data from your CRM and workflows.

portal-14023060.title: Filter the Data Studio Syncs Table
portal-14023060.description: You can now filter the data studio syncs table on the data integration home by the destination object, as well as the status of the sync.

portal-14022731.title: Undo / Redo in Video Editor
portal-14022731.description: You can now undo up to 50 actions, or redo your editing steps in the video editor with dedicated undo and redo buttons. This makes it easier to experiment and refine your video without worrying about making a mistake.

portal-14023079.title: Projects Task Card
portal-14023079.description: Projects now include a default Tasks card that displays all tasks associated with the project.

portal-14022960.title: Legal Stuff Update - November 3, 2025
portal-14022960.description: Hello, HubSpot recently updated the Customer Terms of Service

portal-14013639.title: Primary Email Preserved on Login
portal-14013639.description: When contacts log in to password-protected pages or memberships using a secondary email address, the system now maintains their primary email address on their contact record instead of overwriting it.

portal-14023128.title: Enhanced board experience and Board View for Contacts & Companies
portal-14023128.description: This update brings you both: The option to see your contact and company records in a board view, and. A redesigned board experience across all objects with a board view--including deals and tickets. Here's what you'll find: Board View for Contacts & Companies: See your records organized by lifecycle stages for a real-time, actionable view.

portal-14022763.title: Customize Quote Acceptance Section with Rich Text
portal-14022763.description: The "Acceptance" section within AI-powered CPQ quotes can now be edited using rich-text editing.

portal-14022473.title: Introducing the Breeze Assistant mobile App — Now on Android and iOS — Public Beta
portal-14022473.description: Introducing Breeze Assistant on Android and iOS.

portal-14022522.title: Image Support in Knowledge Vaults
portal-14022522.description: Description: Custom Assistants and Breeze Agents now analyze images in Knowledge Vaults, allowing users to search and reference visual content alongside text and PDF files.

portal-14022908.title: Customer Agent Actions now supports Path parameters
portal-14022908.description: Actions are how your Customer Agent securely looks up information from your systems—like an order’s status or a subscription’s renewal date—so it can answer customers accurately. Until now, Actions could only pass details as query parameters (for example, /orders?orderId=123).

portal-14022921.title: Help Desk: Colored Status for Escalated Customer Agent Tickets
portal-14022921.description: We’ve added colored status indicators for escalated Customer Agent tickets! This means escalated tickets will now display a distinct red color, making them easy to identify at a glance.

portal-14008947.title: Apps Tab on a Redesigned Data Integration Home
portal-14008947.description: The data integration home now includes a new Apps tab alongside the existing Files tab, plus a Data Studio syncs tab that shows syncs from Data Studio. This update is part of the Data Studio beta. In order to gain access to this redesigned home, you need to join the Data Studio beta.

portal-14022392.title: Leads can now be renamed and toggled on/off
portal-14022392.description: Leads have evolved to be a more broadly supported CRM object. As part of this, you can now toggle the leads object on or off in your HubSpot account and rename it to match your team's terminology.

portal-14022221.title: Create Quotes from Deal Index
portal-14022221.description: Commerce Professional and Enterprise users can now view quote status and create quotes directly from the Deal Index Table View in the CRM. This enhancement enables you to: Check the current status of each quote. Quickly create new quotes via the Deal --> Quote column.

portal-14022520.title: Updated Quote Expiration Logic for CPQ
portal-14022520.description: Previously, CPQ quotes expired once the expiration date passed—regardless of whether buyers had already signed. This often caused issues when payments or countersignatures weren’t completed in time, forcing quotes to be recalled and re-sent. Now, CPQ quotes will only expire if the buyer has not signed by the expiration date.

portal-14022499.title: Custom Domains for Checkout and Payment Links (HubSpot payments only)
portal-14022499.description: Merchants using HubSpot payments can now host Checkout pages on their own custom domains instead of a HubSpot domain. This builds buyer trust and delivers a seamless payment experience by hosting payment links and checkout on your own domain. Note that Apple Pay and Google Pay are not currently supported on Checkout pages on a custom domain.

portal-14020797.title: Round Robin: New ticket distribution option for Help desk tickets
portal-14020797.description: We’re adding Round Robin as a new distribution method for ticket assignment in Help Desk routing rules and workflows. This option distributes tickets in a sequential, rotating order—ensuring each eligible team member is assigned one ticket before any team member receives a second.

portal-14022516.title: Auto-linking for Emails, Domains, and URLs in Text Properties
portal-14022516.description: Text properties containing email addresses, domains, and URLs now automatically convert to clickable links.

portal-14022739.title: Timestamp visibility in the Customer portal
portal-14022739.description: We added timestamps to messages in the Customer Portal, giving clients full visibility into the exact time messages were sent or received. This is an increasingly common request from customers who rely on the portal to collaborate on tickets and need accurate timing for every message exchange.

portal-14020489.title: Forms Analyze Tab
portal-14020489.description: We're surfacing a new set of forms reports directly in the forms Analyze tab. These reports give you more flexibility than ever before, generate AI-powered insights and recommendations, and can be saved to your own custom dashboards. You'll also be able to edit and save reports on the Analyze tab, or even replace the Analyze tab with a custom dashboard tailored to your needs.

portal-14022222.title: Create Product Bundles
portal-14022222.description: You can now create reusable product bundles directly from the Product Library. This enables you to group commonly sold items like implementation services and licenses into a single, repeatable configuration. Bundles are inserted into the line item editor with one click and behave like standard line items after insertion.

portal-14022500.title: Task Queues in CS Workspace
portal-14022500.description: Task queues is a feature that adds a "Start All Tasks" button when more than two tasks are listed in the the CS workspace, allowing users to work through them sequentially rather returning to the workspace every time a task is completed.

portal-14010891.title: AI-Powered Landing Pages: Custom Templates
portal-14010891.description: When creating a landing page using AI, you will now have the option to pick from any of the existing templates in your portal. Images and text will be generated and plugged into the template so that you have a publish-ready page that is aligned to your brand.

portal-14020490.title: Google Meet App: New Redesign for Advanced Global Settings
portal-14020490.description: Introducing a newly redesigned global advanced settings page where admins can now control the recording, transcription, and sync features of the Google Meet app across their organization. With flexible filtering options, admins can now apply settings across the entire organization or tailor them for specific users or teams.

portal-14020214.title: Automation Overview Updates
portal-14020214.description: Automation Overview now includes powerful new features to help you take action and learn faster. You’ll see your recently created workflows, AI-powered automation recommendations tailored to your portal, an improved Issues card, and HubSpot Academy automation resources—all in one place.

portal-14022348.title: Help Desk Customizable Search Results Columns
portal-14022348.description: You can now customize the columns that appear in your help desk search results table. Choose which properties to display, rearrange column order, and save a layout that's tailored to your support team.

portal-14020792.title: Easily request new data sources for data studio
portal-14020792.description: Data studio now has a form for users to submit requests for new integrations and connection methods.

portal-14020279.title: Speech To Text into the Breeze Assistant mobile app — Now on Android and iOS
portal-14020279.description: Now available on both Android and iOS, Speech-to-Text (STT) lets you dictate your messages directly into Breeze Assistant. Whether you're on a walk, in transit, or just prefer speaking over typing, you can now interact with Breeze using just your voice. This feature turns your spoken input into text in real-time—so you can get answers, create notes, or kick off workflows without lifting a finger.

portal-14022217.title: Customize Brand Voice and Identity Across Brands
portal-14022217.description: Introducing Brand Voice and Identity Customization for Brands (aka Business Units): You can now define a unique brand voice, identity, and kit for each brand (formerly known as business units) in your portal. This update allows you to tailor how content is created across HubSpot's AI tools to better reflect the personality, tone, and values of each individual brand.

portal-14020310.title: Updated CRM Association Cards
portal-14020310.description: Association cards now support sorting, searching, more display properties, and inline scrolling on associated objects for easier navigation. These upgrades improve productivity by allowing you to find associated records faster, organize by labels, and see key details at a glance.

portal-14020793.title: Customer Agent AI Recommended Short Answers
portal-14020793.description: We're introducing AI-recommended short answers for knowledge gaps. When your agent can't answer a customer question, you can now see a quick preview of what the response should be right from the Overview page or the Knowledge Gaps report.

portal-14013645.title: Theme Presets V1
portal-14013645.description: Theme Presets are packages of styling options (colors, fonts, buttons, etc.) that allow you to quickly switch between different visual treatments without manually editing individual theme settings. This enables you to swap different style treatments on top of your templates so that you can match your brand’s look and feel more easily.

portal-14015416.title: Availability Status Selector: Set Temporary "Away" Status
portal-14015416.description: We’re pleased to introduce an Away Timer, a new enhancement to the availability status selector in the Help Desk Workspace. Service seated users can now set themselves to “Away” for a specific time duration, after which they’ll automatically be returned to “Available” status. This reduces the risk of being left unavailable unintentionally and gives user greater control during short breaks.

portal-14015541.title: Enhanced safeguards for bulk subscription changes
portal-14015541.description: We’ve added new confirmation prompts when making large-scale (bulk) updates to contact subscription statuses. The updated experience clearly displays how many contacts will be affected and adds an extra confirmation step for updates involving 10,000 or more contacts.

portal-14013778.title: Add Google Drive Files to File Manager
portal-14013778.description: We’ve added the ability to import files directly from your Google Drive into HubSpot’s File Manager. With this update, you can connect your Google account, grant HubSpot access, and import your Google Drive files in just a few clicks.

portal-14015620.title: Zapier App: Additional CRM Objects Support
portal-14015620.description: The Zapier app now supports additional CRM objects. All objects supported by this integration include: Call. Contact. Conversation. Company. Deal. Email. Feedback Submission. Line Item. Marketing Event. Meeting. Note. Order. Product. Quote. Task. Ticket. Custom Objects.

portal-14016264.title: Lists v3 API: Fetch Batch Record List Membership
portal-14016264.description: A new Lists v3 API endpoint for fetching list membership for multiple contact records at once.

portal-14015624.title: Partner App Churn Analysis
portal-14015624.description: The Partner App Churn Analysis tool is a new feature available within the HubSpot Developer MCP Server (Public Beta), helping you predict potential churn, analyze usage patterns, and gain deeper insights into how your app is being used across your customer base.

portal-14010676.title: A new workflow creation experience
portal-14010676.description: The create workflow process now starts directly in the builder, with the ability to browse all available triggers upfront. Watch this 5 minute demo video to learn more.

portal-14019252.title: User-Level Ticket Visibility in Customer Portal
portal-14019252.description: User-level ticket permissions gives you more control over ticket visibility in the customer portal. Previously, you could only set ticket visibility for contacts to view all organization tickets or their own tickets. Now, you can assign access at the individual user level, so managers, admins, or designated users can see all tickets, while others only see their own.

portal-14019589.title: Import now shows file requirements on the file upload step of import
portal-14019589.description: The file upload step within the import flow now surfaces file requirements that will need to be present in order to have a successful import. As part of this change, we've changed the layout of the file upload step to ensure that the information found within the file requirements pop-up is accurate to the type of import you're executing.

portal-14015552.title: New Google Drive app
portal-14015552.description: You can now link Google Drive files to specific HubSpot records and generate Breeze-powered document overviews and insights directly from HubSpot record pages. Bring your Google Drive files directly into HubSpot. This new app lets you connect and view documents without leaving your CRM.

portal-14019536.title: Enhanced Segment Builder Experience with New Advanced Features
portal-14019536.description: Build smarter, faster segments with a reimagined segment builder designed for clarity, control, and flexibility. Our new builder brings three key updates: A wider, more spacious editor. An updated intuitive data panel that helps you easily find the right properties or events. New flexible filter logic that gives you the ability to toggle between AND/OR within and across each group.

portal-13999811.title: Login Experience Redesign
portal-13999811.description: HubSpot is updating its login screens to provide a simpler, more streamlined experience. For users who need to change their login methods, you can now do so within the same page. All other functionality, like remembering your previous login method, will remain the same. As a result of this rollout, we will be sunsetting the "classic" login page.

portal-14011595.title: Tiered Pricing Line Items on Mobile
portal-14011595.description: You can now create and edit line items with volume-based, stair-step, or graduated tiered pricing directly from the HubSpot mobile app.

portal-14011333.title: Edit in Descript
portal-14011333.description: Give users the ability to edit their videos stored in HubSpot using Descript

portal-14013485.title: Remove Whitespace and Format Casing in Text Properties
portal-14013485.description: You can now automatically remove extra whitespace and apply consistent casing (like uppercase, lowercase, or title case) to your text properties.

portal-14015537.title: Onboarding Agent
portal-14015537.description: This agent uses information from the sales process and context provided by you to create a welcome email and automatically generate an onboarding plan on a project object. The welcome email introduces the CSM, references the customer's goals and shares the CSM's meeting link so the customer can book a time to talk.

portal-14020227.title: Personalization tokens in email templates now support fallback values
portal-14020227.description: Fallback values for personalization tokens in email templates ensure your messages remain professional when contact, company, or deal information is missing.

portal-14013246.title: Drag and Drop Reports onto a Dashboard
portal-14013246.description: A new side panel that allows you to add saved reports and templates directly to your dashboard without leaving the dashboard interface.

portal-14011371.title: Improvements to Video Library UI
portal-14011371.description: You can now play videos directly in the video library management screen and video picker.

portal-14015393.title: View Reports in the Breeze Mobile App
portal-14015393.description: Now, when Breeze Assistant responds to your query with a report chart, you can see that chart in the Breeze Mobile app, where previously it would not load.

portal-14013759.title: App Workflow Action Insights
portal-14013759.description: For apps with workflow actions, you can now see exactly how your workflow actions are performing and being used, directly from an app's settings page in Connected Apps. The new workflow action insights reveal: Which workflow actions exist across your installed apps. How (and if) your team is currently using those actions. How actively those actions are being leveraged (adoption and enrollment).

portal-14015616.title: Custom Assistants can now read HubSpot CRM data
portal-14015616.description: Custom Assistants can now read HubSpot CRM records, including custom objects and properties.

portal-14016236.title: Target Object Name in Security Activity Export
portal-14016236.description: The security activity report now includes object names alongside object IDs when exported to CSV, making it easier to identify which assets were affected by security activities.

portal-14013634.title: Improved Channel Assignment & Human Handoff Experience
portal-14013634.description: We’ve improved how Customer Agent is deployed across channels and enhanced the handoff experience when the agent can’t answer a question. These updates make it easier to set up the agent and provide a smoother transition to human reps when needed.

portal-14015421.title: Object Library Migrating into Data Model Builder
portal-14015421.description: You can now access all object library functionality directly within the data model builder. In the data model builder, you can view an object's properties and associations regardless of whether the object is currently active, activate or deactivate objects, activate additional associations, and rename objects along with any properties that include that object's name.

portal-14013747.title: Improved Contact Sidebar in Classic Outlook for Windows
portal-14013747.description: An updated contact sidebar interface for the HubSpot Sales extension for Classic Outlook for Windows that displays contact insights and engagement triggers.

portal-14015522.title: 2,000+ Apps and 2.5M+ Active Installs: New and Recently Updated Apps
portal-14015522.description: The HubSpot Marketplace now has 2,000+ apps and 2.5M+ active installs. 88 new apps recently joined the HubSpot Marketplace last quarter. Additionally, 18 featured apps were added or recently updated with new features.

portal-14015645.title: Import Goals via CSV
portal-14015645.description: You can now bulk create goal targets for users and teams by uploading a CSV in the Goals tool. Previously, targets had to be entered manually.

portal-14011088.title: Association actions now support the Lead object
portal-14011088.description: You can now use association actions in lead based workflows. Additionally, the Lead object may now be used as the associated record in any of the association actions. Actions affected include Create associations. Apply association labels. Update association labels. Remove association labels.

portal-14015609.title: Ads AI Starter Guide
portal-14015609.description: When you land in the Ads tool for the first time, you’ll now see an AI-powered guide that asks you a few quick questions about your business and advertising goals. Based on your answers, it instantly recommends the best ad network (Google, Facebook, or LinkedIn) and ad type to start with — plus a simple beginner strategy.

portal-14015530.title: AI Email Template Upload
portal-14015530.description: AI Email Template Upload is your new shortcut for bringing external email designs into HubSpot. Simply upload or paste the HTML from platforms like Mailchimp, Klaviyo, or Figma, and AI automatically converts it into a fully editable drag-and-drop template in HubSpot's Email Editor—no manual rebuilding required.

portal-14013517.title: Help Desk Search Improvements
portal-14013517.description: What is it: We’ve enhanced the search experience in help desk to help agents find the right tickets faster and with greater confidence

portal-14001398.title: Apply Activity Logging Defaults to External Emails
portal-14001398.description: Admin-configured email logging rules now apply consistently across all email channels. Previously, these rules only applied to emails sent from contact record pages, but now they extend to emails sent through the HubSpot Sales Chrome extension, sales extension for Outlook, BCC and forwarding addresses, and sequences.

portal-14013755.title: Conversation-powered Deal Risks and Buyer Goals
portal-14013755.description: Deal Insights now pull from your conversations. HubSpot’s Deal Risks and Buyer Goals include call transcripts as a data source—on top of emails and notes. This means AI-generated risks and buyer goals reflect the full scope of buyer-seller conversations, including what’s said live during phone and video calls. Every conversation holds valuable signals about deal health.

portal-14013725.title: Preview Segment (List) Filters
portal-14013725.description: A new "Filters" tab in the segment details panel allows you to preview read-only segment filters without needing to click into the segment.

portal-14011325.title: Simplified domain connection wizard
portal-14011325.description: Before, there was a primary and secondary domain wizard. With the deprecation of the secondary domain concept, we are moving to a single wizard ("hosting"). Additionally, we are streamlining the domain connection flow, reducing the number of clicks and steps a user is required to take to connect a domain.

portal-14013862.title: AI-Recommended Actions in Workflows
portal-14013862.description: We previously had a beta for AI-recommended actions in workflows, with the goal of offering guidance and helping you create workflows more quickly. But, your feedback told us that the feature needed improvement to be helpful, so we're deprioritizing this version of AI-recommended actions.

portal-14013590.title: Additional Quote Activity Tracking
portal-14013590.description: You can now track additional quote activity events that cover the entire quote journey. New trackable events include: Buyer e-signed a quote. You recalled a quote approval request. Quote expired. Quote was manually marked as signed.

portal-14007100.title: Sales Workspace Updates
portal-14007100.description: We've updated the sales workspace to integrate more seamlessly with the Smart CRM, making it easier for sales reps to move between systems and focus on high-impact activities. Portals on the current version will keep their existing experience.

portal-14011259.title: Automation Overview Redesign
portal-14011259.description: After hearing your feedback, we've redesigned the Automation Overview page. This refreshed page is simpler, cleaner, and easier to navigate!

portal-14015521.title: Redesigned Email Editor
portal-14015521.description: A redesigned email creation experience that transforms HubSpot's email editor into an intuitive, streamlined tool. This updated editor replaces the current interface with a contemporary design, making email creation in HubSpot easier and faster than before.

portal-14011329.title: Sunset: "Start with AI" podcast creation wizard
portal-14011329.description: The "Start with AI" podcast creation feature has been sunset. This feature allowed users to input an idea for a podcast and generate an outline and script, which could then be recorded or used with AI text-to-speech.

portal-14013644.title: Automatically Apply Checkout Fees Based on Payment Method
portal-14013644.description: Commerce Hub merchants using HubSpot payments and Stripe payment processing can now add fees to quote, invoice, and payment link checkouts when customers choose to pay by credit card. Set up fees for credit card transactions only, or apply fees automatically to all transactions.

portal-14013500.title: Blocked Numbers List (Outbound Calls)
portal-14013500.description: Add numbers to blocked numbers list for outbound calls.

portal-14015460.title: New Product Builder with Product Status
portal-14015460.description: The product builder has been updated with a full-page layout, giving you a cleaner, distraction-free editing experience and control over whether a product is available to use. The updated builder includes: Flat-rate pricing support (one-time or recurring). Image upload, SKU, tax category, and product type selection. A new Active/Inactive toggle from the Product Builder or Preview Panel.

portal-14015422.title: Custom Report Builder Quick Access to Report Settings
portal-14015422.description: You can now edit settings for reports built using the custom report builder, giving you the same flexibility as reports built with the single object report builder.

portal-14010284.title: Redesigned video picker
portal-14010284.description: We have redesigned the video picker to match the look and feel of the new video library app.

portal-14013513.title: Help Desk Spam View Filters
portal-14013513.description: We’ve added three new filters to the spam view in help desk. These filters make it easier to sort through, review, and take action on spam. The new filters are: Channel accountChannelContact

portal-14013594.title: Leads Are Now a Standard CRM Object
portal-14013594.description: Leads now function as a standard CRM object with the same index page capabilities as contacts and companies, including standard tables, saved views, and board views.

portal-14013726.title: Intentional Dashboard Editing
portal-14013726.description: You can now edit dashboards with clearer controls and visual confirmation when changes are saved, reducing accidental modifications and improving confidence when managing your reports.

portal-13988230.title: Sunsetting Legacy Scoring Property - Update
portal-13988230.description: We announced that legacy scoring properties would stop updating starting August 31, 2025. By now (October 3, 2025), all legacy score properties have stopped updating. All customers that were using the legacy scoring properties can create new scores with the Lead Scoring and Health Scoring apps.

portal-14009294.title: Improved Contact Sidebar in Outlook
portal-14009294.description: An updated contact sidebar interface for the HubSpot sales add-in in Outlook that provides the same contact insights and triggers in a modernized panel.

portal-14013743.title: Generate CTAs with AI
portal-14013743.description: You can now generate pop-up CTAs using AI. Just write a short prompt describing what you need, and HubSpot will take care of the rest.

portal-14008395.title: Sections Library Modal
portal-14008395.description: The Sections Library modal provides an enhanced experience for building websites and landing pages. Instead of crowding options in the sidebar, pre-built sections, embeds, and saved sections now appear in a central modal, giving you a better view of each section's details before adding it to your page.

portal-14013583.title: Enhanced Filtering with New “Contains Exactly” Operators
portal-14013583.description: We’re introducing two new operators, Contains Exactly and Does Not Contain Exactly, to bring more precision and flexibility to your filters. Unlike a standard "Is equal to any of" operator, which requires an exact character-for-character match, these new operators check whether the input contains all the words you specify, no matter the order.

portal-14013472.title: New Bank Debit Payment Methods (SEPA, BACS, PADs) for HubSpot Payments
portal-14013472.description: Customers using HubSpot payments can now collect payment using local bank debit payment methods including SEPA, BACS, and PADs.

portal-14010980.title: Refreshed Overview Tab for Buyer Intent
portal-14010980.description: We've given the buyer intent overview tab a major refresh. The new dashboard gives you a full picture of how many high-fit companies are showing both research and visitor intent, helps you measure the ROI of your efforts, and makes it easier than ever to automate your lead capture with new recommendations.

portal-14013467.title: Deal Insights CRM Card
portal-14013467.description: : Sales reps need actionable insights in the context of each deal

portal-14013274.title: Subscription Retries for Card Payments
portal-14013274.description: With this update, failed subscription card payments are now automatically retried. When a subscription card payment fails, the system will retry the payment following a predefined schedule to help prevent lost revenue.

portal-14013564.title: Understand Health Scoring Calculations with Improved "Test A Record"
portal-14013564.description: The Test a Record feature in Health Scoring has been improved to provide customers a clearer view into how their scores are calculated while building a score. Test a Record for contacts, companies, and deals is now more easily discoverable. displays the number of events or contacts that meet rule level criteria.

portal-14013259.title: Smart Properties: Workflow Action
portal-14013259.description: A new workflow action that automatically runs smart properties to fill data using existing prompts.

portal-14013552.title: Drafts in Help Desk
portal-14013552.description: Drafts automatically save unsent messages, allowing users to leave and return to a ticket or find it in the new drafts view without losing progress.

portal-14006963.title: Order and Cart Permissions
portal-14006963.description: You now have more control over who can view and edit Orders and Carts in your account. With the latest permissions framework update, these objects are now managed through dedicated roles instead of broad, legacy scopes.

portal-14010968.title: Allowed 2FA Methods
portal-14010968.description: Allowed 2FA Methods enables admins to configure which two-factor authentication (2FA) methods users in their organization can log in with. When the setting is turned on, admins can restrict which methods are allowed: SMS 2FA or Authenticator Apps (e.g. Google Authenticator, Authy, Duo). When the setting is off—which is the default mode—all 2FA methods offered through HubSpot are allowed.

portal-14010265.title: Title Suggestions for Videos
portal-14010265.description: Our tool analyzes your video to generate relevant title suggestions and provides valuable Monthly Search Volume (MSV) data for each suggestion, empowering you to choose titles that are not only engaging but also optimized for discoverability.

portal-13973208.title: High Cardinality Associations: Phase 4
portal-13973208.description: HubSpot is rolling out pricing and packaging changes, unlocking higher association limits for select association types. Phase 4: Private Beta (August 2025) For customers enrolled in this early beta, limits for select association types will be increased: Contact, deal, or ticket associations per company: increase your limit to associate companies with up to 500,000 contact, deal, or ticket records.

portal-14013245.title: Recommended Templates for Dashboards and Reports
portal-14013245.description: We’ve introduced smart template recommendations in two key areas of HubSpot’s reporting experience: The Dashboard Template Library. The Report Creation Flow. These recommendations help you find the most relevant dashboards and reports faster, by suggesting templates based on your data and goals.

portal-14010425.title: All new reporting experience for Customer Agent
portal-14010425.description: We’re introducing a new reporting experience for Customer Agent with powerful metrics like Resolution Rate, Deflection Rate, Handle Rate, and Handoff Rate—all designed to give you deeper insight into how your agent is performing.

portal-14010851.title: Email Health Date Filter
portal-14010851.description: We’ve added a new Email Health Date Filter to Email Health. This filter lets you narrow down your email health performance metrics to a specific date range you're choosing. With this update, you can easily focus on the timeframe that matters most to you, spot trends over time, and compare performance across different periods.

portal-14010295.title: Set Brand Logo in Global Content Editor
portal-14010295.description: The Brand Kit Logo modal is now available directly in the Global Content Editor, allowing you to set up your default logos without navigating to Brand Settings. Note: Updating an existing logo still requires going to Brand Settings.

portal-14011074.title: Customer Agent can perform actions in your business systems
portal-14011074.description: Customer agent can now make API calls to your applications to perform simple tasks or give personalised answers to your customers by looking up their data.

portal-14006932.title: Blog AI Suggestions
portal-14006932.description: Streamline your blog writing workflow with the new Blog AI Suggestions tab, a centralized space for Breeze Agents and Breeze Features for blog.

portal-14011418.title: Updated Ticket Export in the Customer Portal
portal-14011418.description: We’ve updated ticket export functionality in the customer portal. Previously, exports always included a default set of ticket properties, regardless of what customers had configured to display. With this update, when portal clients export tickets, the export will now reflect the exact customized properties that were set up by your team.

portal-14009358.title: Mobile Quick Filters for CRM Objects [iOS only]
portal-14009358.description: HubSpot mobile users on iOS can now filter CRM object lists using five quick filters that appear at the top of contacts, companies, deals, leads, tickets, and custom object lists.

portal-14010305.title: Custom Goal Owners
portal-14010305.description: You can now attribute progress against goals based on a custom user property. Previously, goals could only be tracked for the owner of an object or an activity. This made it difficult to set up accurate goal tracking for more complex, team-based workflows.

portal-14011307.title: Ads Reporting Buffer Update
portal-14011307.description: We have updated our reporting to introduce a delay of up to 24 hours before metrics from ad networks are displayed in our system. We've done this to avoid importing inaccurate data and reduce load times. To view the most recent metrics without the delay, click on a particular campaign. That will show the latest reporting that the ad networks can provide.

portal-14009293.title: Improved Contact Sidebar in Gmail
portal-14009293.description: An updated contact sidebar for the HubSpot Gmail Chrome extension that now opens in the Chrome side panel instead of within the Gmail interface.

portal-14011011.title: Universal Theme Editor Now Available in Public Beta
portal-14011011.description: The theme editor will now be available directly in the page editor (in addition to its existing place in theme settings). This means you will be able to make theme changes while editing existing content or building out new pages. You'll no longer need to switch between different tabs or experiences to style your content. All your settings can be changed from one place.

portal-14011006.title: New Data Model Intro Page
portal-14011006.description: The data model space has a new intro page. This collection of tools helps you configure your data model quickly and confidently, even if you’re new to HubSpot or data modeling. The page introduces multiple ways to use AI to get started, quick suggestions, and the ability to save a collection of changes to review with your team and apply later.

portal-13993219.title: Sunset: Classic/Legacy CRM Cards built with CRM extensions API
portal-13993219.description: Starting June 16, 2025, Classic CRM Cards will enter deprecation ahead of their full sunset on October 31, 2026. Classic CRM Cards have been part of HubSpot for more than a decade, but they are static, limited to the right sidebar, and support only a few standard CRM objects.

portal-13969243.title: App settings powered by UI Extensions
portal-13969243.description: Use UI extensions tech-stack to build powerful custom UI experiences for your app's settings page. This allows developers building public or private apps to build interactive settings for their app's users. Developers will be able to build these experiences using the same tools that they use to build app cards.

portal-14010791.title: Breeze-powered Property Creation
portal-14010791.description: Breeze can now generate custom properties for you using natural language.

portal-14011084.title: Score Organic Social Interactions
portal-14011084.description: Lead Scoring customers can now score contacts, companies, and deals based on organic social media interaction. This includes scoring based on interaction type, type of post reply, and specific social networks interacted with.

portal-14010896.title: New install limits for Marketplace apps built on the HubSpot Developer Platform
portal-14010896.description: Marketplace apps that are created on, or migrated to, the new HubSpot Developer Platform now have customer install limits. Apps with the “marketplace” distribution type are limited to 25 customer installs until they are listed on the HubSpot Marketplace, and apps distributed privately using OAuth are limited to 10 customers (or up to 100 customers for Solution Partners).

portal-14011092.title: Create Lead Scores with Optional Group Limits
portal-14011092.description: Groups within a Lead Score no longer require a limit, which means you now have more flexibility when creating lead scoring rules and deciding how they contribute points to the total score. Here’s what is updated: Group limits are now optional, they can still be set like before, and they can still add up to the score limit.

portal-14011002.title: Contact email logging rules
portal-14011002.description: : Contact email logging rules let admins configure their portal to automatically capture all email communications between users and existing contacts in HubSpot.

portal-14005230.title: AI Email Summary Insights
portal-14005230.description: AI automatically generates easy-to-understand summaries of your marketing email performance, highlighting key metrics, trends, and takeaways directly in each email's Performance tab. Plus, you'll have the ability to explore more detailed insights in Breeze Assistant or ask follow-up questions through Copilot.

portal-14009271.title: Data Sync support for activatable library objects (Projects, Courses, Listings, Services)
portal-14009271.description: Data Sync now supports syncing Projects, Courses, Listings, and Services objects on top of the already existing support of most default and custom objects.

portal-14008337.title: Closing Agent
portal-14008337.description: Closing agent is your AI-powered sales assistant that provides instant responses to buyer questions 24/7. It's trained on your content—files, URLs, and knowledge base articles—and identifies when human expertise is needed, notifying you in-app, via email, or through Slack and Teams.

portal-14010981.title: "Enroll" Workflow Permission
portal-14010981.description: Every user within HubSpot is assigned permissions. Permissions are critical for usability, security, and scalability. Previously, the Workflows app only had three basic permissions: • View: This allows users to view workflows • Edit: This allows users to create and edit workflows • Delete: This allows the user to delete workflows.

portal-14010973.title: AI Referrals in Website Traffic Analytics
portal-14010973.description: A new traffic source classification in website traffic analytics that identifies visitors arriving via AI platforms (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity) when they click on cited sources. This feature automatically detects known AI platform domains and surfaces them as their own source category in reporting.

portal-14010652.title: Use Custom Drag-and-Drop Email Templates in Remix
portal-14010652.description: You can now select any of your drag-and-drop email templates when creating content in content remix without having to make any changes to your template's code.

portal-14010625.title: In-Person Meeting Notetaker [iOS only]
portal-14010625.description: The In-Person AI Meeting Notetaker brings the power of HubSpot AI to face-to-face sales conversations. Mobile reps can now capture real-time voice transcriptions through the HubSpot mobile app to automatically generate post-meeting summaries and email them to all participants. To alleviate privacy concerns, meeting captures are automatically deleted once summarization is complete.

portal-14003454.title: Unsubscribe Feedback Survey Available on Preference Pages
portal-14003454.description: You can now trigger an unsubscribe survey on the preference page to collect feedback about why a contact is unsubscribing from all emails and view this feedback for more insights about your marketing email strategy. Turn every unsubscribe into a learning opportunity without adding friction to the unsubscribe process.

portal-14010814.title: Landing Pages: Clone with AI
portal-14010814.description: When cloning a landing page, you can now choose to generate content for the new page using AI.

portal-14010675.title: Search for workflow triggers by assets
portal-14010675.description: Search for workflow triggers by asset type or name when building workflows. This feature covers forms, lists, emails, and properties.

portal-14006864.title: Social Comment Sentiment Classification
portal-14006864.description: Social Comment Sentiment Classification empowers you to quickly understand how your audience is responding to your social content, helping you to prioritize conversations to engage in, protect your brand identity, and build stronger relationships with prospects and customers.

portal-13977203.title: Suggested Email Send Times
portal-13977203.description: Optimize engagement with send time recommendations, ensuring your marketing emails reach your audience when they’re most likely to engage.

portal-14010900.title: Dynamic reply editor in help desk
portal-14010900.description: A dynamic reply editor in help desk that re-sizes automatically as the user composes their reply.

portal-14008295.title: File Manager Sorting and Filtering Improvements
portal-14008295.description: Introducing Enhanced Sorting and Filtering for the File Manager. Find your files faster with new multi-level sorting options and advanced filters. Now, you can quickly narrow your search using filters for file type, uploaded date, file status, and uploaded by.

portal-14007438.title: Dynamic Country Code Selection For Phone Number Validation Workflows
portal-14007438.description: You can now use a country or 2-letter country code property to dynamically format phone numbers as part of the Validate and Format Phone Number workflow action.

portal-14009431.title: Generate calculated property formulas with AI
portal-14009431.description: You can now use AI to generate custom equations for calculated properties.

portal-14009280.title: Click to Call from the Index Page
portal-14009280.description: Phone number property values on index pages are now clickable links that open HubSpot’s calling dialer, making it easier than ever to start a call.

portal-14009066.title: Enable Automatic Billing After First Subscription Invoice Payment
portal-14009066.description: You now have more options for subscription billing. With this update you can set up subscriptions to automatically charge after the first invoice payment, which gives you flexibility in how you collect and store payment methods.

portal-14009298.title: Quote Association & Quote Creation from Board View for CPQ
portal-14009298.description: Customers with access to CPQ via Commerce Professional and Enterprise can now view quote associations and create quotes directly from the Board View in the CRM. This enables you to: Instantly see which deals have associated quotes. Check the current status of each quote. Quickly create new quotes via the Quick Actions menu.

portal-14010271.title: Consolidated Domain Management Table
portal-14010271.description: We’ve combined brand, primary, and secondary domain tables into one unified table — and replaced the separate primary/secondary domain connection wizards with a single, simplified wizard. Deemphasis of secondary domains: For content types which support multiple domains, users needed to manually associate an additional domain to said content type by marking it as a "secondary domain".

portal-14010396.title: Sync Microsoft Teams Meeting Recording and Transcripts to HubSpot
portal-14010396.description: You can now use the Microsoft Teams integration to sync your organization's Microsoft Teams meeting data to HubSpot. You can now: Automatically sync Microsoft Teams-generated meeting recordings and transcripts to HubSpot for playback and archiving purposes. Sync participant data to contact records and create new contacts for non-CRM attendees.

portal-14010645.title: Sync Google Meet Recordings & Transcripts to HubSpot
portal-14010645.description: The Google Meet app for HubSpot makes it fast and easy to connect your conversations to HubSpot. With this update, you can now automatically sync and analyze your meetings, ensuring no valuable detail is missed in your CRM. With this integration, you can: Centralize Meeting Records: Automatically sync Google Meet recordings and transcripts to HubSpot for easy playback and organized archiving..

portal-13999996.title: Enable 'Auto-Record' for Google Meet meetings via HubSpot
portal-13999996.description: Have you ever forgotten to record an important meeting? The Google Meet app for HubSpot now has the ability to enable automatic recording of meetings in Google Meet directly from HubSpot. When you turn on "Enable Auto-Recording of Meeting in Google Meet" from your integration settings, HubSpot will activate this setting in your Google account on your behalf, ensuring all your meetings are recorded

portal-14010394.title: Autosave properties on the record page highlight card
portal-14010394.description: Editing properties on the highlight card on the left sidebar of the record page is now faster, easier, and more intuitive. Instead of clicking ‘Save’ after each edit, HubSpot will save your property edits as they are made.

portal-14008396.title: Navigation Editing in Global Content Editor
portal-14008396.description: Access advanced menus and navigation settings directly within the Global Content Editor. With this update, you no longer need to leave and go to Settings to make changes to the menus you use on your website.

portal-14008373.title: Meeting Prep in Breeze Assistant
portal-14008373.description: With Meeting Prep, Breeze Assistant ensures users are ready for any meeting by providing useful summaries of companies, contacts, and deals; suggesting talking points and agendas; and raising possible questions and concerns from meeting attendees.

portal-14009276.title: Extension - Contact Lists API - April 30, 2026
portal-14009276.description: We have extended the timeline to migrate from the Contacts Lists API to the V3 Lists API from September 30th, 2025 to April 30th, 2026. On April 30th, 2026 all endpoints from the Contacts Lists API will be deprecated and return a 404 error response message.

portal-14007591.title: Smart Properties: Contact Object Support
portal-14007591.description: You can now create smart properties for Contacts in HubSpot.

portal-14006964.title: Knowledge Base Agent Update
portal-14006964.description: Breeze knowledge base agent no longer requires customer agent knowledge gaps to create article drafts. The agent will extract topics from tickets to create article drafts for your knowledge base automatically. You can simply review article content, make edits, and publish!

portal-14007178.title: NEW! Rich Text Formatting in the Customer Portal
portal-14007178.description: We’re excited to share that the customer portal composer just got an upgrade. We added rich text formatting to the composer. Clients can now bold, italicize, hyperlink, and do much more to make their messages clearer and easier to follow.

portal-14006329.title: New routing option: Route to Team (No owner assigned)
portal-14006329.description: Customers can now choose to route to a team without assigning a ticket owner in Help Desk ticket routing.

portal-14007476.title: Dashboard Limits Update
portal-14007476.description: You can now add up to 50 reports per dashboard. We've also updated the dashboard limits by subscription tier: Free: 10 dashboards. Starter: 30 dashboards. Professional: 75 dashboards (Data Hub Professional will have 325 dashboards). Enterprise: 100 dashboards (Data Hub Enterprise will have 350 dashboards).

portal-14008511.title: Custom Action Builder UI for Workflow Actions!
portal-14008511.description: The Custom Action Builder is a visual, guided tool that gives app partners and developers a dedicated UI for creating custom workflow actions—no need to rely solely on the API. Instead of hand-writing JSON, you can: Quickly configure inputs, outputs, and dependencies through an intuitive UI.. Preview actions in-app to see exactly how they’ll appear to users..

portal-13999984.title: Sync your Third Party Transcripts for Meetings & Calls to HubSpot with our new API
portal-13999984.description: HubSpot's public API now allows partners to seamlessly import their transcription data directly into the platform. Partners who provide meeting and call transcripts can sync this valuable content with HubSpot, enabling users to maintain comprehensive records of customer engagements and leverage transcript data across HubSpot's feature suite.

portal-14008910.title: Guided Report Creation Flow
portal-14008910.description: : HubSpot's guided report creation experience now provides a dedicated space to build custom reports either from templates or using one of six report builders.

portal-14004178.title: Cross Channel Activation, Comparison and Insights for your Segments
portal-14004178.description: We are revamping the Lists Performance tab for you to: Get deeper insights into how each of your segments are performing. Compare each list to another across dimensions like email performance, list size, and segment overlap and. Explore the various ways you can engage with each list.

portal-14006899.title: Email Performance Anomaly Detection Insights
portal-14006899.description: Email Performance Anomaly Detection automatically keeps an eye on your marketing emails and informs you when something unusual happens with open rates, click rates, or unsubscribes—so you can quickly understand what’s going on and take action.

portal-14008528.title: Unify Commission Data in HubSpot with the QuotaPath App for HubSpot
portal-14008528.description: The improved QuotaPath app for HubSpot helps sales teams unify key deal data in HubSpot by bringing commission insights directly into your CRM. The new Quota Attainment App Card displays real-time quota progress and deal impact in HubSpot deal records, while the Earnings App Object makes commission data available as a native HubSpot object.

portal-14009145.title: Unify Data with the Snowflake App for HubSpot and Data Studio
portal-14009145.description: The Snowflake app for HubSpot now integrates with HubSpot's all-new data studio. In addition to data sync, you can combine Snowflake enterprise data, HubSpot CRM data, and other data sources in one place. Marketing, sales, and operations teams can now combine, enhance, and activate data through an intuitive, spreadsheet-like interface in HubSpot.

portal-14007482.title: App cards: React hooks to fetch properties and associations
portal-14007482.description: We are introducing two new data-fetching hooks for App cards built as UI extensions: useCrmProperties and useAssociations. These hooks make it easier for developers to access and format CRM record data and associations directly within app cards. All data returned through the hooks respects the authenticated user’s permissions. Learn more about React hooks in our documentation.

portal-14007074.title: Build App homes: full page applications powered by UI extensibility
portal-14007074.description: App home is an extensible, full-page centralized experience for HubSpot apps. It allows app partners and developers to build full-page applications powered by UI extensions accessible directly from the HubSpot global marketplace navigation.

portal-14009046.title: Custom SCIM Integration
portal-14009046.description: Provisioning users through SCIM (System for Cross-domain Identity Management) provides a secure and automated way to create and manage HubSpot users, speeding up the process and helping to get new users into HubSpot. The Custom SCIM Integration enables customers to set up SCIM provisioning with any identity provider beyond our officially supported Okta and Google integrations.

portal-14003786.title: Calling Notetaker
portal-14003786.description: HubSpot calling now supports live call transcription and AI powered note taking. While on a call, this new feature will transcribe your conversation in real time and automatically create a tailored summary of key points once the call has ended.

portal-14008490.title: 2025 Essential Apps for Data Activation collection
portal-14008490.description: The 2025 essential apps for data activation collection in the HubSpot Marketplace is now live. View the full collection in the HubSpot Marketplace here. When paired together with HubSpot, the 11 apps featured in the new collection help marketers achieve smarter automations, deeper personalization, and better AI performance.

portal-14008799.title: Customizable Ticket Properties in the Customer Portal
portal-14008799.description: You now have full control over which ticket properties are displayed in your Customer Portal. With customizable ticket properties, you can now select which columns are visible on your ticket listing table. What this enables for Admins: Select up to 10 ticket properties to display. Rearrange the order in which those columns are listed. Rename column headers to match your business terminology.

portal-14006828.title: Video Clip Search Agent
portal-14006828.description: You now have access to a Video Clip Search Agent in Agent Studio, an AI agent that scans your video library and automatically surfaces clips aligned with trending industry topics. It helps you create timely, high-impact content without needing to sift through hours of footage manually.

portal-14008469.title: [Private Beta] AI Email Creation
portal-14008469.description: AI Email Creation is your new AI-powered writing partner that transforms how you create marketing emails. Just tell the AI what you want to achieve — whether it’s announcing a flash sale, inviting customers to a webinar, or sending your monthly newsletter — and get a complete, branded email draft in seconds.

portal-14008905.title: Reimagined Unified Marketplace
portal-14008905.description: Your AI-powered solution finder that does the work for you. Instead of hunting through different sections or endless searches, the reimagined HubSpot Marketplace proactively surfaces the perfect solutions tailored specifically to your business needs, industry, and HubSpot setup. One unified experience with intelligent discovery that allows solutions to find you.

portal-14008904.title: HubSpot Marketplace Recommendations, Personalization & Embedded
portal-14008904.description: Experience the new HubSpot Marketplace, now personalized just for you. Discover app and agent recommendations tailored to your portal's unique needs, backed by your actual usage data and business context. The marketplace learns from how you work, delivering increasingly relevant suggestions based on your industry, use cases, and trending solutions.

portal-14006293.title: Automated Sales to CS Handoff
portal-14006293.description: AI reviewing your sales process to identify the customer's key goals for purchasing the product, top concerns, any expectations they have about the product i.e. start onboarding with this team, as well as who the champions and skeptics were. This information gets shared with CSMs when they take over the account making it easier for them to get up and running.

portal-14006322.title: Personalization
portal-14006322.description: The new Personalization app brings everything you need to create, manage, and measure personalized experiences into one central place. Use Variants to quickly build audience-specific CTAs and landing pages, without the hassle of tweaking individual modules or duplicating assets.

portal-14008597.title: Memories in Breeze Assistant
portal-14008597.description: Memories allow Breeze Assistant to remember key details, preferences, and past interactions from your chats so it can deliver smarter, more personalized responses every time you chat.

portal-14007119.title: Breeze Studio: Custom Assistants
portal-14007119.description: Breeze Studio makes it simple to build and manage custom AI assistants tailored to your business. These assistants are like purpose-built GPTs that live inside your HubSpot workspace—trained on your knowledge, tuned to your tone, and designed to assist your teams wherever they work.

portal-14007562.title: Project Object with Gantt Chart View
portal-14007562.description: You can now manage projects using a new Project object and visualize them with a Gantt chart view, giving you the ability to execute structured project management directly in HubSpot's Smart CRM. The Gantt chart view provides a visual timeline of your records and associated tasks, helping you see how work is progressing over time. You can also use table view and board view.

portal-14007426.title: Intent Signals
portal-14007426.description: Real-time intent signals—written directly to your company and contact records. Track your highest-value companies, and we'll continuously enrich those companies (and associated contacts!) with signals that include: News signals like funding announcements. Buying signals like visits to high-intent pages. Contact signals like champion job changes. The best part?

portal-14000008.title: ABM Landing Page Agent
portal-14000008.description: The ABM Landing Page Agent automatically generates personalized landing pages for your target accounts — powered by HubSpot CRM data, buyer intent signals, and prospect insights. Pages can be created on-demand or triggered by account activity, ready to share with prospects.

portal-14007495.title: Date-Based Versioned APIs (Beta)
portal-14007495.description: We're rolling out Date-Based Versioning across HubSpot APIs—a major enhancement designed to improve clarity, consistency, and confidence for developers and better enable AI and agentic consumption of HubSpot APIs. This initial release comprises a subset of our APIs geared toward external testing by our Developer Community.

portal-14007490.title: Breeze Knowledge
portal-14007490.description: Knowledge is an experience inside Breeze Studio that allows you to define what additional context you want to provide Breeze Agents and Assistants built from Breeze Studio. Breeze Agents are able to retrieve a range of different context types, including: Files. Agents can access PDFs, .txt files, and a growing list of file-types.. CRM data.

portal-14008253.title: Marketing Email Classification Properties in Custom Report Builder
portal-14008253.description: Emails are now automatically analyzed and tagged with contextual metadata, enabling performance metrics to be reported on by email (property) types in the Custom Report Builder.

portal-14008208.title: Lists are now Segments
portal-14008208.description: Lists have been renamed to Segments. Active and static lists are now active and static segments. As we have added more segmentation features, including the ability to segment anonymous website visitors, we want to better reflect the dynamic, AI-powered, and omnichannel capabilities of the new and improved Segments.

portal-14008267.title: Data Enrichment Included for Starter+ Customers
portal-14008267.description: Enrichment for company and contact records is now included, without consuming any credits, in all paid portals with a Starter plan or higher. Eligible users can now enrich records automatically, in bulk, or manually, without consuming HubSpot credits.

portal-14006983.title: Content agents evolution
portal-14006983.description: An evolution from our singular "Content Agent" to multiple specialized content agents. Some existing workflows become embedded AI features, and we’ve added net-new agents available through Breeze Marketplace.

portal-14008390.title: Welcome to the new HubSpot Academy Layout!
portal-14008390.description: HubSpot Academy isn’t just a sidekick anymore—it’s officially part of the HubSpot software. Users needed a seamless way to learn, work, and navigate without toggling between platforms or losing focus.

portal-14008263.title: Renaming Data Enrichment and Buyer Intent (Goodbye to the "Breeze Intelligence" Name)
portal-14008263.description: As of September 3rd at INBOUND 2025, the Breeze Intelligence name will be officially retired. Going forward, you will see this functionality referred to as data enrichment and buyer intent as part of the Smart CRM. All functionality remains intact, with the terminology updated across the platform, UI, and knowledge base articles.

portal-14007179.title: Breeze Marketplace
portal-14007179.description: Breeze Agents & Assistants can now be seamlessly discovered and installed from the HubSpot Marketplace. :

portal-14008483.title: See Signals in a Column in Target Accounts
portal-14008483.description: Sales teams can now instantly identify and prioritize the companies in their Target Accounts that are most likely to respond positively to outreach. By tracking website visits, research activities related to your products, recent funding events, and engagement with marketing materials, your team can quickly uncover prospects demonstrating compelling reasons to connect.

portal-14006744.title: Web Visitor Segments
portal-14006744.description: Web visitor segments help you segment and understand both known and unknown website visitors, enabling personalized content in HubSpot Landing Pages and CTAs. With Web visitor segments, you’ll be able to: Build segments of anonymous and known website visitors..

portal-14006855.title: Shopify Store Performance Agent
portal-14006855.description: We're excited to introduce the Shopify Store Performance Agent, now available in beta for merchants who use the HubSpot-Shopify integration. This Breeze AI agent automatically analyzes Shopify store data synced into HubSpot, surfaces key ecommerce performance metrics, and offers HubSpot-specific recommendations — all in one view.

portal-14008480.title: Prospect Using Buying Signals in Sales Hub
portal-14008480.description: Sales teams can now instantly identify and prioritize the companies in their CRM most likely to respond positively to outreach.
