By tracking website visits, research activities related to your products, recent funding events, and engagement with marketing materials, your team can quickly uncover prospects demonstrating compelling reasons to connect.

portal-14008305.title: Data Enrichment Tab
portal-14008305.description: The new Enrichment tab gives customers a single place to manage enrichment across their CRM. It includes: Data Test: Run a full-portal scan to check enrichment coverage across all companies and contacts in your CRM and review property-level coverage.. Available Enrichment: Preview the enrichment data we have for any list or segment in your CRM, then enrich the entire list with a single click..

portal-14008804.title: CRM Source Citations in Breeze Assistant
portal-14008804.description: With CRM Source Citations in Breeze Assistant, you can now trace responses from Breeze back to their original source in the CRM.

portal-14007590.title: A Reimagined Data Quality Overview
portal-14007590.description: We’re launching a brand new data quality experience in HubSpot—a centralized, redesigned experience that introduces more actionable insights and Quick Actions, making it easier than ever for users to identify and resolve data issues across their CRM.

portal-14006915.title: Use Copilot to Build Workflows
portal-14006915.description: Copilot is now your go to, AI first workflow builder, that makes it easier than ever to create automation for any use case and benefit from the full breadth of HubSpot's workflows tool.

portal-14000486.title: Campaigns Analyze tab
portal-14000486.description: A brand-new Campaigns Analyze tab is now available, providing a clear, centralized view of performance across all campaigns - all in one place. Whether you're reviewing a single campaign, a selected group, or all campaigns at once, the new Analyze tab gives you a fast, unified way to compare results and spot trends - with select reports offering deeper AI-powered insights when you drill in.

portal-14008512.title: Breeze 'Summarize record' workflow action
portal-14008512.description: Introducing the new Breeze 'Summarize record' workflow action.

portal-14006384.title: Data Quality Overview for HubSpot Starter Customers
portal-14006384.description: We’re launching a brand new data quality experience in HubSpot—a centralized, redesigned space that brings together data quality and enrichment into a single, intuitive experience. This update introduces more actionable insights and quick actions, making it easier than ever for users to identify and resolve data issues across their CRM.

portal-14008291.title: Combine and enhance data with the data studio
portal-14008291.description: Data studio brings all your external data together in one experience, where you can sync, combine, and activate customer data from across your tech stack. Build powerful datasets with data from external apps like Google Sheets, Snowflake, and dozens of data sync apps—then activate those datasets in segments, workflows, reports and the CRM with just a few clicks.

portal-14008482.title: Feedback Topics
portal-14008482.description: You can now track themes of customer feedback across feedback surveys, as well as meeting and call transcripts. For each topic you create you can track the comment, number of mentions and sentiment of those mentions across different data sources.

portal-14007184.title: HubSpot MCP Client
portal-14007184.description: The HubSpot MCP Client allows you to customize your Agents in Agent Studio to connect directly to external systems using the Model Context Protocol (MCP). It enables agents to access live data and perform actions across multiple tools using natural language – no cumbersome integrations or coding experience required.

portal-14007101.title: Sales Performance
portal-14007101.description: A centralized space for sales leaders to track team progress and identify opportunities to drive better results. It brings together the scattered tools they use to understand if their reps are on track to meet their goals, with proactive insights and summaries to help them spot patterns in their team’s activity.

portal-14004115.title: Email Deliverability Reporting
portal-14004115.description: A new email deliverability dashboard within email marketing that allows marketing ops teams to better understand their email deliverability performance.

portal-14007085.title: Legal Stuff Update - September 3, 2025
portal-14007085.description: Hello, HubSpot recently updated the Customer Terms of Service. We recommend you take a look at this Community Post for more information. Thanks, HubSpot

portal-14006377.title: Create Custom Rules to Manage Duplicate Records
portal-14006377.description: We’re introducing Custom Rules for Duplicate Identification in the manage duplicates tool. This feature lets users define their own duplicate matching criteria using exact matches on up to three properties—including custom properties—for contacts and companies.

portal-14008876.title: Enable 'Auto-Record' for Zoom meetings via HubSpot
portal-14008876.description: Have you ever forgotten to record an important meeting? The Zoom app for HubSpot now has the ability to enable automatic recording of meetings in Zoom directly from HubSpot. When you turn on "Enable Auto-Recording of Meeting in Zoom" from your integration settings, HubSpot will activate this setting in your Zoom account on your behalf, ensuring all your meetings are recorded without manual interve

portal-14006499.title: Developer Experience Transition [Converting Developer Portals to HubSpot Accounts]
portal-14006499.description: The new HubSpot Developer Platform is now available for all existing public app developers and partners, unlocking free access to the HubSpot CRM, Sales and other Hubs.

portal-14008817.title: Store data in HubSpot as unique, app-specific objects
portal-14008817.description: App objects let certain apps from the HubSpot Marketplace create dedicated CRM objects directly inside your portal. These objects give integration data a structured home in HubSpot, so you can store and act on app-specific data just like contacts, companies, or deals.

portal-14008387.title: New Developer Overview
portal-14008387.description: The HubSpot developer platform has a new dynamic Overview page. This is an evergreen space that will grow and change with developers throughout their HubSpot development journey. Learn more in our documentation.

portal-14008402.title: Timeline events are now App Events!
portal-14008402.description: Timeline events—now App events—allow you to send rich activity data from your tech stack into HubSpot. Previously, these events only appeared on timelines, workflows, and lists, but couldn't be used for reporting or analysis across your tech stack.

portal-14008485.title: HubSpot Developer Platform
portal-14008485.description: The HubSpot Developer Platform is a unified app framework that gives you a modern and consistent way to build on HubSpot, with tools that meet you where you are. Equipped with a growing set of developer tools, a reimagined developer experience, and deeper extensibility, you can confidently create, scalable, AI-ready apps and solutions that are built to grow alongside you.

portal-14006742.title: Breeze Agent Tools on the HubSpot Developer Platform
portal-14006742.description: Introducing Breeze Agent Tools – atomic capabilities in Breeze designed to perform a specific, well-defined task, such as summarizing content, generating outreach copy, or querying CRM data. They serve as the foundational components behind Agents, and enable consistent, customizable, and composable AI in Breeze Studio.

portal-14007584.title: New App Development Onboarding: hs get-started
portal-14007584.description: hs get-started is a guided CLI command that helps you go from zero to a deployed HubSpot app in minutes. It scaffolds a sample app with an app card, walks you through building and deploying, and points you to next steps—all from your local environment.

portal-14008489.title: 2025 Essential Apps for Sales collection
portal-14008489.description: Introducing the 2025 essential apps for sales collection in the HubSpot Marketplace. View the full collection in the HubSpot Marketplace here. 14 apps are featured in this year’s collection for driving smarter sales and better performance, especially when combined with Sales Hub.

portal-14007592.title: New Developer Docs
portal-14007592.description: HubSpot has launched the new Developer Docs, designed to deliver a faster, smarter, and more intuitive documentation experience. Key enhancements include: AI-native documentation that helps you find what you need faster. Enhanced navigation with clearer guides and reference materials. Migration and onboarding tooling for smoother transitions. New UI with dark mode functionality .

portal-14007544.title: Sync to Ads from Segments
portal-14007544.description: Easily activate contact segments across ad networks like LinkedIn, Google, and Facebook right from your segment, unlocking segment creation and activation in one, unified experience.

portal-14008521.title: AI Research Skills in Workflows
portal-14008521.description: You can now research companies with AI directly from workflows with two new AI Skills: Infer company value proposition and ICP. Research company news. Using Infer companue value proposition and ICP will scrape a company's website and output: What the company sells. Their value propisitions. Target Industries. Target Personas.

portal-14007467.title: More Flexibility in Property Field Type Changes
portal-14007467.description: You can now change certain custom property field types even when they're in use on reports, views, or record pages. Specifically, you can: Switch between single-line text and multi-line text. Switch between text (single or multi-line) and URL. Switch from single-select to multi-select.

portal-14008350.title: New Customer Agent Overview
portal-14008350.description: We’ve redesigned the Overview screen in Customer Agent to make it easier to get started and even easier to keep improving once your Agent is up and running.

portal-14007589.title: New Data Source for Smart Properties: Call Transcripts
portal-14007589.description: You can now use call transcripts as a data source for smart properties.

portal-14007126.title: HubSpot connector for Claude: Additional Object Access (Read-Only) and Admin Controls
portal-14007126.description: The HubSpot connector for Claude now supports read-only access to additional CRM objects and their associations. In addition to contacts, companies, deals, tickets, now it can access users, line items, quotes, invoices, orders, carts, products, subscriptions, and object lists.

portal-14007565.title: Object Property Snapshots for Event Data
portal-14007565.description: HubSpot now automatically captures and stores key property values when events occur, giving you historical context for better reporting and attribution.

portal-14006850.title: Third-Party Call Events: Call Started & Call Ended
portal-14006850.description: HubSpot now enables publishing Call Started and Call Ended events for third-party calls. These events are not only logged but can also be leveraged in Journey Analytics and Workflows, making call data actionable across the platform. To ensure these events are published correctly, integrators need to send the following SDK events: incomingCall, callEnded, and finalizeEngagement.

portal-14006736.title: Quick fill an index page view with smart properties
portal-14006736.description: You'll now be able to fill a view when you are creating a smart property, enabling you to more quickly start using your smart properties to fill missing data and gain valuable company insights.

portal-14003771.title: Google Performance Max Ad Creation and Enhanced Reporting
portal-14003771.description: HubSpot users can now create and view more granular reporting on Google Performance Max ad campaigns right from HubSpot.

portal-14007588.title: Smart Properties: Dynamic Variables in Prompts
portal-14007588.description: You can now insert property tokens into your smart property prompts. These tokens let you reference existing property values directly within the prompt.

portal-14006877.title: Respond to Disputes & Chargebacks within Commerce Hub
portal-14006877.description: You can now manage disputed payments directly within Commerce Hub using a new self-service dispute resolution flow, enabling you to respond to chargebacks without leaving HubSpot.

portal-14003301.title: Create Social posts with AI in-app
portal-14003301.description: With the “Create with AI” button, you can create social media posts within seconds. You can fill in any contextual info such as text, URLs, PDFs and this will pull from your content to create posts optimized to each network. You can use your images or have AI generate images as well. These are ready-to-publish posts that keep in mind your brand and social voice.

portal-14007021.title: Add active contact lists to campaigns
portal-14007021.description: You can now add active contact lists to your campaigns - saving time, reducing manual work, and giving you more confidence in how you manage campaign-related contacts.

portal-14004054.title: Default email in help desk
portal-14004054.description: Default email allows admins to set a default email address by team in help desk. For many large multi-team support orgs with many different channels connected to help desk, not having a way to set a default email means that support reps risk accidentally sending from the wrong one, creating confusion for both the rep and their customer.

portal-14007078.title: Information Pop-over for Events and Membership Filters
portal-14007078.description: We’ve added information pop-overs for events and list memberships. These provide helpful context so customers can more easily select the right events and lists, resulting in more accurate segment filters.

portal-14006741.title: New Lists Intro Page with AI Suggestions
portal-14006741.description: The Lists Intro is a centralized experience to help you understand and manage your segments, and uncover new segmentation opportunities with Suggestions. Lists Suggestions analyzes your goals, ideal customers, and target personas, and suggests 3 segments for your consideration.

portal-14007422.title: Create Lead Scores with Total Score Limits up to 10,000
portal-14007422.description: All Lead Scoring customers (both professional and enterprise) can now create lead scores with total score limits up to 10,000. You can select the following options from the total score limit dropdown: 100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 1,000, and 10,000. The increased score limit applies to all types of score (contacts, companies, and deals).

portal-14003661.title: Optimize your social posts (captions and best time to publish)
portal-14003661.description: AI Caption Optimizers: Creating a post across many networks can be very time consuming. The Caption Optimizer gives you in-flow, AI-powered recommendations to improve your copy and make it network specific in just one click. Recommended Times to Post: We use your previous engagement data to suggest top times to publish so you can get the most of your reach!

portal-14006872.title: Domain Settings Improvements
portal-14006872.description: We have made a number of improvements to domain settings management. Below is a short list of some of those changes: Auto-associate new content types to existing domain: When you gain access to a new content type, HubSpot will automatically assign it to an existing primary domain.

portal-14007062.title: Append Buyer Email to Payment Link Redirects
portal-14007062.description: You can now append the buyer's email to your redirect URL in payment links.

portal-14003573.title: Brand Identity Source Attribution
portal-14003573.description: HubSpot now shows you where your brand information comes from across different sources. Your brand information is gathered from multiple sources like Breeze Intelligence, AI Settings, and domain crawls to provide context for AI tools. Now, you can see exactly where each piece of information originates, giving you transparency into your brand data.

portal-14004055.title: AI-Powered Video Marketing
portal-14004055.description: We are introducing a new set of video features that streamline your workflows: publish search-optimized content faster, manage video editing, and measure performance across channels. Combined with our new clip editor, HubSpot is the ultimate destination for your marketing videos.

portal-14006968.title: Breeze Copilot Data Model Configuration
portal-14006968.description: Breeze Copilot can now help you configure your data model and answer questions about best practices. You don't need to worry about knowing all the exact terminology—just explain what you're trying to achieve, and Breeze Copilot will guide you along the way.

portal-14006478.title: Data Model Builder
portal-14006478.description: A new centralized data model configuration space. Within this space, admins can see their objects, create new ones and make association and property decisions in context.

portal-14003682.title: Send Size Preview with exclusion details
portal-14003682.description: Send Size Preview shows an estimated recipient count before you send a marketing email. This feature now includes detailed reasons why contacts won't receive your email, giving you visibility into specific exclusion factors.

portal-14000013.title: HubSpot connector for ChatGPT
portal-14000013.description: We’ve expanded HubSpot’s connector for ChatGPT: now it’s just as good at answering quick, everyday questions as it is at deep research and analysis. We rolled it out first to help with deep research, giving you PhD-level insights from your HubSpot context right in ChatGPT.

portal-13999977.title: Security Contact role in Account & Billing
portal-13999977.description: A super-admin or billing admin can now add a security contact to their portal from Account & Billing.

portal-14006928.title: Understand Lead Scoring Calculations with Improved "Test A Record"
portal-14006928.description: The Test a Record feature in Lead Scoring has been improved to provide customers a clearer view into how their scores are calculated while building a score. Test a Record for contacts, companies, and deals is now more easily discoverable. displays the number of events or contacts that meet rule level criteria.

portal-13997396.title: Multi-language support available for Double Opt In emails
portal-13997396.description: Marketers and Admins can set up their double opt-in experience in multiple languages, if desired.

portal-14006676.title: Today’s Insights Card
portal-14006676.description: The new Today's Insights card in Help Desk workspace shows key trends in rep availability, ticket volume, and team performance. Of note, the new card links directly to the relevant place in Service Hub. For example, an insight about an increase in tickets that didn't meet SLA might link directly to a view of those tickets, enabling leaders to take action to quickly resolve bottlenecks.

portal-14006348.title: Customizable Search Results Display
portal-14006348.description: You can now select and reorder the properties that display on contacts, companies, deals, tickets, and custom objects in your global search results.

portal-14007020.title: Add external social posts to your campaign
portal-14007020.description: You can now add external social posts to your HubSpot campaigns.

portal-14006269.title: Reports List: Grid View
portal-14006269.description: You can now view your reports in a visual grid layout, in addition to the traditional list view. Each report appears as a tile showing key details like title, owner, last updated date, and quick actions, giving you a cleaner, more intuitive way to browse and manage reports.

portal-14004049.title: Faster retrieval of social media comments
portal-14004049.description: You can now see social comments within HubSpot in near real-time, enabling you to more quickly identify, prioritize, and reply to critical social conversations.

portal-13997343.title: App Insights: Portal and Trends Data
portal-13997343.description: App usage Insights provide partners the ability to: 1. Select API operations to view daily, weekly, and monthly trends in usage, based on public APIs 2. Identify top portals and portal usage 3. View Active Installations and Active Installation trends over the past 30 days

portal-14006373.title: Global Number Porting
portal-14006373.description: Porting is the process of transferring a phone number from one carrier to another. HubSpot is expanding the capability to port phone numbers globally to the following countries: United Kingdom (local and mobile). Canada (local). Brazil (local). Australia (local and mobile). New Zealand (local). Netherlands (local). Germany (local). France (local). Denmark (local). Sweden (local). Norway (local).

portal-14003767.title: Customize Inbound Recording Consent Message
portal-14003767.description: You can now completely customize the message that callers hear before they're connected to your reps and teams. This message informs them that their call is being recorded and gives you the opportunity to explain why and how your team uses the recordings.

portal-14001388.title: Edit Brand Information
portal-14001388.description: HubSpot now lets you customize your brand information used in AI tools. HubSpot’s AI tools use brand information to provide helpful context for content creation. This data is automatically gathered from Breeze Intelligence, AI Settings, and domain crawls. Now, you can review and edit this brand information to add your own insights—giving AI an even deeper understanding of your brand.

portal-14006357.title: Remix Google Drive Files
portal-14006357.description: You can now start remix projects directly from Google Drive files. Simply select "Start from a Google Drive file" under the "Blogs, Pages, and Text" category to import your existing documents, content briefs, customer personas, and other materials without copying and pasting or downloading files first.

portal-14003667.title: New Reporting CRM Cards: Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) & Revenue Attribution
portal-14003667.description: We're excited to introduce new CRM Reporting Cards: Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) and Revenue Attribution. These cards provide AI-powered summaries and key data points to help you understand each customer's value and journey, enabling personalized experiences and smarter decisions that drive stronger relationships and long-term loyalty.

portal-14003789.title: Create and View Notes in Help Desk (Replacing Comments)
portal-14003789.description: Support teams can now view, create, and edit notes in Help Desk, replacing comments as the primary means for internal collaboration in Help Desk. Notes are already the building blocks that power internal collaboration across the rest of the HubSpot platform, and now they power collaboration that takes place inside of Help Desk as well!

portal-14004061.title: Multiple Conditions for Rollup Properties
portal-14004061.description: You can now apply multiple conditions to rollup-type calculated properties in HubSpot. This allows you to build smarter, more targeted calculations without relying on complex workarounds or additional workflows.

portal-14006470.title: Updated Limits and Availability for Custom Tabs on CRM Record Pages
portal-14006470.description: All HubSpot customers now have access to 10 custom tabs on CRM record pages.

portal-14003662.title: Average NPS Rating and Customer Satisfaction Score CRM Cards
portal-14003662.description: Two new CRM reporting cards integrate directly into Company and Contact record pages, displaying average Net Promoter Score (NPS) ratings and Customer Satisfaction (CSAT) scores from HubSpot feedback survey responses.

portal-13999680.title: Enhancement: Template Selection in Landing Pages
portal-13999680.description: We've streamlined the landing page creation flow to make it easier and faster to create high-quality content.

portal-13992229.title: Additional details returned when generating OAuth access tokens
portal-13992229.description: We’re updating the response body for POST requests to the OAuth token endpoint: https://api.hubapi.com/oauth/v1/token Two new fields will be included in the response: hub_id. scopes. These fields mirror what’s already available via the GET request to: https://api.hubapi.com/oauth/v1/access-tokens/:token More information about these and related APIs is available in our reference documentation

portal-14004173.title: Help Desk Views Customization Experience and Improvements
portal-14004173.description: This set of updates unlocks more ways to customize and manage the views sidebar in the help desk. Via the new Views Customization page in Settings, you can now: Have complete visibility over the views in help desk, including private views. Manage sharing for default and custom views. Set a homepage view. Be notified when the portal is encroaching on custom view limits.

portal-13999380.title: Manage Video Captions in Social Editor
portal-13999380.description: You now have access to a Manage Captions button when adding a video in the social editor. This new capability lets you easily view, edit, and translate video captions—all directly within your social publishing workflow.

portal-14006230.title: View All Properties in a Side Panel
portal-14006230.description: The View All Properties page now opens as a side panel that slides in from the right-hand side, allowing you to access property information without navigating away from your current page.

portal-13996250.title: Marketplace Listing Editor Infrastructure Upgrade & Language Flexibility
portal-13996250.description: We're upgrading our listing editor's core infrastructure to deliver a smoother, more efficient experience when submitting new product types and features. You'll notice some minor visual updates to the current interface as we roll this out. We're also breaking down language barriers.

portal-14003570.title: Mirroring Company Data Across Multi-Management Accounts
portal-14003570.description: The Multi-Account Management data mirroring feature now supports mirroring the company object in addition to the contact object. When enabled, if a company exists in each HubSpot account, specific data from the company record in the source account will be visible in the company record of the destination account.

portal-13999862.title: Sunsetting Pop Up Forms
portal-13999862.description: Pop-up forms allow users to create modal-based lead capture forms that appear on their website based on predefined triggers (e.g., exit intent, scroll percentage, time delay). They have been a long-standing feature for lead generation, and have historically been available to all hubs and tiers. However, new customers will no longer be able to create pop-up forms.

portal-14000092.title: Sunset Email performance chart on Email Analyze
portal-14000092.description: We’re removing the email performance scatterplot chart from Email Analytics. This chart previously showed individual sent emails plotted against open and click performance metrics and is now being deprecated to streamline reporting across the platform.

portal-14003806.title: Job title in Contact Data Enrichment
portal-14003806.description: In addition to the role, sub-role, and seniority information that Breeze Intelligence previously provided, we now provide the job title as well. This will help you personalize your outreach better than ever before.

portal-13999867.title: Unified campaign and CRM tasks
portal-13999867.description: Customers now have access to a unified task system in HubSpot. This means all tasks whether created in Marketing Hub tools (like Campaigns or the Marketing Calendar) or from CRM tools, now live in a single, centralised location. Tasks can be created anywhere and now all appear in the CRM > Tasks listing page.

portal-14001346.title: Healthy / Unhealthy Lists in Email Health
portal-14001346.description: You can now view a new report within the Email Health dashboard to surface the healthiest and unhealthiest performing recipient lists based on key engagement and delivery metrics.

portal-14003596.title: Close Date Automation for Services
portal-14003596.description: Close date automation is now available for service records. When you move a service to a closed stage in any service pipeline, the close date automatically sets to today's date.

portal-14003761.title: Bidirectional associations sync for Salesforce Tickets, Tasks, and custom objects
portal-14003761.description: HubSpot's integration with Salesforce already supports syncing object associations for standard Contacts, Companies and Deals. Today, we're rolling out bidirectional syncing of associations for Tickets, Tasks and custom objects to all Salesforce integration customers.

portal-14003811.title: Citations in Smart Properties
portal-14003811.description: Smart Properties now include citations that show where AI agents found data, the reasoning behind decisions, and the sources used for that data.

portal-14004063.title: Match social profiles to existing CRM Contacts
portal-14004063.description: You can now search your CRM Contacts from the Social Inbox to identify Contacts to match a social profile to. Previously you could only create new Contacts from the Social Inbox.

portal-14000361.title: Send form submissions from excluded IP and referrers to spam
portal-14000361.description: With this update, all form submissions from excluded IPs and referrers will be treated as spam and will be sent to the spam submissions tool. As a result, these submissions would not have any impact on the CRM data. This would ensure consistency between the CRM data and web analytics.

portal-14003798.title: Commerce User Permissions Settings
portal-14003798.description: You can now manage access to quotes, products, billing, and payments through Commerce permissions within Users and Teams. These settings were previously part of Sales permissions.

portal-14003580.title: Call from other devices using the Call Remote
portal-14003580.description: Users can now use the call remote to make calls using an external device or the HubSpot mobile app.

portal-14003778.title: AI-Powered Recommendations in Automation Overview
portal-14003778.description: You can now see AI-powered automation suggestions based on how your team uses HubSpot directly on the Automation Overview page. These recommendations help you discover impactful automations that are relevant to your actual portal activity.

portal-13997369.title: Ticket Routing Engine: Update to Balanced distribution and Active call assignment
portal-13997369.description: Update to Balanced Distribution in Help desk The current balanced distribution model considers all open tickets assigned to target users and assigns to the user with the least amount of open tickets. This evaluation counts all tickets as equal, but not all tickets have the same response expectations.

portal-13959202.title: Analyze Tabs for Website Pages and Landing Pages
portal-13959202.description: The website and landing pages 'Analyze' tabs give you a holistic overview of page effectiveness through a number of different reports for website pages and landing pages. On website pages: Page views. Activity feed timeline. Session bounce rate, average duration, and page view totals by source. Website page performance with page views and CTA (Legacy) actions.

portal-14003385.title: New Forms Editor: Reset Link Support
portal-14003385.description: When forms are pre-populated with known visitor data, it can lead to confusion or incorrect submissions, especially on shared devices or when users switch accounts. This feature helps ensure that the right person is submitting the form and that you’re capturing clean, accurate data.

portal-14004022.title: Assign Customer Agent to Email
portal-14004022.description: Businesses can now assign the Customer Agent to their Email accounts, streamlining support and lightening the load on human agents. For more information on the existing capabilities of the Customer Agent, check out our knowledge base article or stay updated with the latest features on our wiki.

portal-14003696.title: Improved International Phone Number Formatting in Personalization Tokens
portal-14003696.description: Phone number properties inserted as personalization tokens now display in a clearer international format with country code, area code, and number separated. Before: +15551112222 After: +1 555-111-2222

portal-14001286.title: Board view for customer tab in Customer Success Workspace
portal-14001286.description: You can now view your customers in a board view (in addition to a list view) in the Customer Success Workspace.

portal-14003756.title: Rename HubSpot Defined Objects
portal-14003756.description: Admins can now configure the term they'd like to use in lieu of the HubSpot default for a particular object. For example, you might label deals as "opportunities." Once configured, "opportunities" will then be reflected across most HubSpot tools.

portal-14003525.title: A smarter Campaign Goals experience
portal-14003525.description: Introducing the Campaign Goals Tracker - a smarter way to set, track, and report on your campaigns! A redesigned and more sophisticated goal-setting, management, and reporting experience is available now.

portal-14003586.title: New HubSpot Numbers Available in Nordics, France, Spain, and more!
portal-14003586.description: HubSpot phone number acquisition is now available in additional countries! Nordics = Norway, Sweden, Denmark, Iceland. France. Spain. Australia (mobile. Portugal (mobile). Poland (mobile). Chile (local). Israel (local + mobile). Philippines (local). Puerto Rico (local). Kenya (local). Austria (mobile). Indonesia (local). Panama (local).

portal-14003578.title: Configurable action rate limits on custom code actions and webhook actions
portal-14003578.description: Introducing configurable rate limits for the custom code and webhook actions in workflows! This feature is an elegant, native solution that gives you more control over how quickly these actions should execute. ** Note that using any actions with configurable rate limits will consequently also impact all of the following actions in the workflow as well. **

portal-14000170.title: AI-Generated Invoice Emails
portal-14000170.description: Generate professional invoice email drafts automatically using AI. Each email includes relevant invoice context tailored to your customer.

portal-14000414.title: HubSpot connector for Claude
portal-14000414.description: HubSpot is the first CRM to launch a connector for Claude, introducing a new way to combine the power of HubSpot and Claude for personalized AI insights. By bringing Claude’s advanced reasoning together with your HubSpot context, you’ll receive responses tailored to your unique business needs.

portal-14000004.title: App Certification Lifecycle Status & Renewal Update
portal-14000004.description: This update introduces enhanced visual indicators for App Certification statuses in the developer portal, aligned with the new recertification policy. Under this policy, certified apps must renew their certification every two years to maintain their status.

portal-13978363.title: Migrate your existing knowledge base onto the new suite of customization tools
portal-13978363.description: Our previous release "Customization tools for new knowledge bases" required that users start from scratch to take advantage of new customization features. With this update, we offer an easy path for existing customers to migrate their legacy knowledge base to the new platform! NOTE: This release is only applicable to customers that have legacy knowledge bases to migrate to the new tools.

portal-13999974.title: Start Campaigns with AI
portal-13999974.description: We have deprioritized the 'Start with AI' beta feature as of today. This means the feature is no longer available as an option when creating new campaigns inside of the Campaigns tool. Your feedback has been invaluable in shaping what comes next: a faster, more connected campaign-building experience.

portal-14003329.title: The Customer Agent is now 2X smarter
portal-14003329.description: The Customer Agent now has enhanced reasoning skills that bring it even closer to human-level problem solving. It’s not just about answering questions anymore, it’s about truly understanding and strategizing to get the best results for your customers.

portal-13999979.title: File Manager Grid View
portal-13999979.description: You can now browse files in a visual, thumbnail-based layout, making finding the right assets faster and more intuitive. Switch between list and grid views to manage your files in the way that works best for you.

portal-14001381.title: Add Associations to Deals Table in Sales Workspace
portal-14001381.description: You can now add columns for several types of associations in the Sales Workspace deals table. Get insight into the associations tied to your deals at a glance, including: Quotes. Contacts. Companies. Deals. Tasks. Emails. Meetings. Notes. Invoices. Products.

portal-13997266.title: Sunset Ticket Sentiment Company Property
portal-13997266.description: We are sunsetting the ticket sentiment property on the company object. This property aggregated ticket sentiment from all messages on open tickets associated with the company and any tickets opened in the last 7 days. The property displays the current aggregated ticket sentiment as a number.

portal-14000010.title: Time-based Rollup Property Filtering
portal-14000010.description: You can now use "'time since" and "time until" calculated properties as filter conditions in rollup properties to create time-based calculations.

portal-14001317.title: Customize your Support Team display in the Customer Portal
portal-14001317.description: You can now choose how your support team (Ticket Owners) is displayed in the Customer Portal. By default, we display first names, and now you have more control. New display options include: First name (default). Last name. Full name (automatically adjusts name order based on your region). Custom alias (great for branded support teams) .

portal-13999649.title: “On a call” indicator & Team and sticky filters in Availability Management
portal-13999649.description: When assigning in the Help desk, it is now possible to see if the target user is on an active phone call. Additionally, in Availability Management, a new team filter has been added and the last selected filters will remain active after a page refresh or when navigating away and then returning to the Availability Management page.

portal-13993271.title: Summarize CTA data with AI
portal-13993271.description: You can now generate a summary of your CTA's performance insights with AI. Using Copilot, HubSpot will provide a concise summary of key performance metrics and suggest actionable ways to improve the results of your CTA.

portal-13999970.title: Enhancements to Options Formatting in Property Export File
portal-13999970.description: Property options now display in a simplified, easily readable format in the property export file.

portal-13999967.title: Property Export File Now Includes Last Updated Time and Source
portal-13999967.description: Property export files now include two new columns: Last Updated Time (timestamp of most recent change) and Update Source (method used to update the property, such as manual edit, API, or import).

portal-13997270.title: Draft Health Scores and Cloning Health Scores
portal-13997270.description: You can now have draft health scores beyond the existing health score limits allowing users to play with changes and experiment without impacting existing scores. Users will also be able to clone health score profiles to make iteration and evolution of scores easier.

portal-14000002.title: Orders now in global navigation
portal-14000002.description: You can now access the Orders object directly from the Global Navigation bar under the Commerce tab.

portal-13999202.title: Validate and Format Phone Number Workflow Action
portal-13999202.description: You can now clean phone numbers automatically and in bulk using a dedicated workflow action that formats them to the E.164 international standard.

portal-13997335.title: Invoice Features Available to All Customers: Automatic Reminders, Shipping Address, and Custom Presets
portal-13997335.description: Automatic email reminders, custom presets, and the shipping address field are now available to all customers—not just those using HubSpot payments or Stripe payment processing in Commerce Hub.

portal-13986207.title: Organize emails exactly how you want: Folders return to Marketing Hub
portal-13986207.description: We're excited to announce the return of email folders in Marketing Hub, now with enhanced consistency! You can now organize your marketing emails in the same intuitive way you're used to with your workflow and list tools.

portal-13999993.title: Export from Descript
portal-13999993.description: You now have the ability to export videos directly from Descript into HubSpot, streamlining your workflows across content creation and marketing distribution.

portal-13999816.title: Create Campaign and List Calculated Properties
portal-13999816.description: You can now create calculated properties for Campaign and List objects. These properties automatically compute values based on data from other fields using custom formulas.

portal-13999973.title: Mobile Inbound Calling
portal-13999973.description: Answer incoming calls to your HubSpot numbers directly from the mobile app. See who's calling with full contact preview, manage call recording, and automatically log everything to your CRM. When you miss a call, get instant push notifications with direct voicemail access. This delivers complete calling functionality across desktop and mobile.

portal-13999988.title: Updates to knowledge base article management
portal-13999988.description: Version history: Users will now be able to view and restore previous versions of a knowledge base article. Scheduled publishing: You can edit an individual knowledge base article and manually schedule updates to go live on a specific date and time. You can also schedule when you'd like to unpublish a knowledge base article.

portal-13999980.title: Add Deal Collaborators from a Workflow & via API
portal-13999980.description: You can now set and update Deal Collaborators directly through Workflows and the CRM API. This lets teams automate collaborator assignments based on deal criteria like region, stage, or owner — no manual updates or workarounds required.

portal-13999782.title: IP-derived Visitor Country Segmentation in Buyer Intent
portal-13999782.description: Ready to know where your visitors are visiting from? You can now filter and segment companies based on the country their website visits originate from. This means you're no longer limited to a company's headquarters, but rather the actual IP-based location of the visitors showing interest in your business.

portal-13993293.title: Conditional display logic on all CRM cards, locations, and tabs
portal-13993293.description: Super Admins can now control which CRM cards and tabs are visible based on property values across all CRM locations — including the middle column tabs, right sidebar, and left sidebar of record pages.

portal-13999978.title: Website Tracking Code: Verify Installation
portal-13999978.description: You now have access to a new validation tool in the Tracking Code settings page that allows you to test if your HubSpot tracking code is correctly embedded on your website. Simply enter your URL, click test, and get notified of results when validation completes—either success confirmation or diagnostic guidance for next steps.

portal-13990271.title: Lists - Filter by Used In channel
portal-13990271.description: You can now easily identify and filter Lists on the List Index page based on how Lists are used and activated across HubSpot!

portal-13999920.title: Target Accounts Home Revamp - Integrated Account Research & Account Sourcing
portal-13999920.description: The new Target Accounts home helps sales and marketing teams implement an effective account-based strategy without the complexity and resource intensity that typically comes with it. Teams can now prioritize high-value accounts, research them efficiently, and coordinate engagement all from one central place.

portal-13999998.title: New Customer Agent Navigation
portal-13999998.description: We’ve updated the navigation of Customer Agent to make it simpler and more intuitive to manage, optimize, and assess your agent. The new structure features three streamlined sections: OverviewManagePerformance

portal-13999809.title: Full Inbound Calling Support for Aircall Customers
portal-13999809.description: If you’re using Aircall in HubSpot, you can now receive inbound calls anywhere within HubSpot and navigate around while on live calls.

portal-13997365.title: Association Limit Increase
portal-13997365.description: Association limits for paid accounts have increased from 50,000 to 100,000 records per association type. You can now associate up to 100,000 contacts to a single company or 100,000 deals to a single contact across many common object pairs.

portal-13999969.title: Duplicate File Notification and Removal
portal-13999969.description: File deduplication helps users avoid uploading the same file multiple times. When you attempt to upload a file that already exists in your HubSpot portal, a modal will appear to notify you. From there, you can choose to: Keep the existing file. Upload the duplicate anyway. Insert the existing file . This feature is available in the File Manager Dashboard and the File Picker.

portal-13984269.title: Reporting for Sends and Replies of 1:1 emails without tracking
portal-13984269.description: Reply and Send events will now be created for emails that are logged but not tracked.

portal-13997403.title: HubSpot Payments Available in the United Kingdom
portal-13997403.description: HubSpot payments is now available to customers in the United Kingdom! Now you can collect online payments directly within HubSpot, alongside your customer data, with lower fees and dedicated support.

portal-13999368.title: Video Library
portal-13999368.description: You now have access to a dedicated video library, designed to simplify and centralize your video content workflows. Unlike the general files manager, this new app focuses exclusively on video, allowing for streamlined browsing, editing, and organizing of video assets.

portal-13997349.title: Never Log overrides existing Contacts for Inbox and Help Desk email
portal-13997349.description: Previously, if a team email address sent a message to a recipient on the Never Log list, an email activity would not be created unless a Contact already existed that matches the excluded email address. Going forward, an email engagement will not be created even if a Contact matches the excluded email address.

portal-13999412.title: Multiple Pipeline Support for Buyer Intent
portal-13999412.description: If you use buyer intent and have multiple pipelines set up in HubSpot, this one's for you! You can now access deal stages from all of your created pipelines—both as part of your visitors and research tab filters, and to generate intent criteria recommendations.

portal-13999707.title: Unify Buyer Insights in Your Deal Records with the Trumpet App for HubSpot
portal-13999707.description: The improved trumpet app for HubSpot now unifies buyer insights from trumpet's personalized digital sales rooms (Pods) directly in your HubSpot deal records. New enhancements include: A new HubSpot app card showcasing key buyer engagement data and stakeholder intent data from trumpet Pods..

portal-13999650.title: Appointment name property required for record creation
portal-13999650.description: The appointment name field is now required when creating appointment records in HubSpot. This ensures all appointments have a descriptive name to help with identification and organization.

portal-13997321.title: Smart Properties: Bulk Actions
portal-13997321.description: Smart properties can now be filled in with data in much larger ways -- allowing you to fill entire lists or filtered views in a click, filling your CRM with smart data much easier.

portal-13999594.title: Association configuration changes are included in the Audit Log
portal-13999594.description: You can now view changes to association configurations in the Audit Log for the following events: A new association configuration is created. An existing association configuration is deleted. An association label is changed. An association limit is changed.

portal-13997346.title: Basic Record Cloning
portal-13997346.description: Introducing record cloning, users can now create a new record based on an existing record. Any of the properties and associations that are configured in the create form of the object may be included in the new record.

portal-13999588.title: Switch to HubSpot Payments from Stripe Payment Processing
portal-13999588.description: Commerce Hub customers using Stripe payment processing can now easily switch to HubSpot payments right from within Payments Account settings.

portal-13997290.title: Time Frame Update for Visitor Intent
portal-13997290.description: We're rolling out an update to help us help you focus on companies with the freshest, most actionable visitor intent. This will involve removing time frame options longer than 90 days from the Visitors tab filters and your intent criteria configuration.

portal-13999378.title: Manually Score Deals and Companies with Sales Hub
portal-13999378.description: You can now manually score deals and companies using the Lead Scoring app with Sales Hub Professional or Enterprise.

portal-13997401.title: HubSpot Payments Available in Canada
portal-13997401.description: HubSpot payments is now available to customers in Canada! Now you can collect online payments directly within HubSpot, alongside your customer data, with lower fees and dedicated support.

portal-13999305.title: Gain deeper insights into your Help Desk Summary Tab metrics
portal-13999305.description: Metrics on the Help Desk Summary Tab now link directly to relevant Help Desk views.

portal-13999300.title: Delta Changes on the Help Desk Summary Tab
portal-13999300.description: We’re excited to announce the new time comparison feature on the Help Desk Summary Tab. This update introduces delta changes for all relevant metrics, enabling you to see day-over-day performance shifts at a glance.

portal-13993259.title: Undo/Redo Buttons added in the Social Composer
portal-13993259.description: We're adding Undo/Redo buttons in the Social Composer that lets marketers easily correct mistakes or revert changes made directly within their post visuals—like tweaking text, adding emojis, or performing repetitive tasks—without starting over. It brings familiar content editing behavior to the social post workflow.

portal-13996226.title: URL property
portal-13996226.description: You'll now be able to create a new type of property to store URLs.

portal-13997300.title: Send DNS Setup Records for Web Content to a Colleague
portal-13997300.description: You can now send a DNS setup link to your IT team or webmaster to configure your DNS records for HubSpot.

portal-13997384.title: Share Feedback on Betas
portal-13997384.description: Admins can now submit feedback for betas they're enrolled in as well as Live updates (for up to 30 days) from the Product Updates page.

portal-13997354.title: Enhanced Deals Sidebar Experience
portal-13997354.description: The new deals sidebar provides sales representatives with critical deal context in a two-column layout within the sales workspace, helping them progress deals more efficiently.

portal-13997367.title: Book meetings from the schedule tab in the sales workspace
portal-13997367.description: Book meetings directly from the schedule tab in the Sales Workspace.

portal-13997363.title: Campaigns API improvements: Feature expansion & new endpoints (additions/capabilities)
portal-13997363.description: Today, we're also launching new functionalities to the Campaigns Public API that significantly expand its capabilities: Expanded asset type support: Support for 11 additional asset types including sequences, meeting events, playbooks, feedback surveys, and more.. Campaign budget management: New endpoints for complete CRUD operations on campaign budgets..

portal-13997362.title: Campaigns API improvements: Scope enhancement & property deprecation
portal-13997362.description: Today, we're introducing two key updates to the Campaigns Public API: Enhanced scope requirements: Introduction of granular permission control with the new marketing.campaigns.write scope group for modification operations.. Property deprecation: Complete removal of the deprecated hs_goal property from API responses..

portal-13995253.title: Syncing events with data sync
portal-13995253.description: With this update, Data Sync is expanding its capabilities to include one-way syncing of events directly into HubSpot, beginning with Aircall & ActiveCampaign. Over time, we’ll add event syncing for more apps!

portal-13997203.title: SEPA Direct Debit
portal-13997203.description: With SEPA (Single Euro Payments Area) direct debit, HubSpot customers across Europe can now conveniently pay for their subscriptions directly using their bank accounts.

portal-13997347.title: Edit Email Conversation History in Help Desk and Inbox
portal-13997347.description: The history of an email conversation is now visible and editable when composing a reply in the Help Desk or Inbox.

portal-13996217.title: Configure Activity Association Defaults for Additional Objects
portal-13996217.description: We launched configurable automatic associations for activities and records for some CRM objects in 2024. This feature gave admins the flexibility and control to fine-tune their activity logging defaults to match the business's unique needs. This update extends this functionality to include additional CRM objects: Listing, Courses, Appointments, and Services.

portal-13997323.title: Access the AI-powered video marketing app from pages
portal-13997323.description: We’ve expanded access to the AI-powered video marketing app—you can now use it directly in landing pages. This makes it easier for you to optimize videos for SEO, track performance, and manage multilingual content all in one place. Key capabilities now available in landing pages include: AI-powered metadata optimization: Auto-generate SEO titles, descriptions, and keywords for faster publishing..

portal-13997240.title: Easier, Faster Ways to Add Knowledge to Your Customer Agent
portal-13997240.description: We’ve just released a set of improvements to make it easier for you to add knowledge to your HubSpot Customer Agent. You can now: Upload or import DOCX, PPT, CSV, JSON, and XML files as knowledge sources. . Keep the Add Content side panel open so you can add multiple files more easily. . Add public URLs directly from the side panel in fewer clicks and crawl up to 1000 pages. .

portal-13995225.title: Create multi-select User properties
portal-13995225.description: You can now create HubSpot User properties that are multi-select, enabling you to add multiple record owners in a single property.

portal-13997356.title: Security Settings Redesign
portal-13997356.description: The Security page in Settings is getting a full makeover. The new page will be divided into three tabs—Login, Permissions, and Sensitive Data—allowing users to configure login settings, view permissions-related security insights (e.g. Automated Inactive User Deactivation), and manage sensitive data for their account. The Security Health checklist still exists!

portal-13997315.title: Change or Disconnect Properties on Forms
portal-13997315.description: We’re introducing the ability to disconnect a field from a CRM property or change the connected property directly, without having to delete and recreate the field. This enhancement gives users more control and flexibility when managing forms.

portal-13997294.title: Apply company branding to invoices
portal-13997294.description: New invoices now automatically reflect your company's branding. The "Pay Now" and "Download" buttons will now use your brand colors - something that wasn't customizable before.

portal-13997341.title: Custom and default Net Payment Terms on Invoices
portal-13997341.description: Net payment terms define the time window between when an invoice is issued and when payment is due. With this update, invoice users can create custom payment terms and select one as the default.

portal-13997325.title: Combined Scores Available for Marketing Hub Professional
portal-13997325.description: Combined scores for contacts and companies are now available for Marketing Hub Professional customers.

portal-13996205.title: Export tickets in the Customer Portal
portal-13996205.description: Visitors in the customer portal will now see an Export to CSV button above the ticket listing table. With one click, customers can download the tickets currently shown in the table as a .csv file, making it easier than ever to work with their ticket data.

portal-13996202.title: Design Changes in the Customer Portal
portal-13996202.description: We recently made several behind-the-scenes improvements to the Customer Portal that translate into a sleeker experience for your customers. This upgrade also modernizes the portal’s look on the client side. In addition, we’re simplifying the Customer Portal Theme Editor by removing some outdated and unused design options.

portal-13997313.title: Sign Up for 1-Month AI Video Generation Experiment
portal-13997313.description: You could be among the first 50 people to experience the future of video creation with our new AI video generation alpha, powered by Google's VEO 3. This exclusive one-month experiment runs from mid-July to August, giving you early access to generate English-only videos in 16:9 ratio that are 8 seconds long with audio. You'll be able to generate up to 15 videos during the month.

portal-13997301.title: Set up and customize your Customer Portal in minutes!
portal-13997301.description: Setting up your Customer Portal just got a whole lot easier. We’ve redesigned the Customer Portal Settings page to guide you through activation and setup in just four steps. The settings page has clearer instructions and smarter defaults to help you navigate your set-up much faster, so you can go from "getting started" to "fully customized" in minutes.

portal-13993326.title: Thumbnails for PDFs in File Manager
portal-13993326.description: Now you can preview your PDF's first page directly within the file's details panel. Quickly identify documents at a glance without opening each file, saving time and making file management more visual.

portal-13997221.title: Health Score Builder
portal-13997221.description: Health score is a new tool that gives customers the ability to assign points to properties and activities across HubSpot and roll them up to a score on the company, contact or custom object record.

portal-13997307.title: Customize HubSpot marketing emails with Most Viewed Shopify products
portal-13997307.description: The Shopify app now offers the ability to pull in the most viewed products from your Shopify store into your HubSpot marketing emails. This new option allows you to easily identify and showcase the most popular products viewed by your customers, so you can boost your ecommerce sales.

portal-13997306.title: Customize HubSpot marketing emails with Recently Viewed Shopify products
portal-13997306.description: Now you can use the Shopify app to pull contacts' recently viewed products from your Shopify store into your HubSpot marketing emails. This new option allows you to easily identify and showcase products that your customers have recently explored, helping to re-engage them and boost sales.

portal-13997222.title: Restrict access to a single account
portal-13997222.description: This security feature allows admins to prevent users on their account from being added to additional accounts.

portal-13997248.title: Create more types of properties from the CRM index page
portal-13997248.description: You can now create the following types of properties from the CRM index page: datedatetimefileuserrich textIf you're enrolled in the URL property beta, you'll also be able to create URL properties from the index page.

portal-13996228.title: Updated Calling Remote
portal-13996228.description: The calling remote is a fast and easy way to make calls anywhere in the CRM. Now you can take notes and set call outcomes and types - all without leaving your call.

portal-13996247.title: Invoice PDFs in Payment Receipt Emails
portal-13996247.description: Invoice PDFs are now automatically attached to payment receipt emails sent to your buyers. This streamlines record-keeping and enhances transparency in the payment process.

portal-13992236.title: Improved Card Library for CRM Customization
portal-13992236.description: To improve the CRM card management experience, the new Card Library provides a more engaging interface for discovering, previewing, creating, and adding cards. The redesigned "Add card" button is now placed between cards for a more contextual experience, decreasing the time needed to rearrange card order.

portal-13996270.title: CRM Summaries - Mobile Copilot on Android
portal-13996270.description: Sales reps are constantly moving between meetings, calls, and emails. To help them stay prepared and take quick action, CRM Summaries deliver concise, AI-generated insights directly within the mobile app for Deals, Contacts, and Companies.

portal-13993285.title: Sales Workspace Daily Digest Email
portal-13993285.description: : A daily morning email that highlights the most important sales actions for the day. :

portal-13997242.title: Faster Email Client Testing
portal-13997242.description: Preview your emails instantly within a new UI across 100+ email clients including Gmail, Outlook, and Apple Mail before you hit send.

portal-13997276.title: Scale Email and Form scoring with "Contains" in Scoring Apps
portal-13997276.description: You can now use the "contains" filter to specify which marketing emails (including within Marketing Campaigns) and forms are included in your scoring rules for both Lead and Health Scoring. :

portal-13997273.title: AI-generated CRM Index Views
portal-13997273.description: As of June 25, 2025, we’ll be sunsetting this feature.

portal-13996258.title: Send Video Transcripts to Facebook
portal-13996258.description: You can now automatically add captions to your social videos using AI-generated captions or by uploading your own. HubSpot will include these captions when posting videos to Facebook, improving accessibility and engagement.

portal-13996259.title: Associate Ads to HubSpot Campaigns from the Ads tool
portal-13996259.description: HubSpot users can now associate their ad campaigns with a HubSpot campaign directly from the ads tool. Read more about HubSpot campaigns here: https://www.hubspot.com/products/marketing/campaigns

portal-13995271.title: Export workflow enrollments into lists
portal-13995271.description: Customers can now export their workflow enrollment data into static lists from workflows on-canvas enrollment history panel.

portal-13996244.title: View Permission for Buyer Intent
portal-13996244.description: Get more granular control over who sees buyer intent with a new dedicated View permission. Previously, you could only control who could edit buyer intent configurations.

portal-13997212.title: Add Customer Agent to Rule-Based Chatflows
portal-13997212.description: You can now add your Customer Agent as an action within Rule-Based Chatflows. This gives you more control over exactly when and how your AI-powered Customer Agent steps into customer conversations.

portal-13996241.title: Custom Times and “Prevent Skip” for Forms/CTAs Now in Professional
portal-13996241.description: Marketing Hub, Service Hub, CMS Hub, and Content Hub Professional customers can now set custom timestamps for when CTAs and forms appear on your HubSpot-hosted videos. You can now choose to prevent viewers from skipping ahead, which was previously limited to Enterprise plans.

portal-13996277.title: Sticky tabs for CRM records
portal-13996277.description: You now have a smoother way to navigate your CRM records. The tab bar will now stay fixed to the top of the screen as you scroll, making it easier to stay oriented and switch between tabs in longer records. 🔍 What’s changing? The tab bar stays visible at the top while you scroll. Only the content below the tab bar scrolls. A subtle shadow indicates more content is available above/below.

portal-13997215.title: Dismiss Knowledge Gaps Topics & Messages
portal-13997215.description: When customer agent replies to a visitor with "I don't know," it groups those messages into Knowledge Gap topics so you can easily see where your agent needs further training. Now, you can dismiss entire topics or individual messages within a topic once they’ve been resolved or are no longer useful. This helps you: Keep your workspace clean and focused.

portal-13994232.title: Breeze Suggested Properties in Report Filters
portal-13994232.description: When creating advanced filters in Reports, Breeze will suggest relevant properties based on similarity to your search, usage of the property in your CRM, and the property's fill rate among other things.

portal-13996252.title: Update to Appointment Object
portal-13996252.description: We've added a new property, "appointment name", to the appointment object. This property has been backfilled with the current primary display property, "appointment start" and has been added as an optional field on the appointment record form.

portal-13996237.title: Copy Call Transcript to Clipboard
portal-13996237.description: Click one button to copy the entire call transcript to a clipboard.

portal-13996233.title: The new Breeze Copilot beta is here
portal-13996233.description: The completely rebuilt Breeze Copilot beta starts now. Built from the ground up with cutting-edge AI technology, it delivers smarter conversations, advanced planning capabilities, and deeper insights from your HubSpot data. This update includes powerful new features: Ask detailed, multi-layered questions. Get more accurate, nuanced answers.

portal-13996265.title: Big Boosts to Your Customer Agent's Response Quality
portal-13996265.description: We’ve made significant improvements to the Customer Agent to help it deliver faster, clearer, and more accurate answers.

portal-13986212.title: Introducing email restore and management capabilities
portal-13986212.description: Portal admins can now view, restore, and permanently delete previously deleted marketing emails directly within HubSpot. You'll also see exactly who deleted each email and when, giving you complete visibility into your email assets.

portal-13995259.title: Automatically Add Video Captions to YouTube
portal-13995259.description: You can now automatically add captions to videos you post on YouTube from HubSpot.

portal-13993273.title: Rich Text Formatting for Labels and Data Privacy Text
portal-13993273.description: You can now apply rich text formatting, bold, italic, underline, hyperlink, and colour to labels and help text. Additionally, bold, italic, underline, and hyperlink formatting are now supported in data privacy text.

portal-13995255.title: Automatically Send Video Captions to X (formerly Twitter)
portal-13995255.description: You can now automatically add captions to your social videos using AI-generated captions or by uploading your own. HubSpot will include these captions when posting videos to X (formerly Twitter), improving accessibility and engagement.

portal-13993244.title: Property fill rate now included in 'Export all properties'
portal-13993244.description: Property fill rate will now be shown as a column in the property export file.

portal-13995231.title: Automatically Enhance Prompts for AI-Powered Landing Pages
portal-13995231.description: You can now sharpen your landing page descriptions with help from the content agent. Just click "Enhance" to turn a rough idea into a more detailed, high-impact prompt—so your final page is more on point from the start.

portal-13995233.title: Add Additional Context for AI-Powered Landing Pages
portal-13995233.description: You can now provide additional details when using the content agent to create landing pages for Showcase products and Run an event and collect signups purposes.

portal-13995243.title: Elevate Multi-Language Support
portal-13995243.description: You can now add a multi-language switcher to websites built with the Elevate theme.

portal-13996207.title: Active Installs in Marketplace Analytics
portal-13996207.description: An active installs report is now available under Marketplace Analytics in your Partner Portal.

portal-13993345.title: Updated Commerce Hub Payments API
portal-13993345.description: The Commerce Hub payments API now enables customers, developers, and app partners to programmatically create and manage payment data in the CRM. Previously, only a read-only API was supported.

portal-13993257.title: Making Hashtag management easier: New Hashtag Bank in the Social Editor
portal-13993257.description: We're introducing a Hashtag bank in the Social composer that: Helps marketers save and use repeated hashtags for the future. Helps filter through hashtags and quickly add / remove them . Auto-detects and pre-selects hashtags already in the post. NEW: Saves capitalizations of hashtags as well .

portal-13993335.title: Average Email Open Rate and Click Through Rate for Lists
portal-13993335.description: Easily identify top-performing and underperforming lists based on key email metrics: open rate and click through rate.

portal-13994218.title: Sync custom lifecycle stages with Facebook ads for better targeting
portal-13994218.description: You can now sync your custom lifecycle stages from HubSpot directly to Facebook's Conversions API, giving Facebook more precise data about your prospects to optimize ad targeting. This enhancement builds on our existing Facebook integration by allowing you to track and optimize around the specific customer journey stages that matter most to your business.

portal-13994212.title: Podcast slide-in CTA template
portal-13994212.description: Create website promotions for your podcast using HubSpot's podcast CTA template. Grow your audience by surfacing podcast episodes anywhere on your website.

portal-13968218.title: Sunsetting Subscriptions Resub API
portal-13968218.description: The resub API beta is being sunset. Anyone using the resub API endpoints will need to fully move to our new Subscriptions API v4 before June 2, 2025 where they can subscribe previously unsubscribed contacts as well as enjoy -- Ability to subscribe/unsubscribe contact(s) from one or some subscription types. . Ability to set unsubscribe from all email communication..

portal-13993334.title: View Marketing Event History with the New Registrant Card in Contact Records
portal-13993334.description: Access marketing event participant information directly in your contact records with the new registrant CRM card. View a complete, centralized history of each contact's event participation right where you need it. This functionality is compatible with integrations that utilize the events object, such as Microsoft Teams, Zoom, EventBrite, GoToWebinar, etc.

portal-13994238.title: [iOS] Conditional properties and required associations when creating Contacts & Companies
portal-13994238.description: Conditional properties and required associations recently rolled out for all objects excluding Contacts & Companies. With this launch, we are extending the functionality to Contacts & Companies, as well as making other changes to the record create form on iOS.

portal-13993240.title: Backfilling AI descriptions for all workflows
portal-13993240.description: : We're now automatically generating AI descriptions for all existing workflows that lack them, and will continue to auto-generate descriptions for new workflows going forward.

portal-13995239.title: Browse & Search Knowledge Base in the Widget
portal-13995239.description: : We've upgraded our chat widget with a new Help tab that gives users direct access to the knowledge base—no more jumping to external websites for answers

portal-13995241.title: Temporarily Pause Breeze Customer Agent
portal-13995241.description: Customers can now pause Customer Agent with a single click. This temporarily stops the agent from being assigned to new conversations on any connected channel—without completely unassigning the agent.

portal-13993317.title: Chargeback and Dispute Visibility for Payments
portal-13993317.description: When you receive a payment dispute from your buyer, you will now get notifications at every stage of the dispute process and can view detailed information directly within the payment.

portal-13990261.title: [Android] Conditional properties on Deals, Tickets & Custom objects
portal-13990261.description: Android users will see conditional properties that admins have configured on Deals, Tickets & Custom objects. Admins want to ensure that the right information is collected when records are created. Some businesses have complex data collection logic, conditional properties helps simplify record creation for the end-user by showing properties only when they’re needed and now that is also enabled on

portal-13993315.title: HubSpot Home Page
portal-13993315.description: HubSpot Home is a personalized, smart, and relevant navigation and discovery experience to help you use HubSpot to its full potential. As marketers, sales reps, admins, or analysts we are distracted, working on multiple things at once, and bombarded with team requests all calling for our attention.

portal-13995217.title: HubSpot deep research connector
portal-13995217.description: HubSpot is the first CRM to launch a deep research connector with ChatGPT. The new HubSpot deep research connector lets you apply powerful, doctorate-level research capabilities to your own customer data from HubSpot.

portal-13995207.title: Smart Frequency Suggestions and Score 'Event Not Occurred' in Scoring Apps
portal-13995207.description: For both Lead and Health Scoring, you can now leverage smart suggestions to build comprehensive frequency rules, ensuring all occurrences are covered when scoring an event. Additionally, you can now allocate points when an event has not occurred (occurred 0 times).

portal-13994220.title: Predictive Insights & Time in Ticket Status Reporting on the Help Desk Analyze Tab
portal-13994220.description: Every report on the Help Desk Analyze Tab is now equipped with new AI predictions and outlier identification. The brand new "time in ticket stage" report has also been added to the Help Desk Analyze Tab.

portal-13994236.title: Filter Tickets by Associated Contact and Company in Help Desk
portal-13994236.description: There are now advanced filters for Associated Contact and Associated Company, accessible via all 3 help desk layouts. These can also be added as quick filters to the table and board layouts.

portal-13993247.title: Control editing access for specific pipeline stages: Tickets & Custom Objects
portal-13993247.description: Super admins can now manage who can edit ticket and custom object records at specific stages of a pipeline. When a stage is marked as restricted, editing access can be limited to super admins or granted to selected users and teams.

portal-13993303.title: Sales Workspace Dashboards
portal-13993303.description: Custom sales dashboards can now be embedded directly within the sales workspace, allowing teams to view key metrics without leaving their workflow.

portal-13994216.title: Deal Metrics Customization
portal-13994216.description: The Deals index page now offers a customizable data well.

portal-13995209.title: Customize Guided Actions
portal-13995209.description: Admins can now customize guided actions by toggling them on/off, adjusting trigger timeframes, and modifying suggested actions.

portal-13993339.title: Multiple Intent Criteria for Buyer Intent
portal-13993339.description: Say goodbye to a one-size-fits-all visitor intent criteria. You can now create up to 10 unique visitor intent criteria, giving you the flexibility to define different criteria for different markets, intent levels, brands, and more!

portal-13985226.title: Service Hub seat required for Feedback Surveys
portal-13985226.description: Starting May 15, 2025, a paid Service Hub seat will be required to create, edit, or publish Feedback Surveys and response tags. Free and core seat users will retain access to reporting. A 30-day grace period begins on April 15, 2025.

portal-13993336.title: Multiple Domain Support for Buyer Intent
portal-13993336.description: Have multiple websites set up in HubSpot—and want to know who's visiting what site? Wonder no more! We've added multiple domain support to buyer intent, so you can now see and segment visitor activity by full URL. Previously, you could only see and filter by page paths (e.g. /pricing). Now, you'll be able to do the same with full domain (e.g. hubspot.com/pricing).

portal-13993295.title: A new Monday.com data sync app
portal-13993295.description: This new data sync app mirrors the comprehensive integration capabilities found in our 100+ data sync apps, which automate the synchronization of data fields and objects across platforms, reducing manual work and ensuring data consistency.

portal-13993203.title: AI-Generated Captions & Caption Translations
portal-13993203.description: Create accessible, globally relevant content in seconds with two powerful new video capabilities: Automatic subtitles in your video's original language. Instant translations of those subtitles into multiple languages (view supported languages).

portal-13993340.title: Auto-add Backfill for Buyer Intent
portal-13993340.description: With our existing auto-add feature, you can automatically add companies that enter your saved views to your CRM, lists, or workflows. This is a powerful way to automate engagement with companies as they show intent. Now with auto-add backfill, you can also add companies that already exist in your saved views to those same destinations.

portal-13993232.title: Native Table Reports on iOS
portal-13993232.description: Now, Table reports on iOS are fully native. This means that the display of information on the dashboard is improved, without text appearing cut-off. Tap targets are larger, making it easier to sort columns and follow links to open records. And finally, Table reports on mobile now follow your device's dark mode setting.

portal-13993225.title: Updates to Stored Payment Method on Checkout Page
portal-13993225.description: We updated the checkout page to create a simplified checkout experience for your buyers. Previously, your buyer would need to check a checkbox on the checkout page to consent to storing their payment method.

portal-13994228.title: Breeze Customer Agent: Now Available Across All Pro+ Hubs
portal-13994228.description: We’re expanding Breeze Customer Agent beyond Service Hub—making it available across all Pro+ Portals starting today.
