Now, Marketing, Sales, and Service can deliver 24/7 AI-powered support across the entire customer journey. It’s the same agent already resolving over 50% of conversations—now available to more teams, in more places.

portal-13993312.title: Schedule automatic exchange rate updates
portal-13993312.description: You can now automate exchange rate updates for your currencies in HubSpot. Schedule updates monthly, quarterly, or annually--eliminating manual work and ensuring accuracy.

portal-13994215.title: Legal Stuff Update - June 2, 2025
portal-13994215.description: Hello, HubSpot recently updated the Customer Terms of Service

portal-13993305.title: Shopify app update: Ecommerce customer CRM card
portal-13993305.description: The Shopify Data Sync app for HubSpot has been updated with a new Shopify CRM card that provides a comprehensive, unified view of your Ecommerce customers. You can now see total orders, average order value, product views, and sales trends directly under the overview tab in the middle column of a contact record in HubSpot.

portal-13993267.title: Automated Inactive User Deactivation
portal-13993267.description: Automated Inactive User Deactivation is an automation that removes inactive users on a monthly basis.

portal-13994208.title: HubSpot Hosted Domains now available for Customer Portal
portal-13994208.description: You can now set up your customer portal using a HubSpot-hosted domain. Configuring an external domain during activation is no longer a requirement. Previously, this created unnecessary setup complexity and caused many customers to get stuck during initial onboarding. That's no longer the case.

portal-13993320.title: HubL Function Limit Enforcement in Marketing Email
portal-13993320.description: Starting May 28th, 2025, we will begin to enforce the CMS HubL limits for all customers using the functions listed below in their Marketing Emails in accordance with our Software Products, Packaging, and Limits: blog_authors. blog_by_id. blog_popular_posts. blog_post_archive_url. blog_recent_author_posts. blog_recent_posts. blog_recent_tag_posts. blog_total_post_count. content_by_id.

portal-13993236.title: Audit Logs for Customer Agent Actions
portal-13993236.description: Users can now see audit logs when a Customer Agent Action is created, deleted, updated, published, or unpublished.

portal-13993327.title: Email Editor: Improved Tab Navigation
portal-13993327.description: Starting Thursday, the 10th of April 2025, we will be rolling out a reorganised tab structure within the Marketing Email Editor. By moving features into more intuitive categories, this change aims to improve the findability and discoverability of key tools and settings. This will ultimately lead to a more efficient and user-friendly email creation experience.

portal-13992226.title: Chat Queue for In App Help
portal-13992226.description: We're introducing a new chat queue system for In App Help.

portal-13990269.title: Commerce Analytics Suite
portal-13990269.description: Commerce Analytics Suite is a new reporting suite that makes it faster and easier than ever to track invoice, subscription, and payments data. Now, you can view your sales reports alongside your commerce reports to get a full picture of your business. Specific reports include: Invoices: Aging summary. Balance due. Billed vs. actual revenue. Invoice status.

portal-13993230.title: App Marketplace Analytics: Enhanced Data & Export for Pageviews by Domain
portal-13993230.description: As HubSpot continues to release more information about individual app performance on the App Marketplace, new datapoints are available, including pageviews by domain.

portal-13993251.title: Lists Quick Action - use in Email and use in List
portal-13993251.description: The 'Use In' actions menu inside any list lets you quickly gain insights or take action on your HubSpot list. There are two, new quick actions: 1. Use in Email: takes you directly to an email draft or a new email with your list already attached. 2. Use in Lists: automatically applies your list as a filter in a new list so you can further expand or refine your segment.

portal-13993291.title: Sunsetting AI Data Source: Marketing Goals
portal-13993291.description: We have sunset the AI Data Source, "Marketing Goals." The AI Agents that were using this source will no longer be able to retrieve this context when generating a response.

portal-13993288.title: Bring Your Brand Voice to Your Customer Agent
portal-13993288.description: You can now configure your Customer Agent to use your existing Brand Voice in HubSpot. With this update, your AI-powered Customer Agent will mirror the tone, style, and personality of your brand—ensuring every customer interaction feels consistent and on-brand.

portal-13990247.title: AI-powered Data Model Recommendations
portal-13990247.description: Breeze, HubSpot’s suite of AI tools, now offers personalized recommendations to make setting up HubSpot easier and encourage deeper platform use. We use the information we have about your business to create a customized set of simple configuration suggestions.

portal-13992247.title: Email Digests for Research Intent
portal-13992247.description: In-market accounts, right in your reps' inboxes. You can now set up weekly and monthly email digests for research intent as part of the research intent public beta. These digests will notify you of high-fit companies that are researching topics relevant to your business.

portal-13993221.title: Lists on Mobile
portal-13993221.description: Marketers can now access their lists directly from the HubSpot Mobile App, which is available for iOS and Android devices! This feature allows you to check your lists anytime and anywhere. Managing lists is crucial for marketers, as it enables them to reach out directly to contacts, send automated communications, and perform other functions. Let’s take a closer look at this feature!

portal-13992240.title: Next Meetings & Last Activity Columns in the Deals Table of the Sales Workspace
portal-13992240.description: These are two new columns in the Sales Workspace deals tab designed to improve visibility into deal engagement: Next Meeting shows the next upcoming scheduled meeting tied to a deal.. Last Activity shows the most recent engagement (like a completed task, call, or meeting) on the deal..

portal-13993249.title: [Android] Conditional properties and required associations when creating Contacts & Companies
portal-13993249.description: Conditional properties and required associations recently rolled out for all objects excluding Contacts & Companies. With this launch, we are extending the functionality to Contacts & Companies, as well as making other changes to the record create form on Android.

portal-13993255.title: Action Requested: Update custom object type API calls by June 4
portal-13993255.description: On June 4, 2025, we are removing the undocumented support for requesting custom object types by their base name (GET/crm/v3/objects/{baseName}) in HubSpot’s public APIs. After that date, custom object types must be referenced by their unique identifier (object type ID, fully qualified name, or short-hand custom object type name) to ensure clarity and consistency in API interactions.

portal-13993205.title: Video Chapter Editing
portal-13993205.description: You can now manually customize AI-generated video chapters for content uploaded to YouTube or embedded on your websites

portal-13993234.title: AI Report Insights on Mobile
portal-13993234.description: Now, mobile users can generate AI-powered Insights on their reports.

portal-13993214.title: Search Workflows by Descriptions
portal-13993214.description: Customers can now search for workflows using keywords from the workflow descriptions directly in the search bar on the workflows listing page.

portal-13990257.title: Certification Tracking made easy with the new My Team Dashboard!
portal-13990257.description: Introducing the redesigned 'My Team' page – a one-stop shop for tracking credentials, monitoring team achievements, and streamlining HubSpot onboarding. Key updates include improved filtering, at-a-glance insights, and enhanced usability to simplify team management and maximize HubSpot expertise.

portal-13988259.title: Convert Static Lists to Active Lists
portal-13988259.description: You can now convert static lists to active lists while keeping the list ID and references intact!

portal-13988248.title: Realtime AI-powered duplicate checks for contacts and companies
portal-13988248.description: Realtime AI-powered duplicate checks automatically scans for new duplicate contacts and companies consistently and shows potential matches to merge within the manage duplicates tool.

portal-13992239.title: URL Partitioning for Shareable Forms in the new Forms Editor
portal-13992239.description: We’re introducing an improvement to the way HubSpot generates shareable form URLs in the new forms editor, designed to optimize performance and improve long-term reliability. With this update: New Form links are now generated using portal-specific subdomains. Each link is uniquely tied to the account that created it.

portal-13992216.title: Improved Video Clip Transcript Editing
portal-13992216.description: Your video transcript editing experience is now even easier to use with text-to-clip editing and a cleaner visual experience with fewer distractions: You can now either trim or select highlighted text as a clip, saving time when working with long videos.. The permanent highlight in the transcript editor has been removed to create a cleaner visual experience..

portal-13993207.title: Make Verification Optional for Quote E-Signatures
portal-13993207.description: You can now make e-sign email verification optional, simplifying the signing process for your buyers.

portal-13988252.title: Sunset Email Revenue Chart & Closed Deals Associated with Legacy Shopify Integration
portal-13988252.description: We have removed the ability to view revenue data on Emails from the legacy Shopify integration including viewing the Revenue chart and Closed Deals recipient filter within the Email Recipients tab.

portal-13992211.title: Enroll in HubSpot Payments from the App Marketplace
portal-13992211.description: HubSpot payments is now available in the App Marketplace! You can quickly learn about HubSpot payments functionality and pricing, and start enrollment directly from the marketplace.

portal-13990232.title: Bulk archive now available for properties used in assets that don't prevent archiving
portal-13990232.description: You'll now be able to bulk archive properties that are used in assets that don't prevent archiving. For example, if there are a set of properties that are used only in index page views, you can bulk archive them rather than individually archiving each property.

portal-13985243.title: New Modern Marketing Email Templates
portal-13985243.description: Get ready for a major upgrade to your marketing emails. With this rollout, you will gain access to a variety of modern, high-quality responsive email templates designed for common email marketing use cases including newsletters, webinars, product announcements, event invitations, and promotions.

portal-13987237.title: Filter record timelines by subscription status updates
portal-13987237.description: You can now filter a contact's record timeline specifically for communication subscription status changes across all messaging channels. We've consolidated these events into a dedicated filter, making them easier to find and analyze.

portal-13988216.title: Phone number property validations and auto-formatting
portal-13988216.description: You’ll now be able to set validation rules for phone number properties. Additionally, you will be able to set a default country code for phone number properties that will automatically be applied to updates to phone numbers via Import and manual data entry.

portal-13990228.title: [iOS] Conditional properties on Deals, Tickets & Custom objects
portal-13990228.description: Admins want to ensure that the right information is collected when records are created. Some businesses have complex data collection logic, conditional properties helps simplify record creation for the end-user by showing properties only when they’re needed. iOS users will now see conditional properties that their portal admins have configured on Deals, Tickets & Custom objects.

portal-13992202.title: NEW "Ticket Owner" and "Requested by" columns in Customer Portal
portal-13992202.description: We’re rolling out three updates to the ticket listing table: Removed the Ticket ID Column To reduce noise, we removed the Ticket ID column. This column was not valuable to customer portal visitors. . Added the Ticket Owner Column Visitors can now see which agent or rep on your team owns the ticket, giving them clarity on who is responsible for helping them. .

portal-13988243.title: Data Enrichment Update to Settings
portal-13988243.description: : We’ve made updates to your Data Enrichment settings to give you more control over how your credits are used and to simplify your settings management experience

portal-13990242.title: New Elevate Landing Page Sections
portal-13990242.description: You can now access 13 new landing page sections in the Elevate theme, giving you more design options to create compelling, conversion-focused pages.

portal-13990239.title: Enroll records in workflows from a CRM card
portal-13990239.description: You can now trigger workflows directly from a CRM card! In Hubspot today, sales and service professionals are performing a variety of repetitive tasks every day which is preventing them from focusing on high-impact work like talking to customers and driving sales.

portal-13988253.title: Boost Video SEO Performance with Structured Data
portal-13988253.description: Video structured data is now available for your video content. This new feature automatically adds SEO-optimizing metadata to your video pages, making them more visible to search engines and improving indexing.

portal-13980242.title: Stage-Calculated Properties
portal-13980242.description: Introducing stage-calculated properties for the service object similar to what we already have for deals, tickets and leads.

portal-13978253.title: Build Lists and Lead Scores using SMS Events
portal-13978253.description: You can now use SMS events* (e.g., sent, delivered, clicked, etc) to build Lists and Lead Scores! Lists: Lead Scores: *An SMS add-on is required: https://knowledge.hubspot.com/sms/create-and-send-sms-messages

portal-13988213.title: Automatically format property data at the point of entry
portal-13988213.description: You can now automatically format your data as it enters the CRM - ensuring that your data is clean, formatted, and valid. This formatting will apply when users edit properties manually or import into properties. This can help you, for example: Automatically remove letters from Postal Code. Automatically remove special characters from City .

portal-13990230.title: Filter Dataset-Based Reports Directly on Dashboards
portal-13990230.description: Reports made from datasets can now be filtered on dashboards. You can now narrow your data without leaving the dashboard.

portal-13988224.title: Language Auto-translation of Primary App Listing Changes
portal-13988224.description: It is now possible to auto-translate changes to app listings, so ongoing updates made by app partners automatically reflect in all languages for that listing.

portal-13990236.title: Choose whether your Customer Agent hands-off or stays assigned
portal-13990236.description: We’re introducing a new way to customize how your Customer Agent responds when it can’t answer an inquiry or when a user requests a human agent. You can now choose between two handoff behaviors: Handoff to a human agent – Your customer agent will handoff to a human agent based on their availability hours.

portal-13984226.title: Only Forecastable Revenue Goals Will Appear in Forecasting
portal-13984226.description: We’re updating the revenue goal creation process to provide more clarity about which goals appear in the forecasting app. There are two templates for revenue goals in HubSpot: “Forecastable Revenue,” which is designed for use in sales forecasting, and “Revenue,” which supports additional goal cadence and pipeline customization options that are not always compatible with forecasting.

portal-13987248.title: Today’s Insights Feed
portal-13987248.description: Today's Insights Feed is a new feature designed to streamline access and consumption of Service Hub data. It enables leaders of support teams to monitor operational health with a holistic view, bringing together multiple data points into a single, centralized location.

portal-13988208.title: New Card: Ticket priority on the Help Desk Summary Tab
portal-13988208.description: On your Help Desk Summary Tab you can now review your most important tickets through the new tickets by priority card.

portal-13988207.title: New card: Message Analytics in the Help Desk Summary Tab
portal-13988207.description: You can now monitor operational health of your Help Desk by reviewing message analytics right in your Help Desk Summary Tab. These new analytics are designed to empower leaders of support teams with actionable data, driving better decision-making and enhancing our overall support operations.

portal-13970206.title: Enhanced datetime property in Marketing Email
portal-13970206.description: Starting April 16th, 2025, any datetime properties created in your HubSpot CRM now display both date AND time when used as personalization tokens in Marketing Hub emails.

portal-13988202.title: Default Account Selection
portal-13988202.description: With Default Account Selection, you can now select which account will be the default account that will be opened when you log in to HubSpot.

portal-13986206.title: Email AI Translations Now Available to Marketing Hub Pro+
portal-13986206.description: Email AI Translations is a feature that allows you to quickly and easily create email content in multiple languages using AI, powered by DeepL. This feature streamlines your communication workflow, saving you time and reducing the manual effort involved in translation. With support for 31 languages through DeepL, you can ensure consistent and accurate translations.

portal-13987222.title: Identify SMS failures with SMS Error Reporting
portal-13987222.description: New SMS Error reporting charts now show you exactly why messages fail to send or deliver. Access comprehensive breakdowns of error types and volumes both in SMS analytics and on individual message pages, giving you more insights for improved deliverability.

portal-13987223.title: Enrich Contacts and Companies within the import flow
portal-13987223.description: Users will now have the option to enrich contacts and companies directly within the import flow. Previously, the option to enrich your data could only be done across all your records, or manually on already existing records within the CRM.

portal-13988239.title: Sequences Reporting Advancements
portal-13988239.description: Enhanced analytics for sales sequences that provide detailed step performance metrics and cross-sequence trend analysis to help sales teams measure and optimize their outreach effectiveness.

portal-13970210.title: Enhanced datetime property in SMS
portal-13970210.description: Starting April 16th, 2025, any datetime properties created in your HubSpot CRM now display both date AND time when used as personalization tokens in your SMS messages.

portal-13987214.title: Clip Editor
portal-13987214.description: Introducing HubSpot's Clip Editor! Upload your longer videos and create short-form clips that you can publish into your social media, websites, emails, and more. Simplified Clip Editing Easily create great content clip-by-clip with a simple and user-friendly editing experience. Customize & Style Add captions, branding, and logos into your clips!

portal-13985281.title: Drill down into KPI reports on iOS & Android
portal-13985281.description: Now, you can tap on values in "KPI" chart types on Android & iOS to see a table listing all the individual data points that make up that value.

portal-13979202.title: Simplified Video Limit Management
portal-13979202.description: When you upload videos to your HubSpot account, advanced features are now turned off by default, and are automatically enabling only when you insert them into content. This prevents unnecessary usage of advanced features, eliminates manual toggling, and streamlines your video management.

portal-13985248.title: Property Information in Filters
portal-13985248.description: We're introducing Property Insights in Filters to provide customers with helpful context. This will help them select the right properties to create accurate filters.

portal-13984361.title: CRM customization in-line card previews
portal-13984361.description: The CRM has been enhanced to improve customization usability, based on customer feedback. A new real-time preview feature now appears alongside the edit panel, allowing you to instantly view changes as you edit and configure cards.

portal-13985274.title: Intelligence Tab for Contacts
portal-13985274.description: We’ve added the Intelligence Tab to Contact records—bringing the power of Breeze Intelligence directly to your contacts. This feature gives you helpful context about the contact and highlights when additional enrichment data is available. With a single click, you can enrich your contact records—making high-quality data readily accessible.

portal-13985286.title: Button Alignment Options for Forms
portal-13985286.description: We’ve added button alignment controls, giving users the ability to align form buttons to the left, center, or right, directly within the editor. Choose the alignment that best fits your page layout or design standards . Create cleaner, more consistent forms that match your brand . Works on both single-step and multi-step forms .

portal-13988204.title: Associate CSAT to Contact Object
portal-13988204.description: Last CSAT survey rating, comment, and date are now available on the Contact object.

portal-13987229.title: Sort by Associated Company and Contact in Tasks Tab
portal-13987229.description: We’re making it easier to stay organized in the Sales Workspace. You can now sort your tasks by company or contact association, making it simpler to group related work and stay focused on the accounts and relationships that matter most.

portal-13987210.title: Connected email analytics rates in Custom Report Builder
portal-13987210.description: Connected email analytics metrics that track open, click, and reply rates for 1:1 emails in the custom report builder.

portal-13984289.title: Social Reply on Mobile
portal-13984289.description: Marketers can now manage and respond to their social media interactions directly from their HubSpot Mobile App (iOS and Android)! Keep all your interactions in one place. This feature allows you to stay engaged with your audience and maintain your brand presence on the go. Let’s dive deep into this feature!

portal-13987226.title: Streamlined Install Flow for New Apps in the Marketplace
portal-13987226.description: HubSpot is standardizing the app install flow, so users go through a consistent and predictable install experience regardless of they app they are installing from the App Marketplace. Starting on April 23, 2025, this change applies to all newly created app listings.

portal-13984292.title: Sharing Credit Card details in Checkout
portal-13984292.description: This rollout enhances the checkout experience by allowing stored credit card details to be shared between super admins and billing admins. Previously, only the user who initially added the credit card could see it during checkout. What is Changing?With this update, stored credit card details will now be accessible to all super admins and billing admins in checkout.

portal-13986232.title: Print tickets in help desk
portal-13986232.description: Customers can now print the conversations associated to help desk tickets. To print the conversation on a help desk ticket: Click the "actions" button in the top right hand corner of the ticket. Select "print conversation". A new browser tab will open where you can select your printer, formatting options, layout, etc..

portal-13984313.title: Bell Notifications - sidebar redesign
portal-13984313.description: The sidebar will now open by default on the “unread” notifications, so you can focus first on the notifications you haven’t seen. This allows for bulk actions to be surfaced more clearly by displaying a checkbox next to each message. Additionally, a more compact design for each notification allows about 4 times more notifications in the same space, reducing the amount of scrolling.

portal-13985228.title: New data sources in workflows
portal-13985228.description: Data sources in workflows are getting an upgrade. You can now use data sources that are sets of multiple associated records and also add data sources of records from the CRM based on property logic, not associations.

portal-13984260.title: Mobile Calendar Connect
portal-13984260.description: Mobile users can now connect their third-party calendars (Google Calendar, Outlook, or Office 365) directly to HubSpot through the mobile application.

portal-13985256.title: Enrich Company Properties in the Missing Data App
portal-13985256.description: Introducing data enrichment capabilities for companies in your missing data tool, enabling you to automatically fill gaps in your records using trusted external data sources. This powerful addition transforms the missing data tool from a visibility solution into an active data completion engine.

portal-13985266.title: Create New List from Index Pages
portal-13985266.description: You can now create a new static List directly from index pages, for example Contacts, Companies, Deals, Tickets, and more.

portal-13985231.title: Permanently delete unused and unfilled properties
portal-13985231.description: There's now one less step in data model cleanup. You can now permanently delete properties with 0% fill rate and 0 usages without first needing to archive the property.

portal-13984346.title: Commerce Hub Product Updates on Overview
portal-13984346.description: It's now easier than ever to stay up-to-date on the latest Commerce Hub releases! Now, when you visit Commerce Overview, you'll see an "announcements" section on the page that includes all Commerce Hub-related product updates.

portal-13987208.title: Multiple one-time discounts on Invoices
portal-13987208.description: Previously, invoices only allowed one discount to be applied. Now, users can add multiple discounts.

portal-13985297.title: Property History Exports Now Only Include Records Who Have Historically Had a Value for That Property
portal-13985297.description: Property history exports will now only contain the records that have a value for the property you are exporting.

portal-13985293.title: Clarification to Allow/Deny List Behavior for Inbox & Help Desk
portal-13985293.description: We have clarified the behavior for the Allow/Deny List for the case in which an email address/its domain appears in both the Allow and Deny List.

portal-13985272.title: Change the name of your export
portal-13985272.description: You can now edit the name of your CRM exports.

portal-13980225.title: Brand Identity
portal-13980225.description: With brand identity, your brand’s key features — like voice, tone, visual style, mission, and competitive insights — are pulled from your existing content automatically. That context is used to inform AI-generated content across customer touch points, helping your brand stay effortlessly consistent as you scale.

portal-13985284.title: Hidden Fields in Logic & Redirects
portal-13985284.description: We’re expanding the power of conditional logic and redirects by introducing support for hidden fields as trigger criteria. With this update, you can now: Use Hidden Fields in Conditional Logic Dynamically show or hide fields. And skip steps based on hidden values like a campaign ID, persona, or page source.

portal-13985313.title: Publish App Reviews with AI-Generated Titles
portal-13985313.description: In the HubSpot App Marketplace, customers can now generate app review titles using AI to speed up the process of leaving a review.

portal-13985265.title: New name, home, and limits for target markets
portal-13985265.description: We've updated how you manage target markets! They are now simply called "markets" and have a new, centralized home within your account's master settings. Previously, setting up and managing target markets happened within the configuration tab of buyer intent. To ensure optimal performance, we're also introducing a limit of 20 markets.

portal-13985279.title: Layout Settings in Help Desk
portal-13985279.description: New Help Desk layout setting options and usability improvements are available to help support teams navigate smoothly around the workspace and be more efficient as they troubleshoot, respond, and resolve their tickets. This release includes three updates: Layout settings: support reps can now choose a default layout between table, split, and board views to suit their working preferences.

portal-13982256.title: Property Control in Record Merges
portal-13982256.description: You can now select which properties will be retained on the final record when merging records, giving you unprecedented control over your data consolidation process.

portal-13985251.title: Add a meeting calendar to CTAs
portal-13985251.description: You can now add a meeting calendar to CTAs and include a scheduling experience right inside of your popup. Instead of sending visitors to another tab or screen, they can now pick a time directly from the CTA. This helps reduce drop-off and makes it easier to convert high-intent leads.

portal-13984323.title: Build lists using document events
portal-13984323.description: You can now use document events (e.g., viewed, shared, finished viewing) to build lists.

portal-13984231.title: Trigger Feedback by Ticket Stages
portal-13984231.description: This feature allows customers to: ✔ Select specific open and closed ticket statuses for survey triggers. ✔ Ensure surveys are sent at the right moment, improving response relevance. If a survey is set to trigger at multiple closed stages, it will only be sent at the first closed stage the ticket reaches. Impact ✔ More accurate feedback by triggering surveys only at meaningful stages.

portal-13975215.title: Introducing: Academy Profiles
portal-13975215.description: HubSpot Academy is excited to announce a new profile that will house all of your achievements, certifications, and badges you earn on Academy! You can now easily locate and share your accomplishments with your teammates, all in one place.

portal-13984319.title: Updated Content Remix Homepage and Manage Screens
portal-13984319.description: With the new content remix homepage experience, you can easily keep track of and manage the remixes you've recently created, as well as your custom remix templates.

portal-13984335.title: Unique value enforcement for custom phone number properties
portal-13984335.description: You can now apply unique value enforcement to custom phone number properties.

portal-13985211.title: Essential Apps for Marketers 2025
portal-13985211.description: We've updated our collection of essential apps for marketers in the HubSpot App Marketplace, highlighting recommended apps for Content Hub and Marketing Hub. These apps aid marketing efforts by helping you create standout content, reach new audiences across channels, and unify your tech stack.

portal-13985213.title: Essential Apps for Service 2025
portal-13985213.description: We've expanded our collection of essential apps for customer service in the HubSpot App Marketplace. When used with Service Hub, these apps help you scale support, unify customer conversations, and drive retention, so you can focus on delivering customer value.

portal-13984283.title: Add records to lists from actions dropdown
portal-13984283.description: You can now add records to static lists from the actions dropdown from within a list!

portal-13978326.title: Increased Video Limits
portal-13978326.description: We’ve increased video limits for Content Hub users: Content Hub Professional:150 hosted videos (up from 50). Content Hub Enterprise: 500 hosted videos (up from 50). Additionally, we've increased the number of videos included with the video add-on: CMS Hub, Content Hub, Marketing Hub, and Service Hub (Professional and Enterprise editions): 50 additional videos (up from 10).

portal-13984347.title: Conversational Enrichment for Email
portal-13984347.description: Conversational Enrichment for Email As part of the HubSpot Spring Spotlight, we’re launching Conversational Enrichment for Email, an AI-powered feature that helps teams automatically capture and enrich contact and sales data from unstructured email conversations.

portal-13982322.title: Marketplace Apps can connect messaging channels to Help Desk
portal-13982322.description: It is easier than ever to add more 1:1 messaging channels to Help Desk and provide customer support across channels like SMS, Instagram, Telegram, LINE, WhatsApp, and Slack. Click here to discover which marketplace apps can do this via a new HubSpot API, with more integrations on the way.

portal-13984256.title: Legal Stuff Update - April 10, 2025
portal-13984256.description: Hello, HubSpot recently updated the Customer Terms of Service

portal-13984307.title: Updated Call Summaries
portal-13984307.description: This update expands call summaries to provide additional insight for recorded & transcribed calls in HubSpot.

portal-13982320.title: Custom Channels API for unified messaging channels
portal-13982320.description: The Custom Channels API allows you to integrate any text-based messaging channel with HubSpot's Help Desk and Conversations Inbox, mirroring the functionality of existing integrations like Facebook Messenger, WhatsApp, and SMS. Examples include LINE, Telegram, WeChat, Viber, Apple Business Messages, industry-specific channels, or proprietary options.

portal-13982295.title: Meetings index page and custom meeting properties
portal-13982295.description: : A centralized location to access and manage all meetings in HubSpot with support for custom properties to enhance reporting capabilities.

portal-13984341.title: New Jira App Powered by Data Sync
portal-13984341.description: You can now connect your support and development teams with our new Jira app. This app provides automated two-way sync between your HubSpot tickets and Jira issues, as well as ticket notes and issue comments. And when combined with Operations Hub Starter, you can create custom field mappings to tailor the app to your organization's needs.

portal-13985207.title: Guided Execution of Activities in the Sales Workspace
portal-13985207.description: We redesigned the experience for completing sales activities in the sales workspace, guiding sales reps to execute on their tasks more effectively by surfacing only the relevant context needed in a streamlined view.

portal-13985209.title: App Marketplace Q1 roundup: 95+ new & 60+ updated apps
portal-13985209.description: 95+ new apps — including Google Chat, which allows you to get notifications and collaborate on customer tickets and messages — have joined the HubSpot App Marketplace. Additionally, 60+ apps were recently updated with new features, including: Facebook Messenger integration is now compatible with Customer Agent, streamlining Messenger conversation management in HubSpot..

portal-13982294.title: Expanded Multi-Currency Support for Payments in Commerce Hub
portal-13982294.description: Meet customers in their currency with expanded multi-currency support in Commerce Hub. You can now sell in 130+ global currencies through HubSpot payments and Stripe payment processing, enabling you to charge buyers in their preferred local currency.

portal-13984304.title: Improved AI-powered Gibberish detection for form submissions
portal-13984304.description: AI-powered gibberish detection now identifies incoming form submissions with gibberish data across all text fields, not just first name, last name, and message properties. This ensures a more comprehensive spam filtering process.

portal-13985215.title: Add end time to Countdown CTAs
portal-13985215.description: Specify an end time in a CTA’s countdown. This makes countdowns more precise and effective, helping visitors better understand when an time-limited offer expires.

portal-13984362.title: Elevate Theme Landing Page Sections
portal-13984362.description: You now have access to 9 new section templates in your Elevate theme to create more engaging landing pages: Hero banner - two column. Products and services. Products and services - two column. Products and services - three column. Products and services list. Testimonial cards. About us - one column. Frequently asked questions - two column. Countdown timer.

portal-13984334.title: Custom Remix Templates
portal-13984334.description: You can now save custom templates directly inside content remix. These templates create reusable patterns for repurposing and distributing your content—including outputs and their attributes. Share templates with your team to ensure consistent content repurposing across your organization.

portal-13984247.title: Zapier: Quick Account Creation
portal-13984247.description: Getting teams onboarded to Zapier and leveraging best-in-class automation has never been easier. With quick account creation, users can get started with a new Zapier account and begin building, using, and exploring Zaps without ever leaving the HubSpot platform.

portal-13979207.title: Owner & Team Filtering on Mobile Dashboards
portal-13979207.description: Dashboards and Reports in the HubSpot Mobile app can now be dynamically filtered by Owners or Teams.

portal-13974332.title: Scheduled hours for SLA rules & SLA reports
portal-13974332.description: With this change, Admins can now set the times when their SLA rules should be active, and the time zone of reference. While viewing an SLA-based report, it is now possible to view the information based on the configured scheduled hours on the individual SLA rule.

portal-13984325.title: Association Permission Updates
portal-13984325.description: This update introduces a new permission that enables admins to control whether a user or team can add, edit, and remove associations on existing records. We’ll start broad with a permission where a user can either add/edit/remove associations or they cannot. The initial version will apply across all object types with records.

portal-13984251.title: AI-Generated Workflow Names
portal-13984251.description: AI can automatically add descriptive names to your workflows.

portal-13981206.title: Separate WhatsApp Transactional and Marketing Subscription Types
portal-13981206.description: Introducing separate opt-ins/outs for WhatsApp message types: "WhatsApp Marketing" and "WhatsApp Transactional." You can now manage and obtain distinct consent for marketing and transactional messages, enhancing your communication outreach strategies and overall customer experience.

portal-13984213.title: Site Speed Dashboard - Real Performance Data from Real Visitors
portal-13984213.description: Now there's a new way to see exactly how fast your website loads for your actual visitors. With the site speed dashboard, you can use real user data to evaluate how well your website performs for visitors against key web vitals metrics. You can then use this data to optimize load times and improve user experience.

portal-13984228.title: Display Partial Payments on Invoices
portal-13984228.description: Your invoices now display complete payment history when customers make partial payments, giving both you and your customers clear visibility into all transaction details.

portal-13984333.title: Breeze Content Agent: Create Landing Pages

portal-13982288.title: Breeze Content Agent: Create Case Studies

portal-13984288.title: Unified Data Privacy Request Management
portal-13984288.description: Admins can now configure and publish their Data Privacy Request page in a few clicks, so contacts can submit data privacy requests.

portal-13982339.title: Tasks in the Sales Workspace
portal-13982339.description: Task management functionality is now integrated within the sales workspace, allowing users to search, sort, and organize tasks without switching contexts.

portal-13984249.title: View Guided Actions & Deal Risks in the Deals Table
portal-13984249.description: New visual indicators in the deals table that flag potential deal risks and recommend specific actions, enabling sales reps to quickly identify priorities across their pipeline at a glance.

portal-13982330.title: Automation Workflows Public API v4, v3, and v2 support for Sensitive Data
portal-13982330.description: This update allows both private and public app developers to manage sensitive data through the Automation Workflows Public API v4. Developers can use apps to create, read, update, and delete workflows that include sensitive data in triggers or actions. Note: Automation workflows do NOT support highly sensitive data. Only standard sensitive data can be read and/or written using automation.

portal-13984207.title: Sunsetting Social CRM Matches Beta
portal-13984207.description: Sunset date: April 30, 2025: Thank you for your participation in our beta program and for providing feedback on the Social CRM Matches feature

portal-13982303.title: Edit Labels for SMS Test Numbers
portal-13982303.description: SMS users will now be able to add and edit labels for test phone numbers within the SMS Editor.

portal-13974326.title: Anniversary filters
portal-13974326.description: Customers can now create filters for recurring events, such as birthdays and anniversaries, using date properties that do not require a specific year.

portal-13984278.title: Views and Checkouts on Payment Links
portal-13984278.description: To view checkouts, you can use "Payment→Payment Link" to see the payment link associated with the payment in the Payments Index page. Alternatively, you can view page views and number of transactions in Google Analytics.

portal-13978245.title: One-Click Subscription Cancellation
portal-13978245.description: Simplify your customer's subscription cancellation process by allowing them to initiate subscription cancellation with a link in their receipt. You can enable a setting to include a link to open a pre-formatted subscription cancellation email in each buyer's subscription receipt.

portal-13982267.title: Phone Number Port - U.S.
portal-13982267.description: Porting is the process of transferring an existing phone number from one service provider to another. This allows a switch in providers without the need to change the phone number.

portal-13982291.title: Quick Access Report Settings
portal-13982291.description: You can now make fast and easy edits to your Reports from the Report Viewer.

portal-13984215.title: Send Personalized AI Videos Through Email with the HeyGen App for HubSpot
portal-13984215.description: The improved HeyGen app for HubSpot now helps you automate the production and distribution of personalized AI-generated videos through marketing emails. This let’s marketers create personalized video experiences at scale using customer data from HubSpot.

portal-13982272.title: Receive Inbound Calls with Calling Apps in HubSpot
portal-13982272.description: If you’re using a third-party calling app in HubSpot, you can now receive inbound calls anywhere within HubSpot and navigate around while on live calls. The new integrated inbound + outbound calling experience is now available with Zoom Phone and RingCentral, with other apps coming soon.

portal-13982357.title: Autosave properties on the about section and record preview
portal-13982357.description: Editing properties on the record page and Preview sidebar is now faster, easier, and more intuitive. Instead of clicking ‘save’ after each edit, HubSpot will save your property edits as they are made on the ‘about this record’ section on the left sidebar of the record page, as well as the Preview sidebar.

portal-13984218.title: Introducing Native Order Creation in HubSpot
portal-13984218.description: We're excited to announce the launch of native order creation directly within HubSpot. This new feature allows you to create and manage sales orders without leaving the HubSpot platform. You can now generate orders from deals, associate them with contacts and companies, and track order details all in one place.

portal-13978372.title: User Time Zones for Marketing Content Scheduling and Marketing Index Pages
portal-13978372.description: We're excited to announce the rollout of the User Time Zone feature, the first step toward a seamless time zone experience across HubSpot. You can now set your preferred time zone for Marketing Content Scheduling (email, social, and SMS) and Marketing Index Pages.

portal-13984262.title: Create Subscription API
portal-13984262.description: You can now use the subscription API to create subscriptions in HubSpot. You can create subscriptions that store data as CRM records on the subscription object. You can also create subscriptions that will automatically send invoices to your customers. Invoices can be digitally paid through HubSpot payments, Stripe payment processing, or marked as paid when you receive an offline payment.

portal-13982346.title: Developer Platform Version 2025.1 Release
portal-13982346.description: Starting April 1, 2025, the Projects Framework and Developer tools will support platform version 2025.1, which necessitates Node.js v20 as the minimum version for serverless and endpoint functions. The previous version, 2023.2, will no longer be supported starting October 1, 2025. For more details, refer to Projects platform versioning (BETA).

portal-13922229.title: Customization tools for new knowledge bases
portal-13922229.description: Please note: This release is for new knowledge bases only. For customers with existing HubSpot knowledge bases, there will be a forthcoming release: "Migrate your existing knowledge base onto the new suite of customization tools" With this update, we’re introducing a slew of new customization features to the knowledge base tool.

portal-13984222.title: Lists as a Data Source in Custom Report Builder
portal-13984222.description: You can now select 'Lists' as a Primary or Secondary data source in the Custom Report Builder.

portal-13982260.title: Remix Multiple Pieces of Content
portal-13982260.description: Rather than starting your remix from a single piece of content, you will now be able to start your remix from multiple pieces of content at a time. Starting from multiple pieces of content gives our AI more content to work from, which can improve the quality of the resulting content that you can create.

portal-13982307.title: Video Remixing
portal-13982307.description: Create video shorts from your existing content in minutes with our new AI-powered clip creator. You can now quickly select key moments using the transcript-based editor and repurpose them across your marketing channels—no advanced editing skills needed.

portal-13982203.title: Help Desk Board Layout
portal-13982203.description: The board is a new layout in help desk that provides a visual representation of ticket movement across pipeline stages. Tickets on the board are organized into columns, with each column corresponding to a specific pipeline stage.

portal-13984209.title: Forecast multiple outcomes using custom date and currency properties
portal-13984209.description: : Admins can now create custom forecasts for their team that measure revenue using any deal date property and any deal amount property that is marked as a currency field type.

portal-13982250.title: ‘Undo’ edits to association stage tracker card properties
portal-13982250.description: We’ve enhanced the property editing experience for association stage tracker cards that can be added to the middle column of the record page. Now, users will see a save status component in the bottom-left of their screen with an 'undo' action when editing properties in the association stage tracker card. Clicking 'undo' will revert the most recent edit to the property.

portal-13982312.title: Custom Channels API - include channel image and description
portal-13982312.description: Today, when an admin goes to Help Desk settings to connect a channel that comes from a connected app, they see the app name and app icon. With this enhancement, a developer can use the Custom Channels API to directly configure metadata about a channel they own, like name, image, or short description, so that admins have more confidence about what they are about to configure.

portal-13982319.title: Ticket Properties in the New Forms Editor
portal-13982319.description: With this update, you can: Use Default & Custom Ticket Properties - Capture details needed to create and manage tickets, including custom fields tailored to your business.. Incorporate Ticket Properties in Multi-Step Forms - Collect ticket-related information across multiple steps for a smoother user experience..

portal-13978315.title: File Preview format for file properties in personalization tokens
portal-13978315.description: The format of file properties inserted as personalization tokens is changing - HubSpot will now format file properties as File Previews. Previously, file properties inserted as personalization tokens are formatted as raw URLs that cannot be easily shared. Before: Now, file properties inserted as personalization tokens will display as a File Preview page in HubSpot.

portal-13982274.title: Create Quotes from Contact & Company Record Pages
portal-13982274.description: Quotes were previously only available on deal record pages. Now, you can view and create quotes directly from Contact and Company record pages as well.

portal-13982252.title: 'Undo’ edits to lead association card on the record page
portal-13982252.description: This enhancement will inform users when a property edit is saved and give them the option to 'undo' any data entry mistakes.

portal-13982222.title: New App Install & Uninstall User Permissions for Admins
portal-13982222.description: HubSpot admins now have more granular control over whether certain users can install and/or uninstall apps. This is possible through an update to the existing App Marketplace permission, now broken into two permission ty

portal-13982219.title: Adding "Learn More" assistance to Help Desk
portal-13982219.description: With the new Learn More feature on the Help Desk list view and in the Help Desk settings, customers will be able to access contextual knowledge base content and academy videos. This visible, but unobtrusive pattern enables users to more easily access on-demand help when needed and learn more about the help desk.

portal-13982265.title: Knowledge Sources Sidebar Card
portal-13982265.description: This change introduces a new knowledge sources sidebar card, which can be added to the help desk sidebar. The knowledge sources sidebar card: Allows users to perform a keyword search to find related resources without leaving the workspace. . If enabled, provides AI-generated recommendations for which help content might be relevant based on the context of the ticket. .

portal-13982242.title: Users can reply to closed tickets in the Customer Portal
portal-13982242.description: Users can now reply to closed tickets directly within the Customer Portal—no need to start a new conversation or switch to email! If a user needs to follow up on a resolved issue, they can simply reopen the conversation with a reply, keeping all the context in one place.

portal-13978362.title: Save a Payment Method on File for Subscriptions
portal-13978362.description: You can now speed up payments with stored credit card and ACH details for subscriptions within the Subscriptions Editor! We use multiple layers of security to protect sensitive payment information, and our payments tool is built using Stripe's API to manage the secure collection and transmission of payment data.

portal-13982248.title: Associate Deals, Tickets and Custom objects when creating records
portal-13982248.description: iOS users will now be able to associate to another record when creating a new Deal, Ticket or Custom object. If the portal admin has required an association, that requirement will be enforced as well.

portal-13981218.title: Include deals in forecast submissions
portal-13981218.description: Sales reps and managers can now see which deals were included in a manual forecast submission. This visibility shows exactly which deals contributed to a forecasted number, helping teams track how forecasts evolve over time.

portal-13980252.title: reCAPTCHA score based bot form submissions detection
portal-13980252.description: With the introduction of reCAPTCHA Score-Based Bot Form Submissions Detection, form submissions are now validated against the score provided by Google’s reCAPTCHA tool, which provides a risk score ranging from 0.0 to 1.0: 1.0: Low risk, highly likely to be legitimate.. 0.0: High risk, likely to be fraudulent..

portal-13980268.title: Updated Customer Success Workspace
portal-13980268.description: The customer success workspace is evolving. It still provides a dedicated home base for customer success managers inside of HubSpot, but has a new look and some additional functionality making it more customer success specific.

portal-13978241.title: Train the Customer Agent on private Knowledge Base articles and control citations for public sources
portal-13978241.description: Customers can now train the Customer Agent on private Knowledge Base articles and also toggle citations on or off for any public source.

portal-13982258.title: View property validation rules via public API

portal-13978355.title: AI Campaign summary insights
portal-13978355.description: The newly embedded AI Campaigns Summary on each Campaigns Performance page makes generating insights and results faster and easier than ever. With just a glance, you can: Quickly review key metrics. Effortlessly identify top performing assets. Instantly uncover highlights and key learnings.

portal-13977225.title: New Sidebar in the Marketing Email Editor
portal-13977225.description: Starting January 9th, we will be rolling out a refreshed side navigation of the Marketing Email Editor.

portal-13982239.title: Breeze record summaries moving to the right sidebar

portal-13978287.title: AI-Powered A/B Testing for Landing Pages
portal-13978287.description: Optimize your landing pages faster and with greater confidence using our new AI-assisted A/B testing feature. When creating page variants, you can now leverage AI to generate alternative content suggestions and implement recommendations with a single click.

portal-13982244.title: Create and Engage With New Users Instantly with the OneSignal App for HubSpot

portal-13980250.title: New Forms Editor | Global Events & Instance API

portal-13980245.title: Close popup CTA automatically after form submission

portal-13980233.title: Generate Goal Reports
portal-13980233.description: You can now generate a report for any existing goal directly from the Goals app, eliminating the need to create reports and goals separately.

portal-13980232.title: Goal Reporting Improvements
portal-13980232.description: You can now add goals more easily to reports to analyze goal progress and add goal reports to a dashboard. With this change, users can: Add any goal type to a report, not just revenue goals. Select a specific goal to report on, and not just an aggregate of all revenue goals.. Previously, only revenue goals could be added to reports.

portal-13981204.title: Centralized view into what HubSpot assets are using subscription types
portal-13981204.description: Introducing a subscriptions 'usage' tab. You now have a view within the subscription settings to see how and where different subscription types are used across the HubSpot application.

portal-13980247.title: A/B Testing for CTAs
portal-13980247.description: You can now run A/B tests on CTAs created through the new editor. This feature allows you to compare two CTA variations to determine which one performs best based on clicks and views. With a 50/50 traffic split, you can optimize your CTAs and make data-driven decisions to improve conversions.

portal-13980226.title: Edit a Video Thumbnail
portal-13980226.description: When creating thumbnails for your videos, you can now select a video frame and edit it directly using HubSpot's built-in image editing tools or Adobe Express.

portal-13980271.title: “Alter list membership” action changes in the Automation Workflows Public API v4

portal-13977224.title: Reporting on time in ticket status

portal-13978370.title: Refine which associated records get scored in Scoring Apps

portal-13980235.title: Preview and Customize Quote Emails
portal-13980235.description: You can now customize and preview quote emails before sending them to buyers. You have the option to either send the email directly, or copy the quote link to send it separately.

portal-13980210.title: Specify the timeframe of when an event occurred in Scoring Apps
portal-13980210.description: You can now specify the timeframe (recency) of when the actions being scored occurred in Lead and Health Scores.

portal-13978290.title: Updating "Integrations" to "Data Integration" in the Main Navigation

portal-13980262.title: Streamline Revenue Management with Subscription Objects

portal-13980208.title: Index table contextual actions
portal-13980208.description: You can now easily sort, freeze, add, and remove columns right on the Index table.

portal-13975220.title: Create reports from CRM index pages Beta ending
portal-13975220.description: At this time, we're going to be sunsetting the "Create Report" Beta for the CRM Index page.

portal-13980236.title: Mobile Chat SDK
portal-13980236.description: The Mobile Chat SDK allows you to integrate HubSpot chat into any iOS or Android app, providing fast, efficient, and empathetic in-app customer support. With the Mobile Chat SDK, you can: Easily integrate HubSpot chat into any iOS or Android app with minimal coding to deliver a support experience that feels contextual and native to your app..

portal-13978358.title: 'Undo' action for property autosave on association record cards

portal-13972302.title: Automated deactivation for publicly exposed tokens [Live in 30 days]
portal-13972302.description: All newly identified tokens exposed to public GitHub repositories will be revoked automatically and the customers (and their associated technical contacts) will be notified to perform the necessary remediation. The tokens that will be covered by this new experience include: Developer HAPI Keys (associated with Developer Portals). Personal Access Key (associated with the CLI). Private App Tokens.

portal-13974234.title: Autosave properties on the CRM index page

portal-13978285.title: Utilize calendar integration to sync user's out of office

portal-13977215.title: Add calls, emails and meetings to campaigns

portal-13976244.title: Optionally Disable Tickets Across HubSpot
portal-13976244.description: Admins will now be able to disable the Tickets object, allowing admins to hide tickets across HubSpot (including in the global navigation). We are eager to test how this gives HubSpot admins the ability to effectively control their data model while ensuring users aren't missing out on functionality.

portal-13974285.title: Remove Partial Submissions
portal-13974285.description: HubSpot is updating its email surveys to count only fully completed submissions on the survey landing page, eliminating partial submissions from email clicks to improve feedback quality.

portal-13968273.title: Sunsetting SSO for a JWT-based application to access private content
portal-13968273.description: The ability to set up SSO for a JWT-based application to access private content has been deprecated. Moving forward, you can set up SSO for private content using the OpenID Connect standard.

portal-13969236.title: Legacy Product Library
portal-13969236.description: The Legacy Product Library is sunset as of January 13th, 2025.

portal-13958255.title: Content Scaffolding in Custom Templates
portal-13958255.description: Content scaffolding gives you control over how generative AI tools add content to your templates. It lets you custom-define the template schema, specifying how different sections of the template should be used and what types of content they should contain.

portal-13963260.title: Card Library
portal-13963260.description: We will sunset the card library on December 18, 2024. This feature provided admins with a page to manage all of their CRM cards regardless of location (e.g. across record objects, preview sidebars).

portal-13968202.title: Removing Searchability for Low-Usage Contact Properties
portal-13968202.description: On December 16th, 2024, HubSpot will end support enabling global search of the following contact properties: City. Zip. State. Country. Job Title. Industry. Searching for values stored within these properties will not yield results, however, the properties will still display (where applicable) in the results table to provide additional context around contacts.

portal-13958472.title: Sunsetting 'Any-Stage' Funnel Report
portal-13958472.description: : Effective October 17, 2024, you will no longer have access to legacy funnel reports that used the 'any-stage' filter

portal-13924202.title: AI Forecasting
portal-13924202.description: HubSpot's new AI-powered forecast uses historical sales data to project future sales, getting your team closer to a spot-on forecast. We are also introducing a brand new AI model to improve the accuracy of forecast predictions, along with a day 1 and a day 28 projection, so that sales teams can increase their pipeline visibility throughout the entire month.

portal-13961208.title: Reminder: Sunsetting the Stripe 1.0 Integration
portal-13961208.description: HubSpot’s legacy Stripe integration will be sunsetting on 11/4/2024.

portal-13958504.title: Declarative Optional Scopes for Public Apps
portal-13958504.description: We are disabling the option for developers to self-select into declaring optional scopes on October 21, 2024. This comes as an update to the auth settings for public apps, which will add new options for choosing the scopes used by your app.

portal-13946240.title: Deprecating contact attribution for e-commerce emails
portal-13946240.description: Due to internal system changes that are using the cart abandonment module will no longer include data for email opens. Click data will still be available. This change also impact exports which will not include email opens from emails using the cart abandonment module.

portal-13941318.title: iOS 15 and Android 9 are no longer supported for the HubSpot Mobile App
portal-13941318.description: The HubSpot mobile app no longer runs on devices running Android 9 or earlier, and iOS 15 and earlier. To continue using the HubSpot mobile app, affected customers must update their device to Android 10 or later, or iOS 16 or later, and update the HubSpot app. If the customer’s device does not support Android 10 or later or iOS 16 or later, they must get a new device.

portal-13946336.title: Emailing contacts without Legal Basis will not include tracking
portal-13946336.description: If your portal has Data Privacy settings turned on, HubSpot will no longer add open and click tracking to emails for contacts without legal basis.

custom-actions-support-for-enrolled-non-.title: Custom Actions Support for Enrolled & Non-Enrolled Records
custom-actions-support-for-enrolled-non-.description: HubSpot enhances workflows with event-based support, adding a requiresObject flag and per-action object targeting. Custom actions can run without an enrolled object and will show a target object selector, defaulting to the workflow’s enrolled object. The change rolls out on November 24, 2025.

introducing-hubspot-for-sheets-your-crm-.title: Introducing HubSpot for Sheets: Your CRM, Now In Google Workspace

introducing-the-new-aeo-grader-get-advan.title: Introducing the New AEO Grader: Get Advanced Insights for AI Visibility

introducing-the-hubspot-connector-for-cl.title: Introducing the HubSpot connector for Claude

hubspot-connector-for-chatgpt.title: HubSpot connector for ChatGPT
hubspot-connector-for-chatgpt.description: The expanded HubSpot connector for ChatGPT now handles both quick everyday questions and deep research tasks. You can leverage AI to analyze your CRM data and get insights through natural language queries. *available to all hubs and tiers

hubspot-product-update-new-security-cont.title: HubSpot Product Update - New Security Contact Role

hubspot-payments-is-now-available-in-can.title: HubSpot Payments is now available in Canada and the UK! 🚀

a-smarter-campaign-goals-experience.title: A smarter Campaign Goals experience
a-smarter-campaign-goals-experience.description: Introducing the Campaign Goals Tracker - a smarter way to set, track, and report on your campaigns! A redesigned and more intelligent approach to measuring campaign performance. *available to all Marketing Hub Pro+ customers

healthy-unhealthy-lists-in-email-health.title: Healthy / Unhealthy Lists in Email Health
healthy-unhealthy-lists-in-email-health.description: You can now view a new report within the Email Health dashboard to surface the healthiest and unhealthiest performing recipient lists based on engagement metrics and deliverability. *available to all Marketing Hub Pro+ customers

send-size-preview-with-exclusion-details.title: Send Size Preview with exclusion details
send-size-preview-with-exclusion-details.description: Send Size Preview shows an estimated recipient count before you send a marketing email. This feature now includes detailed reasons why certain contacts won't receive the email. *available to all hubs and tiers

unified-campaign-and-crm-tasks.title: Unified campaign and CRM tasks
unified-campaign-and-crm-tasks.description: Customers now have access to a unified task system in HubSpot. This means all tasks whether created in Marketing Hub tools or CRM are now in one place for better coordination. *available to all Marketing Hub Pro+ customers

add-active-contact-lists-to-campaigns.title: Add active contact lists to campaigns
add-active-contact-lists-to-campaigns.description: Users can now add active contact lists to their campaigns - saving time, reducing manual work, and giving them more confidence in reaching the right audience. Lists automatically update as contacts *available to all Marketing Hub Pro+ customers

object-property-snapshots-for-event-data.title: Object Property Snapshots for Event Data
object-property-snapshots-for-event-data.description: HubSpot now automatically captures and stores key property values when events occur, giving you historical context for better reporting and analysis. This feature helps you understand how your data changes over time for more informed decisions. Learn More *available to all Marketing Hub Enterprise customers

enhancement-template-selection-in-landin.title: Enhancement: Template Selection in Landing Pages
enhancement-template-selection-in-landin.description: We have been working on a new, streamlined landing page creation flow to decrease drop-off and increase landing page creation success. The new template selection makes it easier to get started. *available to all hubs and tiers

domains-activity-log.title: Domains Activity Log
domains-activity-log.description: Users can now download a CSV file of their domain change and activity history from the past 90 days. This includes updates like domain additions, removals, and configuration changes for complete audit visibility. *available to all Content Hub Enterprise customers

improved-international-phone-number-form.title: Improved International Phone Number Formatting in Personalization Tokens
improved-international-phone-number-form.description: Phone number properties inserted as personalization tokens now display in a clearer international format with proper country codes and formatting for better readability. *available to all hubs and tiers

add-associations-to-deals-table-in-sales.title: Add Associations to Deals Table in Sales Workspace
add-associations-to-deals-table-in-sales.description: You can now add columns for several types of associations in the Sales Workspace deals table. Get insight into the associations between deals and contacts, companies, or custom objects. *available to all Sales Hub Pro+ customers

call-from-other-devices-using-the-call-r.title: Call from other devices using the Call Remote
call-from-other-devices-using-the-call-r.description: Users can now use the call remote to make calls using an external device or the HubSpot mobile app. This update provides flexibility in how and where you make calls. *available to all Sales Hub Starter+ customers

sales-workspace-updates.title: Sales Workspace Updates
sales-workspace-updates.description: We've updated the sales workspace to integrate more seamlessly with the Smart CRM, making it easier for our customers to move between systems and focus on what matters most. This reduces context switching. *available to all Sales Hub Pro+ customers

understand-lead-scoring-calculations-wit.title: Understand Lead Scoring Calculations with Improved "Test A Record"
understand-lead-scoring-calculations-wit.description: The Test a Record feature in Lead Scoring has been improved to provide customers a clearer view into how scores are calculated. This transparency helps you fine-tune your scoring model and ensure it aligns with your sales process for better lead prioritization. *available to all Sales & Marketing Hub Pro+ customers

today-s-insights-card.title: Today's Insights Card
today-s-insights-card.description: The new Today's Insights card in Help Desk workspace shows key trends in rep availability, ticket volume, and team performance. Make staffing decisions and identify issues proactively. *available to all Service Hub Pro+ Customers

close-date-automation-for-services.title: Close Date Automation for Services
close-date-automation-for-services.description: Close date automation is now available for service records. When you move a service to a closed stage in any service pipeline, the close date automatically updates, ensuring accurate reporting. *available to all hubs and tiers

board-view-for-customer-tab-in-customer-.title: Board view for customer tab in Customer Success Workspace
board-view-for-customer-tab-in-customer-.description: You can now view your customers in a board view (in addition to a list view) in the Customer Success Workspace. This visual approach helps CSMs track customer status and health at a glance. *available to all Service Hub Pro+ Customers

default-email-in-help-desk.title: Default email in help desk
default-email-in-help-desk.description: Default email allows admins to set a default email address by team in help desk. For many large multi team support orgs with many different email addresses, this saves time and prevents errors. *available to all Service Hub Pro+ customers

help-desk-views-customization-experience.title: Help Desk Views Customization Experience and Improvements
help-desk-views-customization-experience.description: This set of updates unlocks more ways to customize and manage the views sidebar in the help desk. Via the new Views customization experience, create the perfect workflow for your team. *available to all Service Hub Pro+ customers

average-nps-rating-and-customer-satisfac.title: Average NPS Rating and Customer Satisfaction Score CRM Cards
average-nps-rating-and-customer-satisfac.description: Two new CRM reporting cards integrate directly into Company and Contact record pages, displaying average Net Promoter Score and Customer Satisfaction ratings. Learn More *available to all Service Hub Pro+ customers

customize-inbound-recording-consent-mess.title: Customize Inbound Recording Consent Message
customize-inbound-recording-consent-mess.description: You can now completely customize the message that callers hear before they're connected to your reps and teams. This message informs callers about call recording and ensures compliance. *available to all Sales & Service Hub Pro+ customers

commerce-user-permissions-settings.title: Commerce User Permissions Settings
commerce-user-permissions-settings.description: You can now manage access to quotes, products, billing, and payments through Commerce permissions within Users and Teams. These settings were previously scattered - now they're centralized. *available to all hubs and tiers

respond-to-disputes-chargebacks-within-c.title: Respond to Disputes & Chargebacks within Commerce Hub
respond-to-disputes-chargebacks-within-c.description: Customers can now manage disputed payments directly within Commerce Hub using a new self service dispute resolution flow. Respond to chargebacks faster and track resolution status. *available to all hubs and tiers

append-buyer-email-to-payment-link-redir.title: Append Buyer Email to Payment Link Redirects
append-buyer-email-to-payment-link-redir.description: You can now append the buyer's email to your redirect URL in payment links. When someone completes a purchase, their email is automatically included in the redirect. *available to all hubs and tiers

job-title-in-contact-data-enrichment.title: Job title in Contact Data Enrichment
job-title-in-contact-data-enrichment.description: In addition to the role, sub-role, and seniority information that Breeze Intelligence previously provided, we now provide the job title as well for more complete contact enrichment. *available to all hubs and tiers

app-certification-status-renewal-policy-.title: App Certification Status & Renewal Policy Update
app-certification-status-renewal-policy-.description: This update introduces enhanced visual indicators for App Certification statuses in the developer portal, aligned with the new recertification policy. Under this policy, certified apps must renew their certification every two years to maintain their status, with clearer actionable status indicators throughout the lifecycle. *available to all app providers with listed apps in the HubSpot App Marketplace

additional-details-returned-when-generat.title: Additional details returned when generating OAuth access tokens
additional-details-returned-when-generat.description: New details are included in the response body for API POST requests made to the OAuth endpoint. This provides developers with more information for better integration management and debugging. *available to all hubs and tiers

bidirectional-associations-sync-for-sale.title: Bidirectional associations sync for Salesforce Tickets, Tasks, and custom objects
bidirectional-associations-sync-for-sale.description: HubSpot's integration with Salesforce already supports syncing object associations for standard objects, and now extends this to tickets, tasks, and custom objects for complete data synchronization. *available to all HubSpot Pro+ customers

marketplace-listing-editor-infrastructur.title: Marketplace Listing Editor Infrastructure Upgrade & Language Flexibility
marketplace-listing-editor-infrastructur.description: We're upgrading our listing editor's core infrastructure to deliver a smoother, more efficient experience. This update also introduces support for multiple languages in your marketplace listings. *available to all hubs and tiers

google-performance-max-ad-creation-and-e.title: Google Performance Max Ad Creation and Enhanced Reporting
google-performance-max-ad-creation-and-e.description: HubSpot users can now create and view more granular reporting on Google Performance Max ad campaigns right from HubSpot. This integration streamlines your advertising workflow and provides deeper insights. Learn More *available to all hubs and tiers

hubspot-connector-for-claude-additional-.title: HubSpot connector for Claude: Additional Object Access (Read-Only) and Admin Controls
hubspot-connector-for-claude-additional-.description: The HubSpot connector for Claude now supports read-only access to additional CRM objects and includes new admin controls for better governance. This expansion enables more sophisticated AI powered workflows while maintaining security and control. *available to all hubs and tiers

the-customer-agent-is-now-2x-smarter.title: The Customer Agent is now 2X smarter
the-customer-agent-is-now-2x-smarter.description: The Customer Agent now has enhanced reasoning skills that bring it even closer to human-level problem solving. It's not just about answering questions - it's about understanding context and providing thoughtful solutions. *available to all Hubspot Pro+ customers

assign-customer-agent-to-email.title: Assign Customer Agent to Email
assign-customer-agent-to-email.description: Businesses can now assign the Customer Agent to their Email accounts, streamlining support and lightening the load on human agents. For routine inquiries, let AI handle the response. *available to all Hubspot Pro+ customers

ai-powered-recommendations-in-automation.title: AI-Powered Recommendations in Automation Overview
ai-powered-recommendations-in-automation.description: You can now see AI-powered automation suggestions based on how your team uses HubSpot directly on the Automation Overview page. These recommendations help you discover new ways to save time and scale your operations. *available to all Hubspot Pro+ customers

edit-brand-information.title: Edit Brand Information
edit-brand-information.description: HubSpot now lets you customize your brand information used in AI tools. HubSpot's AI tools use brand information to provide helpful context for content generation, and now you have full control over how your brand is represented. *available to all Hubspot Pro+ customers

quick-fill-an-index-page-view-with-smart.title: Quick fill an index page view with smart properties
quick-fill-an-index-page-view-with-smart.description: You'll now be able to fill a view when you are creating a smart property, enabling you to more quickly start analyzing data. Skip the manual property selection and let AI suggest the most relevant fields. *available to all hubs and tiers

breeze-copilot-data-model-configuration.title: Breeze Copilot Data Model Configuration
breeze-copilot-data-model-configuration.description: Breeze Copilot can now help you configure your data model and answer questions about best practices. You don't need to worry about making mistakes - Copilot guides you through the right configuration. *available to all hubs and tiers

brand-identity-source-attribution.title: Brand Identity Source Attribution
brand-identity-source-attribution.description: HubSpot now shows users where their brand information comes from across different sources. Brand information is gathered from multiple sources like manual input, AI suggestions, and imported data - now you can see the origin of each element. *available to all Hubspot Pro+ customers

citations-in-smart-properties.title: Citations in Smart Properties
